text_query: Événements impliquant des groupes rebelles comme acteur principal, avec le nombre de sources médiatiques distinctes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Distinctes' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération diplomatique entre gouvernements, classés par échelle de Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Moyenne du ton des articles pour les événements de protestation par pays de l'acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Geo_Acteur1', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique (plus de 50 mentions) mais un ton moyen négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND e.AvgTone < 0 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de temps entre la date de l'événement et la date de mention la plus ancienne pour chaque événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', MIN(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Premiere_Mention', e.Day AS 'Jour_Evenement', (julianday(substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 1, 4) || '-' || substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 5, 2) || '-' || substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Difference_Jours' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day HAVING Difference_Jours > 0 ORDER BY Difference_Jours DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec d'autres gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_Conflit', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Distribution des types de mention (WEB, TV, etc.) pour les événements militaires (QuadClass 4).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Pays où se produisent le plus d'événements avec un acteur civil (CVL) comme acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Civils' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec une confiance moyenne des mentions supérieure à 80, impliquant des acteurs religieux.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COALESCE(e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name) AS 'Acteur_Principal', COALESCE(e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.Actor2Religion1Code) AS 'Religion_Acteur', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.Actor2Name, e.Actor2Religion1Code HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de sources et le ton moyen pour les événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 GROUP BY e.NumSources HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) qui ont généré le plus grand nombre de mentions dérivées (mentions avec un délai).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Derivees' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND m.MentionTimeDate > e.Day GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs médiatiques (MED) couvrant des événements de conflit, avec le ton moyen de leurs articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Source_Information', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Articles_Distincts' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec localisation géographique précise (Geo_Type >= 3) et un ton fortement négatif (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Precision_Geographique', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.AvgTone < -5 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mois de l'année avec le plus grand nombre d'événements de menace (EventRootCode '13') impliquant des militaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces_Militaires' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Différence de ton entre l'événement principal (AvgTone) et le ton moyen des mentions qui le couvrent.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 2 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent le plus fréquemment des événements avec un acteur spécifique (ex: USA).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_USA' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur principal et secondaire partagent la même religion.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Commune' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code = e.Actor2Religion1Code LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution annuelle du nombre moyen de mentions par événement pour les conflits matériels (QuadClass 4).
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Moyenne_Mentions_Par_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY e.Year ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Différence de ton entre le document source et la moyenne de l'événement pour les actions militaires
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Ecart_Ton', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND m.MentionDocTone IS NOT NULL AND e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 75;

text_query: Acteurs civils impliqués dans des événements où la localisation géographique ne correspond pas à leur pays
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Localisation', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode <> e.ActionGeo_CountryCode LIMIT 60;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre anormalement élevé d'articles par rapport aux sources
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (NumArticles * 1.0 / NumSources) AS 'Ratio_Articles_Sources', EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0 AND NumArticles > (NumSources * 10) ORDER BY (NumArticles * 1.0 / NumSources) DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Mentions dont le ton est extrêmement positif pour des événements de conflit matériel
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND m.MentionDocTone > 5 ORDER BY m.MentionDocTone DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Groupes ethniques ou religieux mentionnés comme acteurs principaux dans des événements de coopération
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1EthnicCode AS 'Groupe_Ethnique', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) AND e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 80;

text_query: Événements où les deux acteurs sont de types différents (ex: gouvernement vs média)
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_1', Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_2', EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Type1Code <> Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Day DESC LIMIT 90;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent le plus d'événements avec un ton négatif
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionDocTone < -2 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements de menace ou de coercition impliquant des acteurs militaires
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events WHERE EventRootCode IN ('13', '17') AND (Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') ORDER BY GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 70;

text_query: Corrélation entre la longueur du document de mention et le ton pour les événements diplomatiques
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND m.MentionDocLen IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC LIMIT 65;

text_query: Acteurs dont le pays géographique ne correspond pas au code pays, pour les événements racines
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Code', Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Geo', IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine' FROM events WHERE IsRootEvent = 1 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1CountryCode <> Actor1Geo_CountryCode LIMIT 55;

text_query: Événements avec un très haut niveau de confiance des mentions mais un ton moyen neutre
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 90 AND ABS(e.AvgTone) < 2 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 45;

text_query: Répartition des types d'acteurs pour les événements de classe quad 3 (conflit verbal)
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 3 AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mentions dont la date diffère significativement de la date de l'événement
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', m.MentionTimeDate AS 'Date_Mention', ABS(CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 8) AS INTEGER) - e.Day) AS 'Difference_Jours', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE ABS(CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 8) AS INTEGER) - e.Day) > 7 ORDER BY ABS(CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 8) AS INTEGER) - e.Day) DESC LIMIT 85;

text_query: Événements d'aide matérielle (code 07) dirigés vers des pays spécifiques
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Name AS 'Donneur', Actor2Name AS 'Beneficiaire', ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events WHERE EventBaseCode = '071' AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'FR', 'DE', 'CN') ORDER BY NumArticles DESC LIMIT 60;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux impliqués dans des événements de coopération internationale
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code NOT IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'COP') AND e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 75;

text_query: Différence de localisation entre l'acteur 1 et le lieu de l'action pour les événements violents
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events WHERE EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode <> ActionGeo_CountryCode LIMIT 70;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre de mentions très supérieur à la moyenne pour leur classe quad
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.QuadClass = e.QuadClass) AS 'Moyenne_Classe', EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e WHERE NumMentions > 2 * (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.QuadClass = e.QuadClass) ORDER BY NumMentions DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Calcule le nombre d'événements et le ton moyen par type d'acteur principal pour les événements de conflit matériel.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Trouve les 10 sources de mentions les plus fréquentes pour les événements impliquant des groupes rebelles.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Calcule le score Goldstein moyen par pays où l'action s'est produite pour les événements de protestation.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '14' AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Score_Goldstein_Moyen ASC;

text_query: Affiche les événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Mentions_Moyen, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > 1 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les paires d'acteurs (pays) les plus fréquentes dans les événements de coopération diplomatique.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Acteur1, Actor2CountryCode AS Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '05' AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode, Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Trouve les types d'événements (EventRootCode) avec le plus haut ton moyen pour les acteurs gouvernementaux.
sql_query: SELECT EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY EventRootCode ORDER BY Ton_Moyen DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Affiche les événements de menace avec plus de 5 mentions et un ton moyen négatif.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, NumMentions AS Nombre_Mentions, AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '13' AND NumMentions > 5 AND AvgTone < 0 ORDER BY AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les sources qui couvrent à la fois des événements de coopération et de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.EventRootCode) = 2 LIMIT 15;

text_query: Calcule le pourcentage d'événements par classe QuadClass pour chaque année.
sql_query: SELECT Year AS Annee, QuadClass AS Classe, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY Year) AS Pourcentage FROM events GROUP BY Year, QuadClass ORDER BY Annee, Classe;

text_query: Identifie les événements où l'acteur secondaire est un groupe connu (comme l'ONU) et le ton est positif.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor2KnownGroupCode AS Groupe, AvgTone AS Ton FROM events WHERE Actor2KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND AvgTone > 5 ORDER BY AvgTone DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Calcule la corrélation approximative entre le nombre de sources et le nombre d'articles par événement.
sql_query: SELECT (AVG(NumSources * NumArticles) - AVG(NumSources) * AVG(NumArticles)) / (SQRT(AVG(NumSources * NumSources) - AVG(NumSources) * AVG(NumSources)) * SQRT(AVG(NumArticles * NumArticles) - AVG(NumArticles) * AVG(NumArticles))) AS Correlation FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0 AND NumArticles > 0;

text_query: Affiche les événements où la localisation de l'acteur principal et de l'action diffèrent.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur, ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action FROM events WHERE Actor1Geo_CountryCode != ActionGeo_CountryCode AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les codes d'événement de base (EventBaseCode) avec la plus grande variance de ton.
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS Code_Evenement, MAX(AvgTone) - MIN(AvgTone) AS Etendue_Ton FROM events WHERE AvgTone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Etendue_Ton DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Calcule le nombre total de mentions par pays de l'acteur principal pour les événements militaires.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, SUM(NumMentions) AS Total_Mentions FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '15' AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Total_Mentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Identifie les événements avec un score Goldstein extrême (>7 ou <-7) et un ton moyen contradictoire.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, GoldsteinScale AS Score_Goldstein, AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE (GoldsteinScale > 7 OR GoldsteinScale < -7) AND (GoldsteinScale * AvgTone < 0) ORDER BY ABS(GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les paires de types d'acteurs les plus conflictuelles (QuadClass 3 ou 4).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, Actor2Type1Code AS Type_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Conflits FROM events WHERE QuadClass IN (3,4) AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code, Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Calcule le ton moyen des mentions par région géographique (première lettre du code pays d'action).
sql_query: SELECT SUBSTR(ActionGeo_CountryCode, 1, 1) AS Region, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Region ORDER BY Ton_Moyen_Mentions DESC;

text_query: Affiche les événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) avec le plus grand nombre de sources uniques.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, NumSources AS Nombre_Sources FROM events WHERE IsRootEvent = 1 ORDER BY NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Calcule la différence moyenne de ton entre les événements de coopération matérielle et verbale.
sql_query: SELECT (SELECT AVG(AvgTone) FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 2) - (SELECT AVG(AvgTone) FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 1) AS Difference_Ton_Cooperation;

text_query: Identifie les événements où l'acteur secondaire est une organisation internationale et l'acteur principal est un gouvernement.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor1Name AS Acteur_Principal, Actor2Name AS Acteur_Secondaire FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND (Actor2KnownGroupCode LIKE '%IGO%' OR Actor2Type1Code = 'IGO') LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les mois avec une augmentation de plus de 50% du nombre d'événements par rapport au mois précédent.
sql_query: WITH MonthlyCounts AS (SELECT MonthYear, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events GROUP BY MonthYear) SELECT a.MonthYear AS Mois, a.Nombre_Evenements, b.Nombre_Evenements AS Mois_Precedent, (a.Nombre_Evenements - b.Nombre_Evenements) * 100.0 / b.Nombre_Evenements AS Pourcentage_Augmentation FROM MonthlyCounts a JOIN MonthlyCounts b ON a.MonthYear = b.MonthYear + 1 WHERE a.Nombre_Evenements > b.Nombre_Evenements * 1.5 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Augmentation DESC;

text_query: Calcule le ratio mentions/articles par événement pour les événements avec plus de 10 articles.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, NumMentions AS Mentions, NumArticles AS Articles, CAST(NumMentions AS REAL) / NumArticles AS Ratio_Mentions_Articles FROM events WHERE NumArticles > 10 ORDER BY Ratio_Mentions_Articles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Affiche les événements où la confiance des mentions est inférieure à 50 mais le nombre de sources est élevé (>3).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.NumSources AS Nombre_Sources, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) < 50 AND e.NumSources > 3 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les codes d'événement les plus fréquents pour les acteurs non-étatiques.
sql_query: SELECT EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code NOT IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'COP') OR Actor2Type1Code NOT IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'COP') GROUP BY EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Identifie les événements avec des acteurs de religions différentes et un ton négatif.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor1Religion1Code AS Religion_Acteur1, Actor2Religion1Code AS Religion_Acteur2, AvgTone AS Ton FROM events WHERE Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Religion1Code != Actor2Religion1Code AND AvgTone < 0 ORDER BY AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les 5 paires de pays avec le plus d'événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays1, Actor2CountryCode AS Pays2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Cooperations FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 2 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode, Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Cooperations DESC LIMIT 5;

text_query: Calcule le pourcentage d'événements par type de géolocalisation (Geo_Type) pour l'acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Geo_Type AS Type_Geolocalisation, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE Actor1Geo_Type IS NOT NULL) AS Pourcentage FROM events WHERE Actor1Geo_Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Geo_Type ORDER BY Pourcentage DESC;

text_query: Trouve les sources qui mentionnent des événements avec des acteurs criminels plus de 5 fois.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CRM' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CRM' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Identifie les événements où l'acteur principal et secondaire sont du même type mais de pays différents.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2 FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = Actor2Type1Code AND Actor1CountryCode != Actor2CountryCode AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les événements de fourniture d'aide (EventRootCode '07') avec un score Goldstein élevé (>5).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, GoldsteinScale AS Score_Goldstein, Actor1Name AS Donateur, Actor2Name AS Beneficiaire FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '07' AND GoldsteinScale > 5 ORDER BY GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Calcule le ton moyen par tranche de nombre de mentions (0-5, 6-20, 21+).
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN NumMentions <= 5 THEN '0-5' WHEN NumMentions <= 20 THEN '6-20' ELSE '21+' END AS Tranche_Mentions, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events GROUP BY Tranche_Mentions ORDER BY Ton_Moyen DESC;

text_query: Affiche les événements avec des coordonnées géographiques précises (niveau ville) pour l'action et l'acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, ActionGeo_Fullname AS Lieu_Action, Actor1Geo_Fullname AS Lieu_Acteur FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND Actor1Geo_Type >= 3 AND ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Geo_Lat IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources ayant rapporté le plus d'événements avec un ton négatif (AvgTone < -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements_Negatifs FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Negatifs DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où les événements de type 'Protest' (EventRootCode = '14') sont les plus fréquents.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Protestations FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Protestations DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Sources dont les articles ont le ton moyen le plus négatif (MentionDocTone) pour les événements de type 'Assault' (EventRootCode = '18').
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Article, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Articles FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '18' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen_Article ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays avec la plus grande proportion d'événements impliquant la police (Actor2Type1Code = 'COP') comme second acteur.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor1CountryCode AND e2.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL)) AS Pourcentage_Police FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Police DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass = 2) avec un ton moyen positif, impliquant des ONG (Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO').
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name AS ONG, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen, e.GoldsteinScale AS Score_Goldstein FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.AvgTone > 0 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO' ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Types d'acteurs (Actor1Type1Code) les plus souvent associés à des événements de menace (EventRootCode = '13').
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Menaces FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Menaces DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de sources (NumSources) et le ton moyen (AvgTone) pour les événements de protestation (EventRootCode = '14').
sql_query: SELECT (SUM(e.NumSources * e.AvgTone) - SUM(e.NumSources) * SUM(e.AvgTone) / COUNT(*)) / (COUNT(*) * 1.0) AS Covariance_Approx FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.NumSources IS NOT NULL AND e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL;

text_query: Événements ayant le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement (AvgTone) et le ton moyen des articles le mentionnant (MentionDocTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Articles, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 1 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où les événements avec l'acteur 1 civil (Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL') ont un ton moyen significativement plus négatif que la moyenne nationale.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Civils, (SELECT AVG(e2.AvgTone) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor1CountryCode) AS Ton_Moyen_National FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND AVG(e.AvgTone) < (SELECT AVG(e2.AvgTone) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor1CountryCode) - 0.1 ORDER BY (Ton_Moyen_National - Ton_Moyen_Civils) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs 1 de type militaire (Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL') impliqués dans des événements avec le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS Acteur_Militaire, COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS Nombre_Sources_Distinctes FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY Nombre_Sources_Distinctes DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) avec un code d'événement de haut niveau (EventRootCode entre '18' et '20') et un nombre d'articles supérieur à la moyenne de ces codes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode AS Code_Racine, e.NumArticles AS Nombre_Articles FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.EventRootCode IN ('18','19','20') AND e.NumArticles > (SELECT AVG(e2.NumArticles) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.EventRootCode = e.EventRootCode AND e2.IsRootEvent = 1) ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Rapport entre le nombre de mentions et la confiance moyenne des mentions pour les événements diplomatiques (EventRootCode = '04').
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.NumMentions AS Mentions, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumMentions ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays acteur 1 dont les événements ont la plus grande variance de score Goldstein (mesure d'instabilité des interactions).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen, (SUM(e.GoldsteinScale * e.GoldsteinScale) - SUM(e.GoldsteinScale) * SUM(e.GoldsteinScale) / COUNT(*)) / (COUNT(*) * 1.0) AS Variance_Approx FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 20 ORDER BY Variance_Approx DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont de pays différents mais du même type (ex: deux gouvernements), avec un ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays1, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays2, e.Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1Type1Code = e.Actor2Type1Code AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.AvgTone > 2.0 ORDER BY e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques différentes, classés par pays de l'acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_Principal', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu' FROM events e WHERE e.NumSources > 5 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC, e.Actor1CountryCode ASC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Différence de ton moyen entre les articles mentionnant l'événement et le ton moyen de l'événement lui-même.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) >= 3 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de type militaire (QuadClass 4) impliquant des acteurs gouvernementaux, avec localisation précise.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') AND e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Acteurs civils les plus souvent mentionnés dans des événements de protestation, avec le nombre total d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Civil', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('CVL', 'OPP', 'REB', 'INS') AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY SUM(e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où le score Goldstein est en contradiction avec le ton moyen (positif vs négatif).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2' FROM events e WHERE (e.GoldsteinScale > 0 AND e.AvgTone < -5) OR (e.GoldsteinScale < 0 AND e.AvgTone > 5) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent le plus d'événements avec un ton très négatif.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Couvert' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -10 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre moyen de mentions pour les événements de conflit verbal.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Moyenne_Mentions', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC;

text_query: Corrélation entre la confiance des mentions et le ton des documents pour les événements violents.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) >= 2 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux les plus actifs dans les événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Type1Code) AS 'Types_Acteur' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1Type1Code NOT IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'COP') AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements avec des acteurs de type 'rebelle'.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('REB', 'INS') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('REB', 'INS') GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Différence temporelle moyenne entre l'événement et sa première mention dans la presse.
sql_query: SELECT AVG(JULIANDAY(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 7, 2) || ' ' || SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 11, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 13, 2)) - JULIANDAY(SUBSTR(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Difference_Jours_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Day IS NOT NULL AND m.MentionTimeDate IS NOT NULL;

text_query: Mentions les plus longues (en termes de longueur de document) pour les événements positifs.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID, m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionDocLen > 5000 AND m.MentionDocTone > 5 AND e.AvgTone > 5 ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) qui ont généré le plus de couverture médiatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs dont le code pays ne correspond pas au pays géographique de l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Lieu', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec un ton moyen extrême (très positif ou très négatif) et un score Goldstein neutre.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2' FROM events e WHERE (e.AvgTone > 15 OR e.AvgTone < -15) AND e.GoldsteinScale BETWEEN -1 AND 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources rapportant le plus d'événements avec un ton négatif (inférieur à -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Negatifs' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux (type GOV) les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec d'autres gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.QuadClass = 3 GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le ton moyen d'un événement et le ton moyen de ses mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Proportion d'événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont du même pays.
sql_query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE Actor1CountryCode = Actor2CountryCode AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) AS 'Proportion_Meme_Pays' FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL;

text_query: Sources qui couvrent à la fois des événements de coopération (QuadClass 1 ou 2) et de conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Cooperation', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 0 ORDER BY (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) + COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Top 10 des codes d'événements racines avec l'échelle de Goldstein la plus négative en moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS 'Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events GROUP BY EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY AVG(GoldsteinScale) ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre de mentions anormalement élevé par rapport à leur nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', (NumMentions * 1.0 / NumSources) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Sources' FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0 ORDER BY (NumMentions * 1.0 / NumSources) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements impliquant des acteurs de type 'Rebel' (REB).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Rebelles' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs (nom) les plus fréquemment mentionnés comme Acteur 1 dans des événements de type 'Military Posture' (code 15).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Postures_Militaires' FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '15' AND Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements où la localisation de l'acteur 1 et du lieu d'action diffèrent.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action' FROM events WHERE Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode != ActionGeo_CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources avec la confiance moyenne la plus élevée pour les événements de haute intensité (GoldsteinScale < -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements 'racine' (IsRootEvent = 1) ayant généré le plus de mentions uniques de sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Uniques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pour chaque code d'événement de base (EventBaseCode), calcule le pourcentage d'événements avec un ton négatif (< 0).
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS 'Code_Base', (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE AvgTone < 0) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS 'Pourcentage_Ton_Negatif' FROM events WHERE AvgTone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 30 ORDER BY (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE AvgTone < 0) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où un acteur gouvernemental menace un acteur civil dans un pays différent, avec ton négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Menacant', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Menace', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_Gouvernemental', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_Civil', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('13', '17', '10') AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.AvgTone < 0 ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Moyenne du ton des articles pour chaque type d'événement racine, pour les événements ayant plus de 10 mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 10 GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) DESC;

text_query: Pays où se produisent le plus d'événements de protestation impliquant la police, avec le nombre de sources médiatiques uniques.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Protestations', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources_Uniques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire (QuadClass 2) entre deux pays, où le ton des mentions est supérieur au ton moyen de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING AVG(m.MentionDocTone) > e.AvgTone ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (type 'NGO' ou 'BUS') les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec des gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'BUS') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre moyen d'articles par événement pour les événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles_Par_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear LIMIT 24;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions et la confiance moyenne des extractions, par classe d'événement racine.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Classe_Evenement', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Moyenne_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Extraction' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY AVG(e.NumMentions) DESC;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen des événements de coopération (QuadClass 1 ou 2) et celui des événements de conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4).
sql_query: SELECT MonthYear AS 'Mois', AVG(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Cooperation', AVG(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Conflit', ABS(AVG(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) - AVG(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events GROUP BY MonthYear HAVING 'Ton_Moyen_Cooperation' IS NOT NULL AND 'Ton_Moyen_Conflit' IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 'Ecart_Ton' DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Événements couverts par plus de 5 sources médiatiques différentes, où la géolocalisation de l'action est au niveau ville (Geo_Type >= 3).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville_Action', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Liste_Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumSources > 5 AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.NumSources, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec un très grand nombre de mentions (>50) mais un ton moyen proche de la neutralité (entre -2 et 2).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND e.AvgTone BETWEEN -2 AND 2 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence entre le ton du document de mention et le ton moyen de l'événement, pour les événements de menace (EventRootCode '13'), classés par plus grande divergence.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Divergence_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Groupes connus (KnownGroupCode) les plus actifs dans des événements de violence matérielle (QuadClass 4) en Afrique (pays code commençant par AF).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Violents', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IN ('NG', 'ZA', 'EG', 'KE', 'ET', 'GH', 'CI', 'TN', 'DZ', 'MA', 'SD', 'AO', 'MZ', 'ZM', 'ZW', 'BW', 'NA', 'SN', 'ML', 'BF', 'NE', 'TD', 'MR', 'SO', 'DJ', 'ER', 'LY', 'CM', 'CD', 'CG', 'UG', 'RW', 'BI', 'TZ', 'MW', 'SL', 'LR', 'GN', 'GW', 'GM', 'CV', 'ST', 'GQ', 'GA', 'CF', 'SS', 'KM', 'MU', 'SC', 'RE', 'YT', 'SH', 'IO', 'TF', 'EH') AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) qui ont généré le plus grand nombre de mentions dérivées (mentions pour le même GlobalEventID).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Derivees' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs de type 'MEDIA' intervenant comme acteur 1 dans des événements de désapprobation (EventRootCode '11') envers des gouvernements, avec le ton moyen de ces événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Media', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Gouvernement_Cible', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Desapprobation', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interventions' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' AND e.EventRootCode = '11' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où la localisation de l'acteur 1 et le lieu de l'action sont dans des pays différents, pour les événements de consultation (EventRootCode '04').
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur2' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 50 mentions et ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('03', '04', '05', '06', '07', '08') AND e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) AND e.NumMentions > 10 AND e.AvgTone > 0 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de ton entre les mentions et le ton moyen de l'événement pour les conflits verbaux.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) > 2 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux impliqués dans des événements avec un score Goldstein très négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.GoldsteinScale < -5 GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1CountryCode, e.EventRootCode, e.GoldsteinScale, e.AvgTone ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC, COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 ont des affiliations religieuses différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur1', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur2', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code <> e.Actor2Religion1Code ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand nombre d'événements de conflit matériel par région géographique.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.MonthYear, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements couverts par plus de 10 sources différentes avec un haut niveau de confiance.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumSources > 10 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources, e.NumMentions, e.EventRootCode HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC, AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen pour les événements de diplomatie.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC, e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources médiatiques spécialisées dans la couverture d'événements avec un ton très négatif.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Negatifs', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenements', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements de coopération matérielle impliquant des ONG.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'NGO') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Événements de menace (code racine 13) avec plus de 5 mentions et une confiance moyenne élevée.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Menacant', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Menace', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.NumMentions > 5 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.NumMentions, e.AvgTone HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 70 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs civils impliqués dans des événements de protestation avec localisation précise.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Civil', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Différence entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles pour les événements majeurs.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) AS 'Difference', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 100 AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions provenant de types de sources spécifiques pour les événements de fourniture d'aide.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Ratio entre le ton des mentions et le ton moyen de l'événement pour les conflits matériels.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', CASE WHEN e.AvgTone <> 0 THEN (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) / e.AvgTone) ELSE NULL END AS 'Ratio_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.AvgTone <> 0 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(CASE WHEN e.AvgTone <> 0 THEN (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) / e.AvgTone) ELSE NULL END) > 2 ORDER BY ABS(CASE WHEN e.AvgTone <> 0 THEN (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) / e.AvgTone) ELSE NULL END) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart de ton entre l'événement principal et ses mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) >= 3 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où les événements de coopération matérielle sont les plus couverts
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Total_Mentions DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal avec des civils
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur1', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.QuadClass = 3 GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor1Name ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mois avec le ton moyen le plus négatif pour les événements militaires
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL' GROUP BY e.MonthYear HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant le plus d'événements avec des acteurs religieux
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements de protestation avec une couverture disproportionnée par rapport à leur échelle Goldstein
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / ABS(e.GoldsteinScale)) AS 'Ratio_Couverture' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.GoldsteinScale != 0 ORDER BY Ratio_Couverture DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays hôtes d'événements diplomatiques entre gouvernements étrangers
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Hote', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.Actor2CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation entre la longueur des documents de mention et le ton des événements violents
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Document', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Longueur_Moyenne_Document DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Groupes rebelles les plus actifs par nombre d'événements et de sources médiatiques
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.Actor2KnownGroupCode) AS 'Groupe_Rebelle', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumSources) AS 'Total_Sources' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK', 'REB', 'ISIS') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK', 'REB', 'ISIS')) GROUP BY COALESCE(e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.Actor2KnownGroupCode) ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC, Total_Sources DESC;

text_query: Événements avec localisations différentes pour les acteurs et l'action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode OR e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Tendance annuelle des événements de coopération matérielle impliquant des ONG
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'NGO') GROUP BY e.Year HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY Annee ASC;

text_query: Acteurs les plus fréquemment associés à des événements de menace (code 13)
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Menaces DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Différence de couverture entre événements racines et événements dérivés
sql_query: SELECT e.IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e GROUP BY e.IsRootEvent ORDER BY Est_Racine DESC;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand nombre d'articles mais le moins de sources
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', (e.NumArticles * 1.0 / e.NumSources) AS 'Ratio_Articles_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.NumSources > 0 ORDER BY Ratio_Articles_Sources DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays avec la plus grande diversité de types d'acteurs impliqués dans des conflits
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Type1Code) + COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2Type1Code) AS 'Diversite_Types_Acteurs', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING Nombre_Conflits > 10 ORDER BY Diversite_Types_Acteurs DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements humanitaires (code 071) avec le ton médiatique le plus positif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventCode = '071' ORDER BY m.MentionDocTone DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs apparaissant à la fois comme acteur 1 et acteur 2 dans différents événements
sql_query: SELECT a.ActorCode AS 'Code_Acteur', a.ActorName AS 'Nom_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Apparitions' FROM (SELECT Actor1Code AS ActorCode, Actor1Name AS ActorName FROM events UNION ALL SELECT Actor2Code, Actor2Name FROM events) a WHERE a.ActorCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.ActorCode, a.ActorName HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY Nombre_Apparitions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements géolocalisés au niveau ville avec le plus de mentions par type d'événement
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Localisation', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) GROUP BY e.EventRootCode, e.ActionGeo_Fullname HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY Mentions_Moyennes DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Coopération diplomatique entre pays occidentaux avec plus de 5 sources
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Initiateur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU', 'CAN') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU', 'CAN') AND e.NumSources > 5 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC;

text_query: Événements militaires avec localisation précise et ton très négatif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.AvgTone < -10 AND e.GoldsteinScale < -5 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC;

text_query: Différence entre ton des événements et ton des mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 3 AND COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL')) AND e.NumArticles > 5 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC;

text_query: Mentions longues avec ton extrême (très positif ou très négatif)
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionDocLen > 3000 AND (m.MentionDocTone > 10 OR m.MentionDocTone < -10) ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone) DESC;

text_query: Groupes rebelles mentionnés dans des événements violents
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK', 'REB') AND e.EventRootCode IN ('17', '18', '19', '20') AND e.NumMentions > 5 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC;

text_query: Événements avec décalage temporel important entre événement et mention
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', m.MentionTimeDate AS 'Date_Mention', (julianday(substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Decalage_Jours', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE ABS(julianday(substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) > 30 ORDER BY ABS(Decalage_Jours) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs d'organisations internationales dans des événements de consultation
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'NATO') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'NATO')) ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC;

text_query: Événements avec localisations différentes pour acteurs et action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode OR e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mentions multiples pour mêmes événements avec variations de confiance
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', MIN(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Min', MAX(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Max', (MAX(m.Confidence) - MIN(m.Confidence)) AS 'Ecart_Confiance' FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 AND (MAX(m.Confidence) - MIN(m.Confidence)) > 30 ORDER BY Ecart_Confiance DESC;

text_query: Distribution des types de mentions par catégorie d'événement
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Occurrences' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.EventRootCode, m.MentionType HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY e.EventRootCode, Nombre_Occurrences DESC;

text_query: Corrélation entre nombre d'articles et nombre de mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 AND e.NumMentions > 0 AND (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) > 2.0 ORDER BY Ratio_Mentions_Articles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines avec nombreuses sous-mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Sous_Mentions', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY Nombre_Sous_Mentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 5 mentions et ton positif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '06' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.NumMentions > 5 AND e.AvgTone > 0 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements impliquant des groupes rebelles
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mensuel' FROM events AS e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements diplomatiques bilatéraux et leur ton moyen
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events AS e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode HAVING COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) > 3 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de conflit matériel avec localisation précise (ville)
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Nom_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le ton moyen des événements par type d'acteur gouvernemental
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Moyen', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events AS e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'LEG', 'COP') GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code HAVING COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY Nombre_Sources_Moyen DESC;

text_query: Mentions d'événements avec un très haut niveau de confiance et un ton négatif extrême
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1' FROM mentions AS m JOIN events AS e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence >= 90 AND m.MentionDocTone < -5 ORDER BY m.MentionDocTone ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Différence de ton entre les mentions et la moyenne de l'événement pour les événements de masse
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone AS 'Difference_Ton', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events AS e JOIN mentions AS m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '20' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux les plus souvent cibles de désapprobation
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Nom_Acteur_Cible', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '11' AND e.Actor2Type1Code NOT IN ('GOV', 'MIL') AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Name, e.Actor2Type1Code HAVING COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) > 2 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique mais un ton neutre
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1' FROM events AS e WHERE e.NumMentions > 20 AND e.AvgTone BETWEEN -1 AND 1 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Distribution géographique des événements de fourniture d'aide par type d'acteur
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Donneur', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events AS e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != '' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code != '' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Total_Articles DESC LIMIT 20;
