text_query: Événements avec une forte dissonance entre le ton des articles et le type d'événement
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) AND e.AvgTone < -2 THEN 'Cooperation_Negative' WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) AND e.AvgTone > 2 THEN 'Conflict_Positive' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Type_Dissonance' FROM events AS e WHERE (e.QuadClass IN (1,2) AND e.AvgTone < -2) OR (e.QuadClass IN (3,4) AND e.AvgTone > 2) ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus actifs dans les consultations internationales
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Consultations', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY Nombre_Consultations DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec localisations différentes pour l'acteur et l'action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events AS e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Types d'événements les plus couverts par les médias en ligne
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Web', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens' FROM events AS e JOIN mentions AS m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionType = 1 GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Sources_Web DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements avec une augmentation significative du ton dans les mentions successives
sql_query: SELECT m1.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m1.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Premiere_Mention', m2.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Derniere_Mention', m2.MentionDocTone - m1.MentionDocTone AS 'Evolution_Ton', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM mentions AS m1 JOIN mentions AS m2 ON m1.GlobalEventID = m2.GlobalEventID JOIN events AS e ON m1.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m1.MentionTimeDate < m2.MentionTimeDate AND (m2.MentionDocTone - m1.MentionDocTone) > 3 GROUP BY m1.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m1.MentionTimeDate) > 1 ORDER BY Evolution_Ton DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles AS 'Ecart_Mentions_Articles', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) > 10 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où se produisent le plus d'événements de protestation (code racine 14) avec une tonalité moyenne négative.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Protestations', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.AvgTone < 0 GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Protestations DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources de médias qui mentionnent le plus souvent des événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND m.MentionSourceName IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux (type 1) impliqués dans des événements avec le score Goldstein le plus élevé et le plus bas.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', MAX(GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Max', MIN(GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Min' FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY (MAX(GoldsteinScale) - MIN(GoldsteinScale)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre de mentions anormalement élevé par rapport à leur nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', (NumMentions * 1.0 / NumSources) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Sources', AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0 AND (NumMentions * 1.0 / NumSources) > 10 ORDER BY Ratio_Mentions_Sources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays d'action géographique avec la plus grande variation de tonalité moyenne pour les événements militaires (code racine 19).
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne', (MAX(AvgTone) - MIN(AvgTone)) AS 'Variation_Tonalite' FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '19' AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY Variation_Tonalite DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Mentions d'événements dont le ton du document est très différent de la tonalité moyenne de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Tonalite_Document', ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Difference_Tonalite', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) > 5 ORDER BY Difference_Tonalite DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Groupes d'acteurs (codes connus) les plus souvent en conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) avec d'autres groupes.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Materiels' FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 AND Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1KnownGroupCode != '' GROUP BY Actor1KnownGroupCode ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits_Materiels DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions et le score Goldstein pour les événements de coopération (QuadClass 1 ou 2).
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN NumMentions < 10 THEN 'Faible' WHEN NumMentions BETWEEN 10 AND 50 THEN 'Moyen' ELSE 'Elevé' END AS 'Categorie_Mentions', AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events WHERE QuadClass IN (1, 2) GROUP BY Categorie_Mentions ORDER BY AVG(GoldsteinScale) DESC;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) avec une localisation géographique précise (type 3 ou 4) et un nombre d'articles supérieur à la moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4) AND e.NumArticles > (SELECT AVG(NumArticles) FROM events WHERE IsRootEvent = 1) ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs de type 'Civil' impliqués dans des événements de différentes classes, avec comptage.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code, QuadClass ORDER BY QuadClass, Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand nombre d'événements distincts mentionnés par la BBC.
sql_query: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2)) AS Mois, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements_Distincts FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%bbc%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%bbc.co.uk%' GROUP BY Mois ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Distincts DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Pays où les événements impliquant la police (type COP) ont la tonalité moyenne la plus négative.
sql_query: SELECT Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events WHERE Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor2CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY Tonalite_Moyenne ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements avec un code d'action spécifique de haut niveau (182, 193, 202) et leur couverture médiatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays' FROM events e WHERE e.EventCode IN ('182', '193', '202') ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs dont le code de pays est différent du code de pays de leur géolocalisation.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Acteur', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Geo' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition des événements par code racine pour les acteurs de type 'Media'.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED' GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Confiance moyenne des mentions en fonction de la longueur du document.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN m.MentionDocLen < 1000 THEN 'Court' WHEN m.MentionDocLen BETWEEN 1000 AND 3000 THEN 'Moyen' ELSE 'Long' END AS 'Longueur_Document', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m GROUP BY Longueur_Document ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne DESC;

text_query: Événements ayant généré des mentions dans plus d'un type de source médiatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 1 ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC, e.GlobalEventID LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 10 mentions et ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('05', '06', '07') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.NumMentions > 5 AND e.AvgTone > 0 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où les acteurs gouvernementaux sont le plus souvent ciblés par des menaces.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du ton moyen des événements impliquant des groupes rebelles.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mensuel', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le ton des mentions pour les événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumArticles HAVING e.NumArticles > 5 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs civils les plus fréquemment associés à des événements violents par région.
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode, e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode) AS 'Region', COALESCE(e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name) AS 'Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Conflictuels' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('CVL', 'MED', 'EDU', 'BUS') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('CVL', 'MED', 'EDU', 'BUS')) AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND (e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY COALESCE(e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode, e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode), COALESCE(e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec localisations différentes pour l'acteur et l'action (pays différents).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions dont le ton du document diffère significativement du ton moyen de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs religieux impliqués dans des événements de coopération verbale.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.QuadClass = 1 GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines avec le plus grand écart entre nombre de sources et nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (NumArticles - NumSources) AS 'Ecart_Articles_Sources', AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events WHERE IsRootEvent = 1 AND NumSources > 0 AND NumArticles > NumSources ORDER BY (NumArticles - NumSources) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Confiance moyenne des mentions par type d'événement (racine).
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement_Racine', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements couverts par plusieurs sources médiatiques de différents pays.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR(m.MentionSourceName, -3)) AS 'Nombre_Domaines_Differents', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.%' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR(m.MentionSourceName, -3)) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR(m.MentionSourceName, -3)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Relations entre types d'acteurs pour les événements de classe quad 2 (coopération matérielle).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interactions', AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS 'Impact_Moyen' FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 2 AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code, Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec augmentation du ton entre la première et la dernière mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', MIN(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Premiere_Mention', MAX(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Derniere_Mention', (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Amelioration_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) > 10 ORDER BY (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements internes (même pays pour les deux acteurs) de type conflit.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Internes', AVG(AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode = Actor2CountryCode AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de haut niveau Goldstein (> 5) avec faible couverture médiatique (< 5 mentions).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', GoldsteinScale AS 'Impact_Goldstein', NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal' FROM events WHERE GoldsteinScale > 5 AND NumMentions < 5 ORDER BY GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pour chaque pays impliqué comme acteur principal, calcule le nombre total d'événements et le ton moyen des articles, en excluant les événements avec moins de 5 mentions.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE NumMentions >= 5 GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Trouve les 10 événements les plus conflictuels (QuadClass 3 ou 4) impliquant des acteurs gouvernementaux, avec le nombre de sources distinctes et la date.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.Day AS Date, e.QuadClass AS Type_Conflit, COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS Sources_Distinctes FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.QuadClass ORDER BY Sources_Distinctes DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pour chaque type d'événement racine (EventRootCode), calcule le nombre moyen de mentions par événement et le ton moyen des articles, uniquement pour les événements ayant un ton moyen inférieur à 0.
sql_query: SELECT EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement_Racine, AVG(NumMentions) AS Mentions_Moyennes, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE AvgTone < 0 GROUP BY EventRootCode ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC;

text_query: Pour chaque pays où l'action a eu lieu, calcule le nombre total d'articles (NumArticles) et le ton moyen, en se limitant aux événements avec plus d'une source.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, SUM(NumArticles) AS Total_Articles, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE NumSources > 1 AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Total_Articles DESC;

text_query: Analyse la relation entre le nombre de mentions et le ton moyen des articles pour les événements de protestation (EventRootCode = '14'), groupés par pays de l'acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur, AVG(NumMentions) AS Mentions_Moyennes, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '14' AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen;

text_query: Trouve les 10 événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement (AvgTone) et le ton moyen de leurs mentions (MentionDocTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Mentions_Moyen, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pour chaque année, calcule le nombre d'événements impliquant des acteurs non-gouvernementaux (type différent de 'GOV') et le score Goldstein moyen de ces événements.
sql_query: SELECT Year AS Annee, COUNT(*) AS Evenements_Non_Gouvernementaux, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE (Actor1Type1Code != 'GOV' OR Actor1Type1Code IS NULL) AND (Actor2Type1Code != 'GOV' OR Actor2Type1Code IS NULL) GROUP BY Year ORDER BY Annee;

text_query: Identifie les 15 sources de presse dont les articles ont le ton moyen le plus négatif (MentionDocTone) pour les événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass = 4), avec au moins 3 mentions.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source_Presse, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Articles, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen_Articles ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pour chaque code d'événement de base (EventBaseCode), calcule le nombre d'événements, le nombre moyen de sources et le ton moyen, en excluant les codes avec moins de 20 événements.
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS Code_Evenement_Base, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(NumSources) AS Sources_Moyennes, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events GROUP BY EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 20 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Pour chaque acteur de type 'REB' (rebelle), calcule le nombre total d'événements où il est impliqué et le pourcentage de ces événements qui sont des conflits matériels (QuadClass = 4).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Rebelle, COUNT(*) AS Total_Evenements, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS Pourcentage_Conflit_Materiel FROM events WHERE (Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Conflit_Materiel DESC;

text_query: Calcule, pour chaque pays d'action, la différence entre le ton moyen des événements de coopération (QuadClass 1 ou 2) et le ton moyen des événements de conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4).
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, AVG(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (1, 2) THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) AS Ton_Cooperation, AVG(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (3, 4) THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) AS Ton_Conflit, AVG(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (1, 2) THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) - AVG(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (3, 4) THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) AS Difference_Ton FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING Ton_Cooperation IS NOT NULL AND Ton_Conflit IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC;

text_query: Trouve les 10 événements ayant généré le plus grand volume d'articles (NumArticles) parmi ceux dont le ton est très négatif (AvgTone < -5).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Day AS Date, NumArticles AS Nombre_Articles, AvgTone AS Ton FROM events WHERE AvgTone < -5 ORDER BY NumArticles DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pour chaque source de mention, calcule le délai médian approximatif (en minutes) entre l'heure de l'événement (EventTimeDate) et l'heure de la mention (MentionTimeDate).
sql_query: SELECT MentionSourceName AS Source_Presse, ROUND(AVG((MentionTimeDate - EventTimeDate) / 100), 0) AS Delai_Moyen_Minutes_Approx FROM mentions WHERE EventTimeDate IS NOT NULL AND MentionTimeDate IS NOT NULL AND (MentionTimeDate - EventTimeDate) > 0 GROUP BY MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY Delai_Moyen_Minutes_Approx;

text_query: Analyse la couverture médiatique : pour chaque type d'événement racine, calcule le nombre moyen de mentions par source distincte.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement_Racine, AVG(1.0 * e.NumMentions / NULLIF(e.NumSources, 0)) AS Mentions_Par_Source_Moyennes FROM events e WHERE e.NumSources > 0 GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Mentions_Par_Source_Moyennes DESC;

text_query: Identifie les 20 événements avec la plus grande divergence de ton entre les différentes mentions qui les couvrent (écart-type approximatif du MentionDocTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, COUNT(m.MentionDocTone) AS Nombre_Mentions, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen, (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Etendue_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionDocTone) >= 3 ORDER BY Etendue_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pour chaque combinaison de types d'acteurs (Actor1Type1Code, Actor2Type1Code), calcule le nombre d'événements et le score Goldstein moyen, en excluant les combinaisons avec moins de 10 événements.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, Actor2Type1Code AS Type_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code, Actor2Type1Code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Événements de conflit matériel avec localisation précise (ville) et haute confiance
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3,4,5) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC;

text_query: Différence de ton entre les mentions initiales et finales pour les événements prolongés
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', MIN(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Premiere_Mention', MAX(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Derniere_Mention', (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > 3 ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal avec des groupes civils
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Gouvernement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.QuadClass = 3 GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec divergence géographique entre acteur et lieu d'action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL LIMIT 25;

text_query: Corrélation entre nombre d'articles et score Goldstein pour les événements de menace
sql_query: SELECT e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC, e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Groupes religieux impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.Actor2Religion1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Cooperations DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays avec la plus forte proportion d'événements à ton positif vs négatif
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', SUM(CASE WHEN AvgTone > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Positifs', SUM(CASE WHEN AvgTone < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Negatifs', (SUM(CASE WHEN AvgTone > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS 'Pourcentage_Positifs' FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Positifs DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs militaires intervenant dans des événements de protestation civile
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Intervention', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interventions' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('MIL', 'COP') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor2CountryCode, e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Interventions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec augmentation du ton dans les 24 heures suivant la première mention
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', MIN(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Premiere_Mention', MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Derniere_Mention_24h', (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Evolution_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (m.MentionTimeDate - (SELECT MIN(MentionTimeDate) FROM mentions WHERE GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID)) <= 240000 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND Evolution_Ton > 5 ORDER BY Evolution_Ton DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Organisations internationales les plus actives dans la médiation diplomatique
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisation_Internationale', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mediations', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' AND e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY Nombre_Mediations DESC;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre ton moyen et ton des documents de mention
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 1 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays émergents avec forte activité d'aide humanitaire (code événement 071)
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Donneur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Aides', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Couverture_Totale' FROM events e WHERE e.EventCode = '071' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('BRA', 'IND', 'CHN', 'ZAF', 'TUR', 'MEX', 'IDN', 'NGA', 'RUS') GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Aides DESC;

text_query: Événements de conflit couverts par des sources locales et internationales simultanément
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Conflit', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.' || e.ActionGeo_CountryCode || '%' THEN m.MentionSourceName END) AS 'Sources_Locales', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.MentionSourceName NOT LIKE '%.' || e.ActionGeo_CountryCode || '%' THEN m.MentionSourceName END) AS 'Sources_Internationales' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3,4) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING Sources_Locales > 0 AND Sources_Internationales > 0 ORDER BY (Sources_Locales + Sources_Internationales) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Saisonnalité des événements de coopération économique par région géographique
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX', 'BR', 'AR') THEN 'Amérique' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB', 'IT', 'ES', 'RU') THEN 'Europe' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN', 'JP', 'IN', 'KR', 'AU') THEN 'Asie-Pacifique' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Region', e.Year AS 'Année', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations_Economiques' FROM events e WHERE (e.EventRootCode = '06' OR e.EventRootCode = '07') AND e.Year BETWEEN 2010 AND 2023 GROUP BY Region, Année ORDER BY Region, Année;

text_query: Distribution des types d'événements pour les pays du G7, avec le nombre moyen d'articles par événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU', 'JPN', 'CAN', 'ITA') OR e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU', 'JPN', 'CAN', 'ITA') GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Corrélation entre le score de Goldstein et le ton moyen des articles pour les événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '06') AND e.GoldsteinScale IS NOT NULL AND e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus fréquemment mentionnés dans des événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY SUM(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions associées.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements de conflit verbal dans la région Moyen-Orient.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('IS', 'SY', 'IR', 'IQ', 'SA', 'JO', 'LB', 'EG', 'TR') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent le plus fréquemment les événements impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Evenements_Couverts' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de violence de masse avec localisation précise (ville), classés par nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '20' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs non-étatiques (rebelles, insurgés) impliqués dans des événements avec un score Goldstein très négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Etatique', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('REB', 'INS', 'CRM') AND e.GoldsteinScale < -5 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources à haute confiance pour des événements complexes (plusieurs types d'acteurs).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Mentions_Haute_Confiance', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 80 AND (e.Actor1Type2Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Type2Code IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique mais un faible nombre de sources uniques.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Sources_Uniques', e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumSources AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 20 AND e.NumSources < 10 ORDER BY e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs religieux impliqués dans des événements de dialogue ou de conflit, avec le ton moyen des articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IN ('CHR', 'MOS', 'JEW', 'BUD', 'HIN') AND e.EventRootCode IN ('02', '03', '11', '12', '13') GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements géolocalisés avec des coordonnées précises, ayant un score Goldstein extrême (positif ou négatif).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL AND (e.GoldsteinScale > 7 OR e.GoldsteinScale < -7) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements impliquant des acteurs ethniques spécifiques, avec analyse de la couverture médiatique internationale.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1EthnicCode AS 'Groupe_Ethnique', e.NumSources AS 'Sources_Internationales', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Global' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL AND e.NumSources > 3 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Comparaison des événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) et de leurs dérivés en termes de volume de mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens' FROM events e GROUP BY e.IsRootEvent ORDER BY e.IsRootEvent DESC;

text_query: Trajectoire des événements pour un acteur donné : du premier au dernier événement enregistré, avec évolution du ton.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', MIN(e.Day) AS 'Premier_Evenement', MAX(e.Day) AS 'Dernier_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Global' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode;

text_query: Moyenne du ton des articles par type d'acteur principal (gouvernement, militaire, civil) pour les événements de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'CVL') GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC;

text_query: Sources de médias ayant couvert des événements avec un score Goldstein inférieur à -5, classées par nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY SUM(e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de sources et le nombre d'articles pour les événements de haute intensité (Goldstein > 5 ou < -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE (e.GoldsteinScale > 5 OR e.GoldsteinScale < -5) AND e.NumSources IS NOT NULL AND e.NumArticles IS NOT NULL LIMIT 300;

text_query: Différence de temps moyenne entre la date de l'événement et la date de mention, par type de mention.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', AVG(m.MentionTimeDate - m.EventTimeDate) AS 'Delai_Moyen_Secondes', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m WHERE m.MentionTimeDate IS NOT NULL AND m.EventTimeDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionTimeDate - m.EventTimeDate) DESC;

text_query: Événements de fourniture d'aide (code 07) en Afrique, avec le nombre de sources et le ton moyen.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Donateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Beneficiaire', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NI', 'EG', 'ZA', 'ET', 'DZ') ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Répartition des codes d'événements racines (EventRootCode) pour les interactions entre la Chine et les États-Unis.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE ((e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN')) GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources médiatiques spécifiques ('nytimes.com', 'bbc.co.uk') pour des événements avec un score de confiance élevé.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionSourceName IN ('nytimes.com', 'bbc.co.uk') AND m.Confidence > 80 ORDER BY m.Confidence DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen des événements et le ton moyen des mentions qui les décrivent.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenements', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - AVG(e.AvgTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - AVG(e.AvgTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements impliquant des groupes connus (Al-Qaeda, Taliban) avec localisation géographique précise (niveau ville).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Geographie', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL') AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs de type 'MIL' (militaire) impliqués dans des événements de classe Quad 4 (conflit matériel), avec le nombre moyen d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) ASC;

text_query: Mentions longues (plus de 3000 caractères) pour des événements de coopération diplomatique (code 05), classées par ton.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionIdentifier AS 'Identifiant_Mention', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND m.MentionDocLen > 3000 ORDER BY m.MentionDocTone DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition des types d'acteurs secondaires (Actor2Type1Code) pour les événements initiés par des civils (Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL').
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Secondaire', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Tendances du score Goldstein moyen par trimestre pour les événements liés au Moyen-Orient (pays sélectionnés).
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', ((e.MonthYear % 100 - 1) / 3 + 1) AS 'Trimestre', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Goldstein_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('IR', 'IQ', 'SA', 'SY', 'JO', 'LB', 'IL', 'PS', 'TR', 'EG') AND e.Year BETWEEN 2015 AND 2023 GROUP BY e.Year, ((e.MonthYear % 100 - 1) / 3 + 1) ORDER BY e.Year, Trimestre;

text_query: Événements 'racines' (IsRootEvent = 1) ayant généré le plus grand nombre de mentions distinctes (via la table mentions).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Uniques', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) > 10 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Comparaison du ton des documents de mention entre les événements de coopération verbale (QuadClass 1) et matérielle (QuadClass 2).
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Événements de coopération diplomatique entre pays européens en 2023, avec le ton moyen des articles par pays acteur 1.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.Year = 2023 AND e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('FRA','DEU','GBR','ITA','ESP','POL','NLD','BEL','SWE','CHE','AUT','PRT','IRL','DNK','FIN','NOR','GRC','CZE','HUN','ROU') GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Sources médiatiques ayant couvert le plus d'événements de protestation (code racine 14) impliquant des civils comme acteur 1, avec le nombre total d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source_Media, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements, SUM(e.NumArticles) AS Total_Articles FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements militaires (QuadClass 4) par région géographique (pays de l'action) en 2022.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, e.MonthYear AS Mois, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.Year = 2022 AND e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.MonthYear;

text_query: Top 15 des lieux d'action (pays) où les événements ont le ton moyen le plus négatif pour les conflits matériels.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Répartition des types d'acteurs 2 dans les événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) avec les États-Unis comme acteur 1.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Type1Code AS Type_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des documents de mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Documents, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) >= 3 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources d'information qui couvrent à la fois des événements de coopération et de conflit impliquant la Chine, avec le pourcentage de chaque type.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS Evenements_Cooperation, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS Evenements_Conflit, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) / COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID), 1) AS Pourcentage_Cooperation FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) >= 15 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) ayant généré le plus de mentions dans les 24 heures suivant leur occurrence.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Day AS Date_Evenement, e.NumMentions AS Mentions_Initiales, COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) AS Mentions_24h FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND m.MentionTimeDate BETWEEN e.Day * 1000000 AND (e.Day * 1000000 + 235959) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.NumMentions HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > e.NumMentions ORDER BY Mentions_24h DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pays où les événements avec la police (type COP) comme acteur 2 ont le ton moyen le plus positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Ton_Moyen DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs 1 uniques par type et par année pour les événements de niveau international (pays acteur 1 différent du pays action).
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS Annee, e.Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Name) AS Acteurs_Uniques FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Year, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY e.Year DESC, Acteurs_Uniques DESC;

text_query: Événements d'aide humanitaire (code 071) avec le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques différentes par région bénéficiaire.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Beneficiaire, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.NumSources) AS Sources_Moyennes FROM events e WHERE e.EventCode = '071' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) >= 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.NumSources) DESC;

text_query: Événements de conflit impliquant des groupes désignés comme terroristes (connus) avec le niveau de confiance moyen des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2KnownGroupCode AS Groupe_Designé, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3,4) AND e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ','TAL','BOK','ISI','HTS') GROUP BY e.Actor2KnownGroupCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Pays avec la plus forte proportion d'événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) par rapport au total des événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(*) AS Total_Evenements, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass = 2 THEN 1 END) AS Evenements_Cooperation_Materielle, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass = 2 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS Pourcentage_Cooperation FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Cooperation DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte dissonance entre le score Goldstein (positif) et le ton moyen des articles (négatif).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.GoldsteinScale AS Score_Goldstein, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, e.EventRootCode AS Code_Racine, e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2 FROM events e WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 2.0 AND e.AvgTone < -5.0 ORDER BY (e.GoldsteinScale - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements de conflit militaire impliquant des groupes rebelles, classés par intensité.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC, e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements diplomatiques impliquant la Chine.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du ton moyen des événements de protestation dans un pays donné.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'US' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear ASC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique mais un ton moyen négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > (SELECT AVG(NumArticles) FROM events) AND e.AvgTone < -5 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC, e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Répartition géographique des actions de coopération matérielle par type d'acteur.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Actions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code != '' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le ton des mentions pour les événements violents.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources de confiance élevée sur des sujets diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.MentionIdentifier AS 'Identifiant_Article', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance_Extraction' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND m.Confidence > 90 ORDER BY m.Confidence DESC, e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Acteurs ayant changé de rôle (de principal à secondaire) dans des événements similaires.
sql_query: SELECT a.ActorName, SUM(a.Role_Principal) AS Role_Principal, SUM(a.Role_Secondaire) AS Role_Secondaire, (SUM(a.Role_Principal) + SUM(a.Role_Secondaire)) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM (SELECT e.Actor1Name AS ActorName, COUNT(*) AS Role_Principal, 0 AS Role_Secondaire FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name UNION ALL SELECT e.Actor2Name AS ActorName, 0 AS Role_Principal, COUNT(*) AS Role_Secondaire FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Name) AS a WHERE a.ActorName IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.ActorName HAVING SUM(a.Role_Principal) > 0 AND SUM(a.Role_Secondaire) > 0 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec localisations différentes pour l'acteur et l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Impact de la longueur des documents sur le ton des mentions pour les conflits.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN m.MentionDocLen < 1000 THEN 'Court' WHEN m.MentionDocLen BETWEEN 1000 AND 3000 THEN 'Moyen' ELSE 'Long' END AS 'Longueur_Document', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY CASE WHEN m.MentionDocLen < 1000 THEN 'Court' WHEN m.MentionDocLen BETWEEN 1000 AND 3000 THEN 'Moyen' ELSE 'Long' END ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) ASC;

text_query: Organisations internationales les plus actives dans la médiation de conflits.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisation_Internationale', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interventions', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' AND e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '08') AND e.QuadClass = 1 GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le ton de l'événement et celui des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone, e.NumMentions HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pays où les événements religieux ont le ton moyen le plus négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions répétées du même événement par différentes sources au fil du temps.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Uniques', MIN(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Premiere_Mention', MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Derniere_Mention', (MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) - MIN(m.MentionTimeDate)) AS 'Duree_Couverture' FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 3 ORDER BY (MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) - MIN(m.MentionTimeDate)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements de coopération économique avec un impact médiatique régional.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Donateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Beneficiaire', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Region' FROM events e WHERE e.EventCode LIKE '07%' AND e.NumArticles > (SELECT AVG(NumArticles) FROM events WHERE EventCode LIKE '07%') ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui ont mentionné le plus d'événements diplomatiques (code racine 04) impliquant la France.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'FRA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'FRA') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) ayant un score Goldstein élevé (> 5).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Cooperation_Materielle' FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 2 AND GoldsteinScale > 5 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements impliquant des organisations internationales (type IGO) comme acteur principal, avec le volume de couverture par type de mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur_Principal', m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Volume_Couverture' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' OR e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'NATO') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, m.MentionType ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des documents de mention pour les événements violents (GoldsteinScale < -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -5 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone, e.NumSources HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 3 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements ayant lieu dans des villes (Geo_Type >= 3) avec une forte confiance d'extraction (> 80) et un ton documentaire extrême (< -10 ou > 10).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', m.Confidence AS 'Confidence_Extraction', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND m.Confidence > 80 AND (m.MentionDocTone < -10 OR m.MentionDocTone > 10) ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays avec la plus grande variation de ton moyen pour les événements de coopération verbale (QuadClass 1).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone) AS 'Variation_Ton', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 1 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements impliquant des groupes ethniques (codes ethniques) comme acteur secondaire, avec le code d'événement racine et le score Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor2EthnicCode AS 'Groupe_Ethnique_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2EthnicCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mois avec le plus d'événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) impliquant des acteurs militaires (type MIL).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Conflit_Materiel' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Sources qui couvrent à la fois des événements de coopération (GoldsteinScale > 0) et de conflit (GoldsteinScale < 0) avec une haute confiance.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale > 0 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Cooperation', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale < 0 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 70 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale > 0 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 10 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale < 0 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 10 ORDER BY (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale > 0 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) + COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale < 0 THEN e.GlobalEventID END)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements d'aide humanitaire (code 071) avec une localisation précise (ville) et un ton documentaire positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action_Precise', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Donneur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Beneficiaire', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventCode = '071' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != '' AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode HAVING AVG(m.MentionDocTone) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec d'autres gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec des codes religieux pour les deux acteurs, et le ton moyen associé.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IN ('CHR', 'MOS', 'JEW', 'BUD', 'HIN') AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IN ('CHR', 'MOS', 'JEW', 'BUD', 'HIN') ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où les événements ont le plus grand écart entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', AVG(NumMentions) AS 'Moyenne_Mentions', AVG(NumSources) AS 'Moyenne_Sources', (AVG(NumMentions) - AVG(NumSources)) AS 'Ecart_Mentions_Sources' FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING AVG(NumMentions) > 0 ORDER BY (AVG(NumMentions) - AVG(NumSources)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements impliquant des acteurs criminels (type CRM) avec une localisation au niveau pays et un score Goldstein très négatif (< -7).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur_Criminel', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CRM' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CRM') AND e.ActionGeo_Type = 1 AND e.GoldsteinScale < -7 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements de conflit militaire (QuadClass 4) impliquant la Russie ou l'Ukraine.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND (e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('RUS', 'UKR') OR e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('RUS', 'UKR')) GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements de protestation (EventRootCode 14) en France, avec ton moyen.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Protestations', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'FRA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'FRA' OR e.ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'FR') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Événements d'aide humanitaire (EventBaseCode '071' ou '072') avec incohérence géographique entre l'acteur et le lieu d'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Donneur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Receveur', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventBaseCode IN ('071', '072') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND NOT ((e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('US', 'USA') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'USA')) OR (e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('UK', 'GBR') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('UK', 'GBR'))) AND e.Actor1CountryCode NOT IN ('UP', 'AS') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode NOT IN ('UP', 'AS') ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le ton des mentions (MentionDocTone) et le ton moyen de l'événement (AvgTone) pour les événements très médiatisés.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 10 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 2 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques spécialisées dans les événements avec un ton très négatif (AvgTone < -10) et haute confiance (Confidence > 90).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -10 AND m.Confidence > 90 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC;

text_query: Différence de couverture médiatique (NumMentions) entre les événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) et leurs dérivés.
sql_query: SELECT IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', AVG(NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes' FROM events GROUP BY IsRootEvent;

text_query: Événements avec localisation précise (Geo_Type >= 3) et forte divergence entre le ton de l'article et le ton moyen de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precis', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Article', ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Groupes médiatiques (MED) les plus souvent mentionnés comme acteurs dans des événements de déclaration publique (EventRootCode 01).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Groupe_Médiatique', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Événements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '01' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Variation du ton moyen (AvgTone) des événements impliquant l'ONU (UNO) par type d'action (QuadClass).
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Action', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode = 'UNO' OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode = 'UNO' GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Événements avec participation de multiples types d'acteurs (Actor1Type1Code différent de Actor2Type1Code) et forte couverture (NumArticles > 50).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code != e.Actor2Type1Code AND e.NumArticles > 50 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du ton moyen des événements pour un pays donné (ex: USA).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements avec un ton très négatif.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Negatifs', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 OR m.MentionDocTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Negatifs DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le score Goldstein pour les événements militaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19', '20') AND e.NumSources > 1 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC, e.GoldsteinScale LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pays où se produisent le plus d'événements avec des acteurs de type 'REB' (rebelles).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Evenement', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Rebelles', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Rebelles DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Groupes connus (ex: ONU, Al-Qaeda) les plus souvent impliqués dans des événements, avec leur type d'action principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Principal', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de ton entre le document de mention et le ton moyen de l'événement pour les événements très médiatisés.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document_Mention', (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Total' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs civils (CVL) les plus ciblés dans des événements de type 'Assault' (code racine 18).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Cible_Civile', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Assauts', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '18' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Name, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Assauts DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition des types d'événements (QuadClass) par région géographique (via ActionGeo_CountryCode).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.QuadClass ORDER BY Pays, Classe_Quad;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) AS 'Ecart', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 20 OR e.NumArticles > 20 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources de type 'WEB' pour des événements survenus dans un délai spécifique après l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Web', (m.MentionTimeDate - e.DATEADDED) AS 'Delai_Secondes', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionType = 1 AND (m.MentionTimeDate - e.DATEADDED) BETWEEN 0 AND 3600 ORDER BY Delai_Secondes ASC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements de 'Mass Violence' (code racine 20) avec localisation précise (ville) et acteurs identifiés.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precis', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '20' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs de type 'MED' (Médias) impliqués dans des événements, et le ton de ces événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Media', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenements', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une confiance de mention élevée mais un ton de document très bas.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance_Mention', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 80 AND m.MentionDocTone < -10 ORDER BY m.Confidence DESC, m.MentionDocTone ASC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Combinaisons d'acteurs (pays et type) les plus fréquentes dans les événements de conflit verbal (QuadClass 3).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_1', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_2', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_2', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor1Type1Code, e.Actor2CountryCode, e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) ayant généré le plus de mentions distinctes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Distinctes', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) > 5 ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions_Distinctes DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Répartition des codes d'événement de base (EventBaseCode) pour les acteurs gouvernementaux d'un continent (ex: Europe).
