sql_query: SELECT e.EventBaseCode AS 'Code_Evenement_Base', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP') GROUP BY e.EventBaseCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent ciblés par des menaces verbales.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Name NOT IN ('GOVERNMENT', 'CABINET', 'AUTHORITIES') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Name, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Menaces DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le ton moyen des événements et le nombre de sources uniques par pays d'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Uniques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 50 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen_Evenement DESC;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle avec aide humanitaire, par organisation internationale.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS Organisation_Aidante, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Beneficiaire, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Aides, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Cooperation_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.EventBaseCode IN ('071', '072', '073') AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('IGO', 'NGO') AND e.Year >= 2020 AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Aides DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mentions d'événements violents avec faible confiance d'extraction, par région géographique.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX') THEN 'Amérique du Nord' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('BR', 'AR', 'CL') THEN 'Amérique du Sud' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB', 'RU') THEN 'Europe' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN', 'JP', 'IN') THEN 'Asie' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG', 'ZA', 'EG') THEN 'Afrique' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Region', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Faible_Confiance' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND m.Confidence < 50 GROUP BY Region ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions_Faible_Confiance DESC;

text_query: Différence de ton entre articles sur des événements impliquant la police et événements civils.
sql_query: SELECT 'Evenements_Police' AS 'Categorie', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'COP' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' UNION ALL SELECT 'Evenements_Civils' AS 'Categorie', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL';

text_query: Événements racines avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement et le ton des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 3 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Distribution des types d'événements pour les interactions entre gouvernements et médias.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interactions' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Interactions DESC;

text_query: Événements de protestation avec localisation précise (ville), par intensité médiatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precis', e.Year AS 'Annee', e.NumMentions AS 'Intensite_Mediatique', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Sources qui couvrent à la fois des événements positifs (Goldstein > 5) et négatifs (Goldstein < -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale > 5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Positifs', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale < -5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Negatifs' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING Evenements_Positifs > 10 AND Evenements_Negatifs > 10 ORDER BY (Evenements_Positifs + Evenements_Negatifs) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec décalage temporel important entre la date de l'événement et la date de mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', m.MentionTimeDate AS 'Date_Mention', (CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 8) AS INTEGER) - e.Day) AS 'Decalage_Jours', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 8) AS INTEGER) - e.Day) > 30 ORDER BY Decalage_Jours DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays avec la plus forte proportion d'événements de conflit par rapport au total des événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) THEN 1 END) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', (COUNT(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS 'Pourcentage_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING Total_Evenements > 100 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Conflits DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements impliquant des acteurs religieux, par affiliation et type d'interaction.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Interaction', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.Actor2Religion1Code, e.QuadClass ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Mentions longues (plus de 3000 caractères) sur des événements de haute intensité (Goldstein extrême).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Article', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionDocLen > 3000 AND (e.GoldsteinScale > 8 OR e.GoldsteinScale < -8) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec localisations différentes pour l'acteur et l'action, par distance géographique approximative.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', CASE WHEN e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode THEN 'International' ELSE 'National' END AS 'Portee' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Différence entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions pour les conflits matériels.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) >= 3 ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux impliqués dans des événements avec localisation géographique différente de leur pays.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements de menace (code racine 13) par pays acteur 1.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'FRA', 'GBR') GROUP BY e.MonthYear, e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY e.MonthYear, Nombre_Menaces DESC;

text_query: Sources de mentions les plus fréquentes pour les événements avec échelle Goldstein très négative (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Echelle_Goldstein_Moyenne' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Couverts DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements avec acteurs non-gouvernementaux (type NGO, MED, EDU) ciblant des acteurs gouvernementaux.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'MED', 'EDU') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.IsRootEvent = 1 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale LIMIT 30;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre d'articles et le nombre de mentions pour chaque classe d'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Moyenne_Mentions', (AVG(e.NumArticles) * 1.0 / AVG(e.NumMentions)) AS 'Ratio_Articles_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 0 GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY Classe_Quad;

text_query: Mentions avec un ton extrêmement négatif (< -10) et leur confiance d'extraction, groupées par type de mention.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', MIN(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Minimum' FROM mentions m WHERE m.MentionDocTone < -10 GROUP BY m.MentionType HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC;

text_query: Acteurs 2 les plus fréquents dans les événements de conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec un acteur 1 spécifique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Nom_Acteur2', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Name, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements ayant lieu dans un pays différent des deux acteurs (pays tiers).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != e.Actor1CountryCode AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode LIMIT 25;

text_query: Top 5 des mois avec le plus d'événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) par région géographique (code pays lieu).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CH', 'RS', 'FR', 'IN') GROUP BY e.MonthYear, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Cooperations DESC LIMIT 5;

text_query: Différence de temps moyenne entre la date de l'événement et la date de mention, par code racine d'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', AVG(m.MentionTimeDate - e.DATEADDED) AS 'Delai_Moyen_Mention' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.DATEADDED > 0 AND m.MentionTimeDate > e.DATEADDED GROUP BY e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Delai_Moyen_Mention DESC;

text_query: Événements avec acteurs de groupes connus (Al-Qaeda, Taliban, Boko Haram) et leur échelle Goldstein moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') GROUP BY e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Mentions dont la longueur du document est supérieure à la moyenne, pour des événements avec ton moyen positif.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionDocLen > (SELECT AVG(MentionDocLen) FROM mentions) AND e.AvgTone > 2 ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une incohérence majeure entre le type géographique de l'acteur 1 et le type géographique de l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_Type AS 'Type_Geo_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Geo_Action', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Geo_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Geo_Action' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_Type IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Type IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_Type != e.ActionGeo_Type AND e.Actor1Geo_Type IN (1,2,3,4) LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs les plus mentionnés (via table mentions) dans des événements de classe quad 1 (coopération verbale).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur', COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 1 AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) avec un nombre de sources anormalement bas par rapport à leur nombre de mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumSources) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.NumSources > 0 AND e.NumMentions > (e.NumSources * 10) ORDER BY Ratio_Mentions_Sources DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec le ton moyen le plus négatif impliquant des groupes rebelles comme acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où se produisent le plus d'événements de type 'Protestation' (EventRootCode = 14) avec un ton négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Protestations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.AvgTone < 0 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand nombre total de mentions pour les événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass = 4).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY SUM(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Sources de médias ayant couvert le plus d'événements diplomatiques (EventRootCode = 05) entre gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass = 3) avec des acteurs civils.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen des documents de mention pour les événements de coopération.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumArticles, e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Groupes ethniques ou religieux (Actor1) les plus fréquemment impliqués dans des événements de type 'Menace' (EventRootCode = 13).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Code_Religion_1', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du ton moyen des événements liés à l'armée (Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL') dans un pays donné (ex: USA).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mensuel', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Événements avec la plus grande différence de temps entre la date de l'événement et la date d'ajout dans la base.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Jour_Evenement', e.DATEADDED AS 'Date_Ajout', (julianday(substr(e.DATEADDED, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.DATEADDED, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.DATEADDED, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Difference_Jours', e.SOURCEURL AS 'URL_Source' FROM events e WHERE e.DATEADDED IS NOT NULL AND e.Day IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Difference_Jours DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources de mentions dont le ton de document est systématiquement plus négatif que le ton moyen de l'événement associé.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionDocTone < e.AvgTone GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays hôtes (ActionGeo) avec la plus grande variété de types d'acteurs principaux (Actor1Type1Code) pour les événements de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Type1Code) AS 'Nombre_Types_Acteurs_Distincts' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Type1Code) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs principaux (Actor1) dont les événements ont en moyenne le score Goldstein le plus bas (plus conflictuels).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Name != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition des événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass = 2) par région géographique approximative (basée sur le code pays).
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX') THEN 'Amérique du Nord' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('BR', 'AR', 'CL') THEN 'Amérique du Sud' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB', 'RU') THEN 'Europe' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN', 'JP', 'IN') THEN 'Asie' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG', 'ZA', 'EG') THEN 'Afrique' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Region', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Region ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec localisation géographique précise (Geo_Type >= 3) et un nombre d'articles supérieur à la moyenne des événements du même mois.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.NumArticles > (SELECT AVG(NumArticles) FROM events sub WHERE sub.MonthYear = e.MonthYear) ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mentions provenant de types de sources spécifiques (ex: web) dont la confiance est élevée (> 80) pour des événements complexes (plusieurs types d'acteurs).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance', e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.Actor1Type2Code AS 'Type_Acteur1_Secondaire' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionType = 1 AND m.Confidence > 80 AND (e.Actor1Type2Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Type2Code IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY m.Confidence DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Années avec la plus forte proportion d'événements de conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4) par rapport au total des événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', SUM(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', (SUM(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS 'Pourcentage_Conflits' FROM events e GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY Pourcentage_Conflits DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Distribution des types d'événements (QuadClass) pour les conflits impliquant des groupes rebelles.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB' GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre la tonalité de l'événement et la tonalité moyenne des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Tonalite' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements où l'acteur principal est un gouvernement et l'acteur secondaire est un groupe civil.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Sources de mentions qui ont couvert des événements avec une tonalité très négative (inférieure à -10).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -10 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) DESC;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) entre pays spécifiques, avec leur score Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'FRA', 'GBR') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'FRA', 'GBR') AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre d'articles et le nombre de sources pour les événements militaires.
sql_query: SELECT (SUM(e.NumArticles * e.NumSources) - SUM(e.NumArticles) * SUM(e.NumSources) / COUNT(*)) / (COUNT(*) * 1.0) AS 'Correlation_Approx' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL';

text_query: Événements où la localisation de l'action est différente du pays du premier acteur.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode LIMIT 25;

text_query: Types de mentions les plus fréquents pour les événements impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Évolution du nombre moyen de mentions par événement pour chaque classe de conflit (QuadClass 3 et 4) par année.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Conflit', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.Year, e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.Year, e.QuadClass;

text_query: Événements avec une confiance moyenne des mentions supérieure à 80 et une tonalité positive.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Evenement', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 AND e.AvgTone > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Répartition des événements de menace (EventRootCode 13) par région géographique (code pays de l'action).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Différence de tonalité entre les événements impliquant des acteurs religieux et ceux n'en impliquant pas.
sql_query: SELECT 'Avec_Acteur_Religieux' AS 'Categorie', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'Sans_Acteur_Religieux' AS 'Categorie', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NULL;

text_query: Top 10 des combinaisons d'acteurs (pays) les plus conflictuelles (moyenne Goldstein la plus basse).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements où le nombre de mentions dépasse significativement la moyenne des événements de la même classe.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', avg_class.avg_mentions AS 'Moyenne_Classe' FROM events e JOIN (SELECT QuadClass, AVG(NumMentions) AS avg_mentions FROM events GROUP BY QuadClass) avg_class ON e.QuadClass = avg_class.QuadClass WHERE e.NumMentions > avg_class.avg_mentions * 2 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources qui ont mentionné des événements à la fois positifs et négatifs (large gamme de tonalité).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', MIN(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Min', MAX(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Max', MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone) AS 'Etendue_Tonalite', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 AND (MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone)) > 20 ORDER BY MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec une localisation précise (type 3 ou 4) et un nombre élevé d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4) AND e.NumArticles > 50 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition des événements par code racine pour les acteurs de type 'média'.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED' GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 20 mentions et ton négatif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('05', '06') AND e.NumMentions > 20 AND e.AvgTone < 0 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Protestations civiles avec ton très négatif et couverture médiatique importante
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Total_Mentions_Table' FROM events e LEFT JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.AvgTone < 0 AND e.NumArticles > 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC, e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de ton entre mentions et événements pour les conflits armés
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND m.MentionDocTone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 2 ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Coopération matérielle entre pays avec localisation précise (ville)
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode <> e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements racines avec forte couverture mais peu de sources
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumSources) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.NumMentions > 50 AND e.NumSources < 5 ORDER BY Ratio_Mentions_Sources DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements humanitaires avec ton positif et plusieurs types d'acteurs
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.AvgTone > 2 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'IGO', 'GOV') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'IGO', 'GOV')) ORDER BY e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec décalage géographique entre acteurs et lieu d'action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode <> e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.QuadClass = 4 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Coopération verbale entre médias et gouvernements avec confiance élevée
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Nom_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 1 AND ((e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'BUS' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'BUS') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'NGO')) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING Confiance_Moyenne > 50 ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Différence de traitement médiatique entre conflits et coopérations
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens', AVG(ABS(e.AvgTone)) AS 'Ton_Absolu_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IS NOT NULL AND e.NumMentions > 0 GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass ASC;

text_query: Événements avec acteurs militaires et localisation précise en temps de crise
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.GoldsteinScale < -2 AND e.Year >= 2014 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Relations diplomatiques complexes avec plusieurs types d'interactions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.EventRootCode) AS 'Codes_Racines_Multiples', COUNT(DISTINCT e.EventRootCode) AS 'Nombre_Types_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN' AND e.Day BETWEEN 20000101 AND 20241231 GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode, e.Day HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.EventRootCode) > 1 ORDER BY e.Day ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements économiques avec participation d'entreprises et ton mesuré
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Nom_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'BUS' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'BUS') AND e.EventRootCode IN ('06', '07') AND ABS(e.AvgTone) < 5 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où le ton moyen des articles est plus négatif que le ton moyen des mentions, pour chaque acteur gouvernemental.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING e.AvgTone < AVG(m.MentionDocTone) ORDER BY (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays avec le plus grand écart entre le nombre d'événements où ils sont acteur 1 et acteur 2, pour les événements de conflit matériel.
sql_query: WITH actor1_counts AS (SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(*) AS Evenements_Acteur1 FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode), actor2_counts AS (SELECT Actor2CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(*) AS Evenements_Acteur2 FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode != '' GROUP BY Actor2CountryCode) SELECT COALESCE(a1.Pays, a2.Pays) AS Pays, COALESCE(Evenements_Acteur1, 0) AS Evenements_Acteur1, COALESCE(Evenements_Acteur2, 0) AS Evenements_Acteur2, ABS(COALESCE(Evenements_Acteur1, 0) - COALESCE(Evenements_Acteur2, 0)) AS Ecart FROM actor1_counts a1 FULL OUTER JOIN actor2_counts a2 ON a1.Pays = a2.Pays WHERE COALESCE(Evenements_Acteur1, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(Evenements_Acteur2, 0) > 0 ORDER BY Ecart DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources de médias qui couvrent à la fois des événements avec des acteurs gouvernementaux et des acteurs rebelles, avec le ton moyen de leurs articles.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY 'Nombre_Evenements' DESC;

text_query: Événements de protestation où la localisation de l'action diffère du pays de l'acteur 1, avec les coordonnées géographiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude_Action', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude_Action' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mois avec la plus forte augmentation du nombre d'événements par rapport au mois précédent, pour les événements de coopération verbale.
sql_query: SELECT current.MonthYear AS 'Mois', current.nb_evenements AS 'Evenements_Courants', previous.nb_evenements AS 'Evenements_Precedents', (current.nb_evenements - previous.nb_evenements) AS 'Augmentation' FROM (SELECT MonthYear, COUNT(*) AS nb_evenements FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 1 GROUP BY MonthYear) current LEFT JOIN (SELECT MonthYear, COUNT(*) AS nb_evenements FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 1 GROUP BY MonthYear) previous ON current.MonthYear = previous.MonthYear + 1 WHERE previous.nb_evenements IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 'Augmentation' DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs civils impliqués dans des événements où le ton moyen est positif mais le score Goldstein est négatif, avec le nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.AvgTone > 0 AND e.GoldsteinScale < 0 UNION SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.AvgTone > 0 AND e.GoldsteinScale < 0 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec au moins 5 mentions, où la confiance moyenne des mentions est inférieure à 50, classés par nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) >= 5 AND AVG(m.Confidence) < 50 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Ratio entre le nombre de mentions provenant de sources web et le nombre total de mentions, pour les événements de menace.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', SUM(CASE WHEN m.MentionType = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Mentions_Web', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Total_Mentions', CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.MentionType = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Ratio_Web' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 0 ORDER BY 'Ratio_Web' DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où la localisation géographique de l'acteur 1 est de type 'ville' mais le pays de l'acteur 1 ne correspond pas au pays de la localisation.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Geoloc', e.Actor1Geo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Geoloc' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_Type IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs (nom) apparaissant à la fois comme acteur 1 et acteur 2 dans des événements de classes de Quad différentes, avec le compte.
sql_query: SELECT ActorName, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Role = 'Actor1' THEN QuadClass END) AS QuadClasses_as_Actor1, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Role = 'Actor2' THEN QuadClass END) AS QuadClasses_as_Actor2, SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Cooperation_Verbale, SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Conflit_Materiel FROM (SELECT Actor1Name AS ActorName, QuadClass, 'Actor1' AS Role FROM events WHERE Actor1Name IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT Actor2Name AS ActorName, QuadClass, 'Actor2' AS Role FROM events WHERE Actor2Name IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY ActorName HAVING QuadClasses_as_Actor1 >= 1 AND QuadClasses_as_Actor2 >= 1 AND Cooperation_Verbale > 0 AND Conflit_Materiel > 0 ORDER BY (Cooperation_Verbale + Conflit_Materiel) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec un délai anormalement long entre la date de l'événement et la date d'ajout dans la base, pour les événements racines.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.DATEADDED AS 'Date_Ajout', (julianday(substr(e.DATEADDED, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.DATEADDED, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.DATEADDED, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Delai_Jours' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND Delai_Jours > 30 ORDER BY Delai_Jours DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions dont le ton du document est à l'opposé du ton moyen de l'événement (signes différents), avec l'identifiant de la source.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', m.MentionIdentifier AS 'Identifiant_Mention', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE (m.MentionDocTone < 0 AND e.AvgTone > 0) OR (m.MentionDocTone > 0 AND e.AvgTone < 0) ORDER BY ABS('Difference_Ton') DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays avec le plus haut ratio d'événements de conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) par rapport au total des événements, pour les pays ayant plus de 100 événements.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 3 THEN 1 END) AS 'Conflits_Verbaux', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 3 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS 'Ratio_Conflit_Verbal' FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 100 ORDER BY 'Ratio_Conflit_Verbal' DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 est un groupe connu (ex: Al-Qaeda) et l'acteur 2 est un gouvernement, avec le type de mention le plus fréquent.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Gouvernement', m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention_Predominant', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Type' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode != '' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.Actor2CountryCode, m.MentionType ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID, COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 est un groupe rebelle connu et l'acteur 2 est une force militaire, avec une échelle Goldstein très négative.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Rebelle', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.GoldsteinScale < -5 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des documents le mentionnant.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération diplomatique entre pays occidentaux et pays du Moyen-Orient, avec un ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Occidental', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Moyen_Orient', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.AvgTone > 2 AND ((e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU', 'CAN', 'AUS', 'ITA', 'ESP') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('SAU', 'IRQ', 'IRN', 'SYR', 'ISR', 'TUR', 'EGY', 'JOR', 'ARE')) OR (e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU', 'CAN', 'AUS', 'ITA', 'ESP') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('SAU', 'IRQ', 'IRN', 'SYR', 'ISR', 'TUR', 'EGY', 'JOR', 'ARE'))) LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où le lieu géographique de l'action est un pays différent des deux acteurs impliqués.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode <> e.Actor1CountryCode AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode <> e.Actor2CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre de mentions très élevé mais provenant d'une seule source.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND e.NumSources = 1 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements impliquant des acteurs de religions différentes dans un contexte de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code <> e.Actor2Religion1Code LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où la date de l'événement et la date de la première mention diffèrent de plus d'un jour.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Jour_Evenement', MIN(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Premiere_Mention', ABS(julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 1, 4) || '-' || substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 5, 2) || '-' || substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 7, 2))) AS 'Difference_Jours' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 1, 4) || '-' || substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 5, 2) || '-' || substr(MIN(m.MentionTimeDate), 7, 2))) > 1 LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une faible confiance moyenne des mentions (< 50) mais un nombre d'articles élevé (> 20).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) < 50 AND e.NumArticles > 20 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 est un média et l'acteur 2 est un gouvernement, avec un ton négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Media', e.Actor2Name AS 'Gouvernement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.AvgTone < 0 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec des coordonnées géographiques manquantes pour l'acteur 1 mais présentes pour le lieu de l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_Lat AS 'Latitude_Acteur1', e.Actor1Geo_Long AS 'Longitude_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude_Action', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude_Action' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Geo_Lat IS NULL OR e.Actor1Geo_Long IS NULL) AND (e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de menace (code 13) provenant d'un acteur non étatique envers un État.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('REB', 'INS', 'CRM', 'NGO', 'BUS', 'EDU', 'MED') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où le nombre de mentions est significativement plus élevé que le nombre d'articles (ratio > 3).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 AND (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) > 3 ORDER BY (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de la classe Quad 1 (coopération verbale) avec un ton moyen supérieur à 5, impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_International', e.Actor2KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_International2', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 1 AND e.AvgTone > 5 AND (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'NATO') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'NATO')) LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où la source de la mention principale est un site web d'actualité (.com) et la confiance est maximale.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mention', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.com' AND m.Confidence = 100 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements ajoutés à la base de données bien après la date de l'événement (différence > 30 jours).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Jour_Evenement', e.DATEADDED AS 'Date_Ajout', (CAST(e.DATEADDED/1000000 AS INTEGER) - e.Day) AS 'Difference_Jours' FROM events e WHERE (CAST(e.DATEADDED/1000000 AS INTEGER) - e.Day) > 30 ORDER BY (CAST(e.DATEADDED/1000000 AS INTEGER) - e.Day) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire (QuadClass=2) avec plus de 5 sources, impliquant des acteurs gouvernementaux et militaires, triés par ton moyen.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.NumSources > 5 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL')) ORDER BY e.AvgTone DESC;

text_query: Top 15 des combinaisons d'acteurs (pays acteur 1 et acteur 2) les plus conflictuelles (QuadClass=4) en termes de nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY SUM(e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 est un groupe rebelle (REB) et l'acteur 2 est un gouvernement (GOV), avec la localisation géographique de l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Groupe_Rebelle', e.Actor2Name AS 'Gouvernement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL;

text_query: Sources de médias (MentionSourceName) qui ont couvert le plus d'événements impliquant des acteurs criminels (CRM).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CRM' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CRM' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements avec un ton moyen très négatif (< -5) et une échelle Goldstein positive (> 0), considérés comme paradoxaux.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur2', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe' FROM events e WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 AND e.GoldsteinScale > 0 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC;

text_query: Pays où se déroulent le plus d'actions (ActionGeo_CountryCode) pour les événements de classe 'Matériel Coopération' (QuadClass=2).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de sources (NumSources) et le ton moyen (AvgTone) par code de base d'événement (EventBaseCode).
sql_query: SELECT e.EventBaseCode AS 'Code_Base_Evenement', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Moyenne_Sources', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Moyenne_Ton', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e GROUP BY e.EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.NumSources) DESC;

text_query: Acteurs (nom) les plus souvent en position d'acteur 1 dans des événements de menace (EventRootCode='13') avec un ton moyen négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.AvgTone < 0 AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Évolution du score Goldstein moyen par trimestre pour les interactions entre les États-Unis (USA) et la Chine (CHN).
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', ((e.MonthYear % 100) - 1) / 3 + 1 AS 'Trimestre', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE ((e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA')) GROUP BY e.Year, ((e.MonthYear % 100) - 1) / 3 + 1 ORDER BY e.Year, Trimestre;

text_query: Mentions dont le ton du document (MentionDocTone) est très différent (écart > 10) du ton moyen de l'événement (AvgTone).
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) > 10 ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) DESC;

text_query: Groupes connus (Actor1KnownGroupCode) impliqués dans des événements matériellement conflictuels (QuadClass=4) avec localisation en Afrique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Groupe', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IN ('AG', 'AO', 'BC', 'BY', 'BN', 'BF', 'BI', 'CM', 'CV', 'CF', 'CG', 'CD', 'DJ', 'EG', 'EK', 'ER', 'ET', 'GA', 'GH', 'GV', 'PU', 'KE', 'LT', 'LI', 'LY', 'MG', 'MI', 'ML', 'MR', 'MA', 'MZ', 'WA', 'NG', 'NI', 'RW', 'RE', 'SH', 'ST', 'SN', 'SL', 'SO', 'SF', 'OD', 'SU', 'SZ', 'TZ', 'TG', 'TS', 'TN', 'UG', 'ZR', 'ZM', 'ZI') GROUP BY e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.Actor1Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Sources (MentionSourceName) ayant la confiance moyenne (Confidence) la plus élevée dans leurs mentions d'événements violents (EventRootCode >= 18).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode >= '18' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs de type 'Civil' (CVL) en position d'acteur 2, avec le ton moyen le plus positif dans les événements de coopération verbale (QuadClass=1).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Civil', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Positif', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.QuadClass = 1 GROUP BY e.Actor2Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où les deux acteurs ont des codes religieux différents (Actor1Religion1Code != Actor2Religion1Code) et un ton moyen négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur1', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur2', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code != e.Actor2Religion1Code AND e.AvgTone < 0 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources web (MentionType=1) pour des événements dont le lieu d'action est un pays spécifique (ex: France 'FR'), avec leur longueur de document.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Web', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionType = 1 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'FR' ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC;

text_query: Différence entre le nombre de mentions le jour de l'événement (NumMentions) et le nombre total de mentions associées dans la table 'mentions'.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.NumMentions AS 'Mentions_Table_Events', COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Mentions_Table_Mentions', (e.NumMentions - COUNT(m.GlobalEventID)) AS 'Difference' FROM events e LEFT JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.NumMentions HAVING ABS(e.NumMentions - COUNT(m.GlobalEventID)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - COUNT(m.GlobalEventID)) DESC;

text_query: Événements où un acteur gouvernemental menace un acteur civil, avec localisation précise.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Civil', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où les événements diplomatiques ont généré le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources_Uniques', SUM(e.NumSources) AS 'Total_Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Sources_Uniques DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation entre la longueur des documents de mention et le ton des événements de conflit matériel.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Document_Moyenne', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Document_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (ONG, médias, entreprises) les plus souvent en conflit verbal avec des gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO','MED','BUS','EDU','CVL','ELI') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.QuadClass = 3 GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements avec une forte dissonance entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Mentions_Moyen', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 AND e.NumMentions > 1 ORDER BY Difference_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Régions administratives (ADM1) avec la plus forte concentration d'événements de type 'assaut' (182).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code AS 'Region_ADM1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Assauts', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Echelle_Goldstein_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventCode = '182' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Assauts DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Confiance moyenne des mentions par type de média pour les événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne DESC;

text_query: Pays acteur 1 dont les événements ont le plus souvent un acteur 2 local (même code pays).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', COUNT(*) AS 'Evenements_Acteur2_Local', 100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor1CountryCode AND e2.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL) AS 'Pourcentage_Local' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY Evenements_Acteur2_Local DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Heure de la journée (basée sur MentionTimeDate) où les mentions d'événements négatifs (AvgTone < -5) sont les plus fréquentes.
sql_query: SELECT CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS INT) AS 'Heure', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Negatives', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 AND LENGTH(m.MentionTimeDate) >= 10 GROUP BY Heure ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions_Negatives DESC;

text_query: Événements 'racine' (IsRootEvent=1) qui ont généré le plus grand nombre de mentions dérivées (IsRootEvent=0) partageant le même EventRootCode.
sql_query: SELECT e_root.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', e_root.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', COUNT(e_derived.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Derives', AVG(e_derived.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Derives' FROM events e_root JOIN events e_derived ON e_root.EventRootCode = e_derived.EventRootCode AND e_root.Day = e_derived.Day AND e_root.Actor1CountryCode = e_derived.Actor1CountryCode WHERE e_root.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e_derived.IsRootEvent = 0 AND e_root.GlobalEventID != e_derived.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e_root.GlobalEventID, e_root.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(e_derived.GlobalEventID) > 2 ORDER BY Nombre_Derives DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Différence de ton moyen entre les événements où l'acteur 1 est un pays et l'acteur 2 est un groupe connu (ex: UNO, NATO) et les événements inverses.
sql_query: SELECT 'Pays_vs_Groupe' AS 'Type', AVG(e1.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e1 WHERE e1.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e1.Actor2KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'Groupe_vs_Pays' AS 'Type', AVG(e2.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e2 WHERE e2.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e2.Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL;

text_query: Événements avec localisation géographique de haute précision (Geo_Type >= 3) et un score Goldstein extrême (< -8 ou > 8).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precis', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Precision_Geographique', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND (e.GoldsteinScale < -8 OR e.GoldsteinScale > 8) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Médias (domaine source) qui couvrent de manière disproportionnée les événements avec un acteur spécifique (ex: USA).
sql_query: SELECT SUBSTR(m.MentionSourceName, INSTR(m.MentionSourceName, '.') + 1) AS 'Domaine_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Evenements_USA', 100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e2.GlobalEventID) FROM events e2 JOIN mentions m2 ON e2.GlobalEventID = m2.GlobalEventID WHERE SUBSTR(m2.MentionSourceName, INSTR(m2.MentionSourceName, '.') + 1) = SUBSTR(m.MentionSourceName, INSTR(m.MentionSourceName, '.') + 1)) AS 'Pourcentage_Evenements_USA' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA' GROUP BY Domaine_Media HAVING Evenements_USA > 10 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Evenements_USA DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Paires d'acteurs (pays) ayant le plus d'interactions conflictuelles (QuadClass 3 ou 4) avec un ton moyen fortement négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 AND AVG(e.AvgTone) < -3 ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec plus de 10 mentions et un ton moyen négatif, impliquant des gouvernements
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 10 AND e.AvgTone < 0 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques ayant couvert des événements avec un score Goldstein très négatif (< -5)
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays avec la plus grande variation de ton moyen (entre événements les plus positifs et négatifs) pour les événements de type 'Appel' (EventRootCode 02)
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', MAX(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Maximum', MIN(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Minimum', (MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '02' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY (MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui ont mentionné des événements avec des acteurs religieux (codes religion non nuls)
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Religieux' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code != '') OR (e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code != '') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de menace (EventRootCode 13) avec localisation précise (Geo_Type >= 3) et un score de confiance moyen des mentions supérieur à 80
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precise', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.AvgTone HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs d'organisations internationales (Type IGO) impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) avec plusieurs mentions par jour
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name) AS 'Organisation_Internationale', COUNT(DISTINCT e.Day) AS 'Jours_Activite', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('IGO', 'NGO', 'IMG') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('IGO', 'NGO', 'IMG')) AND e.QuadClass = 2 GROUP BY COALESCE(e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name) HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.Day) > 1 ORDER BY SUM(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec un écart important entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des documents de mention (différence > 10)
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec des acteurs multiples (plusieurs types pour un même acteur) et une couverture médiatique élevée (> 20 mentions)
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Principal', e.Actor1Type2Code AS 'Type_Secondaire', e.Actor1Type3Code AS 'Type_Tertiaire', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type2Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor1Type3Code IS NOT NULL) AND e.NumMentions > 20 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où se produisent des événements avec des acteurs non-gouvernementaux (type CVL, MED, BUS) et un ton moyen positif (> 5)
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Positifs', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('CVL', 'MED', 'BUS') AND e.AvgTone > 5 GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération verbale (QuadClass 1) entre pays européens (liste de codes pays) avec plus de 3 mentions par source
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumSources) AS 'Mentions_Par_Source' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 1 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP') AND e.NumSources > 0 AND (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumSources) > 3 ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources de type 'WEB' (MentionType 1) pour des événements avec un acteur médiatique (MED) comme acteur principal
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_WEB', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Medias', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' AND m.MentionType = 1 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) avec des localisations géographiques différentes pour l'acteur principal et le lieu d'action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant le plus les conflits militaires en Afrique
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal avec les médias
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'COP') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED' AND e.Year >= 2020 GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le ton des articles et l'échelle de Goldstein pour les événements de coopération matérielle
sql_query: SELECT e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 GROUP BY e.GoldsteinScale HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale;

text_query: Événements de menace (code 13) avec forte couverture médiatique et localisation précise
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Menacant', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Cible', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Principale' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.NumMentions > 10 AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources avec la plus haute confiance moyenne pour les événements impliquant des organisations internationales
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confidence_Moyenne', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Evenements_Couverts' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'IGO', 'NGO', 'IRC') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'IGO', 'NGO', 'IRC') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence entre ton de l'événement et ton des articles de mention pour les conflits verbaux
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) > 2 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Événements religieux ou ethniques (codes spécifiques) avec forte intensité médiatique
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1EthnicCode AS 'Groupe_Ethnique', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Principale', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Principale' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2EthnicCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) AND e.NumArticles > 10 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Analyse des sources citant des événements avec très faible confiance (<40)
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Faible_Confiance', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM mentions m WHERE m.Confidence < 40 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;
