text_query: Événements de pourparlers diplomatiques (code 04) avec participation de multiples sources médiatiques
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Partie_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Partie_2', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Distinctes', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Acteurs militaires intervenant dans des pays tiers, par fréquence et localisation
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Militaire', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Intervention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interventions', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Relation entre longueur des articles et ton pour les événements de catastrophe naturelle ou humaine
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.EventRootCode IN ('07', '08') THEN 'Aide_Urgence' WHEN e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') THEN 'Conflit_Violent' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Categorie_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Article', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Article', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('07', '08', '18', '19', '20') GROUP BY Categorie_Evenement;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) les plus mentionnés par des types de médias spécifiques
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement_Racine', m.MentionType AS 'Type_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, m.MentionType HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 35;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements de coopération diplomatique entre les États-Unis et la Chine.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE ((e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA')) AND e.EventRootCode = '04' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen des événements par catégorie racine.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Articles', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) DESC;

text_query: Événements de menace ou de coercition mentionnés par au moins 5 sources différentes, avec localisation.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Agissant', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Cible', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('13', '17') AND e.NumSources >= 5 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Différence de ton entre la première mention et le ton moyen de l'événement pour les événements très médiatisés.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Premiere_Mention', (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND m.MentionTimeDate = (SELECT MIN(MentionTimeDate) FROM mentions WHERE GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID) ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition géographique des événements humanitaires (fourniture d'aide) par type d'acteur fournisseur.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Fournisseur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Actions', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Volume_Couverture' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code != '' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.Actor1Type1Code HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Sources dont la confiance moyenne de mention est supérieure à 80 et qui couvrent principalement des événements conflictuels.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverture', SUM(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Conflictuels' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs étatiques les plus souvent cibles de protestations, avec l'intensité moyenne (Goldstein) de ces événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Etat_Cible', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Protestations', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Intensite_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor2CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Sources qui ont rapporté des événements avec un ton extrêmement négatif (< -10) et une confiance élevée (> 90).
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Extremes', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Rapporte', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionDocTone < -10 AND m.Confidence > 90 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles (indicateur de viralité vs. profondeur).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) AS 'Divergence', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e WHERE ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) > 50 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Types d'acteurs les plus fréquemment impliqués dans des événements ayant un score Goldstein très positif (> 5).
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(Type_Acteur, 'Unknown') AS 'Type_Acteur', SUM(Nombre_Evenements) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(Score_Goldstein_Moyen) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1Type1Code, 'Unknown') AS Type_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 0 AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor2Type1Code, 'Unknown') AS Type_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 0 AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Type1Code != '' GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ) sub GROUP BY Type_Acteur ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les 10 événements les plus mentionnés impliquant des acteurs gouvernementaux (GOV) et des groupes rebelles (REB) avec un ton négatif (AvgTone < -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.NumMentions, e.AvgTone FROM events e WHERE (Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') OR (Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' AND Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') AND e.AvgTone < -5 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Compare le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen des mentions pour les événements de coopération verbale (QuadClass 1) et matérielle (QuadClass 2) par année.
sql_query: SELECT Year AS Annee, QuadClass AS Classe, SUM(NumArticles) AS Total_Articles, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE QuadClass IN (1, 2) GROUP BY Year, QuadClass ORDER BY Annee, Classe;

text_query: Calcule la différence de ton moyen entre les événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) et non racines pour chaque code d'événement de base (EventBaseCode) ayant au moins 100 événements.
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS Code_Evenement_Base, AVG(CASE WHEN IsRootEvent = 1 THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) AS Ton_Racine, AVG(CASE WHEN IsRootEvent = 0 THEN AvgTone ELSE NULL END) AS Ton_Non_Racine, COUNT(*) AS Total_Evenements FROM events GROUP BY EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100 ORDER BY Total_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Trouve les paires d'acteurs (pays) les plus fréquentes dans les événements de menace (EventRootCode 13) avec un score Goldstein inférieur à -5.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_1, Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Interactions FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '13' AND GoldsteinScale < -5 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode, Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Interactions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Liste les événements où le ton du document de mention (MentionDocTone) diffère de plus de 10 points du ton moyen de l'événement (AvgTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, m.MentionDocTone AS Ton_Document, ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) AS Difference_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) > 10 ORDER BY Difference_Ton DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Trouve les 10 codes d'événement de base (EventBaseCode) avec la plus grande variance de ton moyen (AvgTone) entre les différentes régions géographiques (ActionGeo_CountryCode).
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS Code_Base, COUNT(DISTINCT ActionGeo_CountryCode) AS Regions_Distinctes, MAX(AvgTone) - MIN(AvgTone) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ActionGeo_CountryCode) >= 5 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Identifie les mois avec une augmentation soudaine (+50%) du nombre d'événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) par rapport au mois précédent pour un pays donné (ex: Ukraine 'UKR').
sql_query: SELECT curr.MonthYear AS Mois, curr.Nombre_Evenements, prev.Nombre_Evenements AS Evenements_Mois_Precedent, (curr.Nombre_Evenements * 1.0 / prev.Nombre_Evenements - 1) * 100 AS Pourcentage_Augmentation FROM (SELECT MonthYear, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 AND ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'US' GROUP BY MonthYear) curr JOIN (SELECT MonthYear, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 AND ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'US' GROUP BY MonthYear) prev ON curr.MonthYear = prev.MonthYear + 1 WHERE curr.Nombre_Evenements > prev.Nombre_Evenements * 1.5 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Augmentation DESC;

text_query: Compare le nombre moyen d'articles par événement pour les acteurs de type 'MEDIA' vs 'GOVERNMENT' en tant qu'Actor1.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, AVG(NumArticles) AS Articles_Moyens, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code IN ('MED', 'GOV') GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Articles_Moyens DESC;

text_query: Trouve les événements ayant le plus grand écart entre le nombre de mentions (NumMentions) et le nombre d'articles (NumArticles) pour les événements de type 'Diplomatic Coop' (EventRootCode 05).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, Actor1Name, Actor2Name, NumMentions, NumArticles, ABS(NumMentions - NumArticles) AS Ecart FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '05' ORDER BY Ecart DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Calcule la corrélation approximative (via covariance/variance) entre le score Goldstein et le ton moyen (AvgTone) par année.
sql_query: SELECT Year AS Annee, (SUM(GoldsteinScale * AvgTone) - SUM(GoldsteinScale)*SUM(AvgTone)/COUNT(*)) / (SUM(GoldsteinScale*GoldsteinScale) - SUM(GoldsteinScale)*SUM(GoldsteinScale)/COUNT(*)) AS Correlation_Approx FROM events WHERE GoldsteinScale IS NOT NULL AND AvgTone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Year ORDER BY Annee;

text_query: Analyse la distribution de la confiance des mentions (Confidence) par type de mention (MentionType) pour les événements de haute intensité (GoldsteinScale < -7 ou > 7).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS Type_Mention, MIN(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Min, MAX(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Max, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -7 OR e.GoldsteinScale > 7 GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne DESC;

text_query: Identifie les événements avec une géolocalisation précise (Actor1Geo_Type >= 3) et un nombre de sources (NumSources) supérieur à la moyenne pour leur année.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Geo_Fullname, e.NumSources, e.Year, avg_sources.Moyenne_Sources_Annee FROM events e JOIN (SELECT Year, AVG(NumSources) AS Moyenne_Sources_Annee FROM events GROUP BY Year) avg_sources ON e.Year = avg_sources.Year WHERE e.Actor1Geo_Type >= 3 AND e.NumSources > avg_sources.Moyenne_Sources_Annee ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements les plus couverts impliquant des groupes rebelles, avec leur localisation et sentiment moyen.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Sentiment_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Distribution des types d'événements (QuadClass) pour les actions militaires dans les pays en conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19', '20') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('SYR', 'IRQ', 'AFG', 'UKR') GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent le plus les événements diplomatiques entre grandes puissances.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts' FROM events AS e JOIN mentions AS m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'GBR', 'FRA') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'GBR', 'FRA') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où les événements ont le sentiment moyen le plus négatif, avec au moins 50 événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Sentiment_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events AS e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 50 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le nombre d'articles pour les événements de conflit matériel.
sql_query: SELECT e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Nombre_Articles_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events AS e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.NumSources HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY e.NumSources;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent ciblés par des manifestations, avec le score Goldstein moyen.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Gouvernement_Cible', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Manifestations', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique mais un faible nombre de sources (potentiels canulars).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Sentiment_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND e.NumSources = 1 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Distribution géographique des événements de coopération matérielle en Afrique.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NI', 'EG', 'SF', 'KE', 'GH', 'AO', 'DZ', 'SD', 'LY', 'MA', 'ET', 'TZ', 'ZM', 'ZW', 'MW', 'MZ', 'UG', 'CM', 'CI', 'SN', 'ML', 'BF', 'NE', 'TD', 'MR', 'SO', 'ER', 'DJ', 'RW', 'BI', 'CD', 'CG', 'GA', 'GQ', 'ST', 'BJ', 'TG', 'SL', 'LR', 'GN', 'GW', 'GM', 'CV') GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Différence de sentiment entre les mentions initiales et les mentions ultérieures pour les grands événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Sentiment_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Sentiment_Mentions_Moyen', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Sentiment' FROM events AS e JOIN mentions AS m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 10 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) > 0.5 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Types d'acteurs les plus souvent impliqués dans des événements de menace militaire.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Analyse des événements racines vs non-racines : différence de couverture médiatique et de sentiment.
sql_query: SELECT e.IsRootEvent AS 'Evenement_Racine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Sentiment_Moyen', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events AS e GROUP BY e.IsRootEvent;

text_query: Acteurs religieux impliqués dans des événements de coopération et de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur', e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Sentiment_Moyen' FROM events AS e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IN ('CHR', 'MOS', 'JEW', 'HIN', 'BUD') AND e.QuadClass IN (1, 2, 3, 4) GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.QuadClass;

text_query: Événements avec localisation précise (ville) et leur impact médiatique régional.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Precision_Geographique', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes' FROM events AS e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_Fullname HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Confiance moyenne des mentions par type de média pour les événements politiques.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Media', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events AS e JOIN mentions AS m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC;

text_query: Calcule le ton moyen des événements diplomatiques entre pays européens par année, en excluant les événements avec moins de 5 mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP') AND e.NumMentions >= 5 GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY e.Year DESC;

text_query: Identifie les 10 sources médiatiques qui couvrent le plus d'événements militaires impliquant les États-Unis, avec le nombre d'articles moyen par événement.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19') AND (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Liste les 15 événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement principal et le ton moyen des mentions qui le référencent.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Identifie les paires de pays ayant eu le plus d'interactions coopératives (QuadClass 1 ou 2) avec un score Goldstein élevé (supérieur à 4).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interactions', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) AND e.GoldsteinScale > 4 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Trouve les événements liés à l'aide humanitaire (code 07) en Afrique, avec le nombre de sources uniques qui en parlent et leur confiance moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Pays_Cible', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources_Uniques', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', e.NumArticles AS 'Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NI', 'ET', 'KE', 'SF', 'EG') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.NumArticles ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Analyse la corrélation entre la longueur des documents de mention et le ton des événements pour les événements politiques (code 01-05).
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Document_Moyenne', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('01', '02', '03', '04', '05') GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocLen) DESC;

text_query: Trouve les événements où un acteur gouvernemental menace (code 13) un acteur civil, avec la localisation précise et le nombre de mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Gouvernement', e.Actor2Name AS 'Civil', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Identifie les 15 paires acteur1-acteur2 les plus fréquentes dans les événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) avec un ton positif (supérieur à 2).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interactions', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.AvgTone > 2 AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Analyse la distribution des scores Goldstein pour les événements impliquant des organisations internationales (UNO, NATO, etc.) par type d'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie', MIN(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Minimum', MAX(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Maximum', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC;

text_query: Identifie les événements avec une forte couverture médiatique (plus de 30 articles) mais un faible nombre de sources (moins de 5), suggérant une couverture biaisée.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Articles', e.NumSources AS 'Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 30 AND e.NumSources < 5 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant le plus d'événements diplomatiques impliquant la Chine.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent ciblés par des menaces verbales (QuadClass 3).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Cible_Gouvernementale', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation entre la longueur des articles et le ton des mentions pour les événements militaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Article', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mention', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocLen) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Distribution géographique des événements d'aide humanitaire (EventRootCode 07) par continent.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX') THEN 'Amérique du Nord' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('BR', 'AR', 'CL') THEN 'Amérique du Sud' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB', 'RU') THEN 'Europe' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN', 'IN', 'JP') THEN 'Asie' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG', 'ZA', 'EG') THEN 'Afrique' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Continent', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Continent ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Groupes ethniques les plus fréquemment impliqués dans des conflits matériels (QuadClass 4).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs religieux (code religion) impliqués dans des événements de coopération verbale (QuadClass 1).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur', e.EventBaseCode AS 'Type_Cooperation', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 1 AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 3 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements de masse (EventRootCode 20) avec localisation précise (Geo_Type >= 3).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precis', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '20' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Sources qui rapportent à la fois des événements positifs (Goldstein > 5) et négatifs (Goldstein < -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale > 5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Positifs', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale < -5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Negatifs', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale > 5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 5 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale < -5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec délai important entre l'événement et sa mention dans la presse.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', m.MentionTimeDate AS 'Date_Mention', (julianday(substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Delai_Jours', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE Delai_Jours > 2 ORDER BY Delai_Jours DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs économiques (BUS) impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Economique', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Partenaire', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'BUS' AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Distribution des événements par type de mention et niveau de confiance.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', CASE WHEN m.Confidence >= 90 THEN 'Très élevée' WHEN m.Confidence >= 70 THEN 'Élevée' WHEN m.Confidence >= 50 THEN 'Moyenne' ELSE 'Faible' END AS 'Niveau_Confiance', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.MentionType, CASE WHEN m.Confidence >= 90 THEN 'Très élevée' WHEN m.Confidence >= 70 THEN 'Élevée' WHEN m.Confidence >= 50 THEN 'Moyenne' ELSE 'Faible' END ORDER BY m.MentionType, COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements de protestation impliquant des civils, avec le nombre de sources médiatiques par pays d'action.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS Nombre_Sources FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Sources DESC;

text_query: Différence moyenne de ton entre articles mentionnant des événements de coopération et de conflit, par année.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS Annee, AVG(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN m.MentionDocTone ELSE NULL END) AS Ton_Cooperation, AVG(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN m.MentionDocTone ELSE NULL END) AS Ton_Conflit FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY e.Year;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent cibles de menaces (EventCode 13), avec le nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS Acteur_Cible, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Articles FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.Actor2Name ORDER BY Nombre_Articles DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où le ton des articles (MentionDocTone) diffère fortement (>5 points) du ton moyen de l'événement (AvgTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Articles, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Difference_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY Difference_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant à la fois des événements impliquant les USA et la Chine, avec le compte par type d'événement.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, e.EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA','CHN') OR e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA','CHN')) GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Source, Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Mois avec le plus d'événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) en Afrique, par code pays d'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS Mois, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Conflits FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG','ZA','EG','KE','ET','GH','CI','TN','CM','ML') GROUP BY e.MonthYear, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de type 'Assaut' (EventRootCode 18) avec localisation précise (Geo_Type >=3), triés par confiance médiatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS Lieu, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '18' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions et le score Goldstein, par classe d'événement (QuadClass).
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS Classe_Evenement, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(e.NumMentions) AS Mentions_Moyennes, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen FROM events e GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 partagent la même religion mais sont en conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.Actor1Religion1Code AS Religion FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3,4) AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code = e.Actor2Religion1Code ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources avec la plus grande variation de ton (écart max-min) dans leurs articles couvrant des événements diplomatiques (EventRootCode 05).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone) AS Variation_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY Variation_Ton DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec un acteur humanitaire (NGO/IRC) comme acteur 1 et un acteur gouvernemental comme acteur 2.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name AS Organisation_Humanitaire, e.Actor2Name AS Gouvernement_Cible, e.EventRootCode AS Type_Interaction FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('IRC') OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où les événements de protestation (14) ont le ton moyen le plus négatif, avec le nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, SUM(e.NumArticles) AS Total_Articles FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs militaires (MIL) impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) avec un score Goldstein élevé (>4).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS Acteur_Militaire, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Partenaire, e.GoldsteinScale FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.GoldsteinScale > 4 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions d'événements survenant dans un pays différent de celui de la source médiatique (basé sur le domaine).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Evenement, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND m.MentionSourceName NOT LIKE '%.' || e.ActionGeo_CountryCode || '%' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une augmentation significative des mentions entre le premier et le dernier article (basé sur MentionTimeDate).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, MIN(m.MentionTimeDate) AS Premiere_Mention, MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) AS Derniere_Mention, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING (MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) - MIN(m.MentionTimeDate)) > 10000 AND COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY (MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) - MIN(m.MentionTimeDate)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Groupes ethniques (ActorEthnicCode) les plus souvent associés à des événements de conflit verbal (QuadClass 3).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1EthnicCode AS Groupe_Ethnique, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1EthnicCode ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements de 'Fourniture d'aide' (EventRootCode 07) avec un acteur 1 des États-Unis et un acteur 2 d'un pays en développement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Beneficiaire, e.NumArticles AS Articles FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('NGA','ETH','PAK','AFG') ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Ratio entre le nombre de sources et le nombre d'articles pour les événements très négatifs (AvgTone < -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources AS Sources, e.NumArticles AS Articles, CAST(e.NumSources AS REAL) / e.NumArticles AS Ratio_Sources_Articles FROM events e WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY Ratio_Sources_Articles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec ton moyen positif et plus de 5 mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, e.EventRootCode AS Code_Evenement, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.AvgTone > 0 AND e.NumMentions > 5 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements de protestation impliquant des civils.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source_Media, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 0 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où les événements avec des groupes rebelles ont le ton moyen le plus négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Lieu, e.Actor2KnownGroupCode AS Groupe_Rebel, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.Actor2KnownGroupCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand nombre d'événements diplomatiques entre gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS Mois, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Événements de conflit matériel couverts par plusieurs sources avec une confiance élevée.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.EventCode AS Code_Action, e.NumSources AS Nombre_Sources, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND m.Confidence > 80 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.EventCode, e.NumSources HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 1 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC, Confiance_Moyenne DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements d'aide humanitaire avec localisation précise (ville) et ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS Lieu, e.AvgTone AS Ton, e.NumArticles AS Nombre_Articles FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3,4,5) AND e.AvgTone > 2.0 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de mentions et l'échelle de Goldstein pour les événements militaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS Type_Interaction, AVG(e.NumMentions) AS Mentions_Moyennes, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19', '20') GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY Type_Interaction;

text_query: Événements racines avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement et le ton des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Mentions_Moyen, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > 3 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs non-étatiques les plus mentionnés dans des événements de protestation.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS Groupe, SUM(e.NumMentions) AS Total_Mentions FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code NOT IN ('GOV', 'MIL') GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code, e.Actor1KnownGroupCode HAVING SUM(e.NumMentions) > 0 ORDER BY Total_Mentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec localisations géographiques différentes pour l'acteur et l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, e.EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources avec la couverture la plus équilibrée (nombre similaire d'événements positifs et négatifs).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, SUM(CASE WHEN e.AvgTone > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Evenements_Positifs, SUM(CASE WHEN e.AvgTone < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Evenements_Negatifs, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Total_Evenements FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING Total_Evenements > 10 AND ABS(Evenements_Positifs - Evenements_Negatifs) * 1.0 / Total_Evenements < 0.3 ORDER BY Total_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays avec la plus grande diversité de types d'acteurs impliqués dans des événements de coopération.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Type1Code) AS Types_Acteurs_Differents, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1,2) AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY Types_Acteurs_Differents DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements liés à des questions religieuses avec un ton polarisé (très positif ou très négatif).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.Actor1Religion1Code AS Religion_Impliquee, e.AvgTone AS Ton, e.NumSources AS Nombre_Sources FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND (e.AvgTone > 5.0 OR e.AvgTone < -5.0) ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements de conflit militaire impliquant des groupes rebelles, avec le nombre de mentions par source.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID, Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements diplomatiques positifs (Goldstein > 0) par année.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.GoldsteinScale > 0 AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Year, e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY e.Year DESC, Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du ton moyen des événements entre gouvernements et groupes civils.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') GROUP BY e.MonthYear, e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC, e.QuadClass;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le ton des articles pour les événements de coopération.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) GROUP BY e.QuadClass, e.NumSources HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY e.QuadClass, e.NumSources DESC;

text_query: Mentions d'événements terroristes (groupes connus) par type de média et confiance.
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.Actor2KnownGroupCode) AS 'Groupe_Connu', m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK', 'ISI', 'AQI', 'AQM', 'AQS', 'AQAP', 'AQIM', 'JAN', 'ASH', 'HTS', 'BLA', 'TTP', 'LET', 'JEM', 'HUJI', 'HAMAS', 'PJAK', 'PKK', 'ISIL', 'ISIS') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK', 'ISI', 'AQI', 'AQM', 'AQS', 'AQAP', 'AQIM', 'JAN', 'ASH', 'HTS', 'BLA', 'TTP', 'LET', 'JEM', 'HUJI', 'HAMAS', 'PJAK', 'PKK', 'ISIL', 'ISIS')) AND e.QuadClass IN (1, 2, 3, 4) GROUP BY COALESCE(e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.Actor2KnownGroupCode), m.MentionType HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY Groupe_Connu, Nombre_Mentions DESC;

text_query: Pays actifs dans la diplomatie internationale par nombre de partenaires distincts.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Diplomate', COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2CountryCode) AS 'Partenaires_Distincts', COUNT(*) AS 'Evenements_Diplomatiques', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Impact_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2CountryCode) > 15 ORDER BY Partenaires_Distincts DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines vs non-racines : différence de couverture médiatique et de ton.
sql_query: SELECT e.IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e GROUP BY e.IsRootEvent ORDER BY e.IsRootEvent DESC;

text_query: Événements avec localisations différentes entre acteurs et action, par type géographique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_Type AS 'Type_Geo_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Geo_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Impact_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_Type != e.ActionGeo_Type AND e.Actor1Geo_Type IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_Type, e.ActionGeo_Type ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec multiples types d'acteurs (Type1, Type2, Type3) : complexité des interactions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', (CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type2Code IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type3Code IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.Actor2Type2Code IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.Actor2Type3Code IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Complexite_Acteurs', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes' FROM events e GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING Complexite_Acteurs >= 2 ORDER BY Complexite_Acteurs DESC, Sources_Moyennes DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Couverture médiatique des catastrophes naturelles (codes 073, 074) par source et langue.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', SUBSTR(m.MentionIdentifier, 1, 10) AS 'Domaine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventBaseCode IN ('073', '074') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName, Domaine HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec décalage géographique important entre acteurs (>1000 km estimés).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_Long IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL AND (6371 * ACOS(COS(RADIANS(e.Actor1Geo_Lat)) * COS(RADIANS(e.ActionGeo_Lat)) * COS(RADIANS(e.ActionGeo_Long) - RADIANS(e.Actor1Geo_Long)) + SIN(RADIANS(e.Actor1Geo_Lat)) * SIN(RADIANS(e.ActionGeo_Lat)))) > 1000 ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Sources médiatiques ayant couvert le plus d'événements diplomatiques entre gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du ton moyen des événements liés aux manifestations en Ukraine.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'UP' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal avec des groupes civils.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Civil', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le ton des mentions pour les événements militaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19') GROUP BY e.NumArticles ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Répartition géographique des événements de coopération matérielle impliquant des ONG.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Detaille', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations_Materielles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'NGO') GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.ActionGeo_Fullname ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen de ses mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone, e.NumMentions HAVING e.NumMentions > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mois où les événements impliquant la Russie et les États-Unis ont été les plus négatifs.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE ((e.Actor1CountryCode = 'RUS' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'RUS')) GROUP BY e.MonthYear HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Sources qui rapportent le plus souvent des événements avec une confiance d'extraction élevée.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 80 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC, COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Types d'acteurs les plus ciblés dans les événements de menace en Afrique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Cible', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('AF', 'NI', 'SF', 'EG', 'ET', 'AG') AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Type1Code != '' GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Mentions dont le ton du document est en forte contradiction avec le score Goldstein de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionIdentifier AS 'Identifiant_Mention', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Ecart' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE (m.MentionDocTone > 0 AND e.GoldsteinScale < 0) OR (m.MentionDocTone < 0 AND e.GoldsteinScale > 0) ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Volumétrie des mentions par type de média pour les événements liés au changement climatique.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Extraction' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.EventCode IN ('071', '064', '031') OR e.Actor1Name LIKE '%ENVIRON%' OR e.Actor2Name LIKE '%ENVIRON%' OR e.SOURCEURL LIKE '%climate%' OR e.SOURCEURL LIKE '%green%' OR e.SOURCEURL LIKE '%carbon%' OR e.Actor1Type1Code='NGO') GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Trajectoire du ton moyen des événements impliquant la Chine sur une année, par trimestre.
sql_query: SELECT CAST((e.MonthYear / 100) AS INTEGER) AS 'Annee', CASE WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(e.MonthYear, 5, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'T1' WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(e.MonthYear, 5, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 'T2' WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(e.MonthYear, 5, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 'T3' ELSE 'T4' END AS 'Trimestre', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN' GROUP BY CAST((e.MonthYear / 100) AS INTEGER), CASE WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(e.MonthYear, 5, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'T1' WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(e.MonthYear, 5, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 'T2' WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(e.MonthYear, 5, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 'T3' ELSE 'T4' END ORDER BY Annee, Trimestre;

text_query: Événements racine les plus reproduits (IsRootEvent = 1) ayant généré le plus de mentions dérivées.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Mentions_Initiales', COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Mentions_Derivees_Total', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode, e.NumMentions HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > e.NumMentions ORDER BY COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements de protestation impliquant des civils.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où les événements de conflit matériel ont le ton moyen le plus négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Negatif' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING AVG(e.AvgTone) < 0 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand nombre d'événements diplomatiques impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'IGO' OR e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF')) GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique (plus de 5 sources) mais un score Goldstein très négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumSources > 5 AND e.GoldsteinScale < -5 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Relation entre la longueur des documents de mention et le ton des événements de fourniture d'aide.
sql_query: SELECT AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Document', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' GROUP BY e.EventCode ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) DESC;

text_query: Pays acteurs les plus actifs dans la coopération matérielle avec un ton positif persistant.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Persistant' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.AvgTone > 2 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où la localisation de l'acteur et du lieu d'action diffèrent, avec un score Goldstein élevé.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) > 3 ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux les plus mentionnés dans des événements de coopération diplomatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Type1Code != 'GOV' AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY SUM(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen pour les événements de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Articles', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Événements impliquant des groupes religieux avec un ton de document de mention extrêmement négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND m.MentionDocTone < -10 ORDER BY m.MentionDocTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentionneurs les plus confiants pour les événements de type militaire.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays avec la plus grande variance de ton dans les événements de coopération verbale.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone) AS 'Variance_Ton' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 1 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines avec un nombre de mentions anormalement élevé par rapport à leur score Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.NumMentions > 50 AND ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) < 3 AND e.Year >= 2020 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Types d'acteurs les plus souvent en position d'acteur 2 dans les événements de désapprobation.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '11' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Tendances mensuelles du nombre d'événements de menace impliquant des acteurs militaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear ASC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Calcule le nombre d'événements par type d'acteur principal et secondaire, pour les événements de conflit matériel.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Secondaire', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code, e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Trouve les 10 pays où les événements ont le ton moyen le plus négatif, pour les événements de protestation.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Affiche la distribution mensuelle du nombre d'articles pour les événements impliquant des groupes rebelles.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY Mois_Annee DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Identifie les 15 événements les plus couverts (nombre d'articles) impliquant un conflit militaire, avec leur localisation.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Trouve les paires d'acteurs (pays) les plus fréquentes dans les événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Cooperations DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Affiche l'évolution du ton moyen des événements par trimestre pour les événements aux États-Unis.
sql_query: SELECT (e.MonthYear / 100) AS 'Annee', ((e.MonthYear % 100) - 1) / 3 + 1 AS 'Trimestre', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'US' GROUP BY Annee, Trimestre ORDER BY Annee DESC, Trimestre DESC LIMIT 16;

text_query: Identifie les sources de mentions qui couvrent à la fois des événements gouvernementaux et civils.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Gouvernementaux', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Civils' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING Evenements_Gouvernementaux > 0 AND Evenements_Civils > 0 ORDER BY (Evenements_Gouvernementaux + Evenements_Civils) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Calcule le ratio entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles pour les événements avec un ton très négatif (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Articles', CAST(e.NumMentions AS REAL) / e.NumArticles AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY Ratio_Mentions_Articles DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Trouve les événements où l'acteur principal et secondaire sont de la même religion, pour les événements de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code = e.Actor2Religion1Code ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Affiche le top 20 des villes avec le plus d'événements de type 'déclaration publique'.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Declarations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '01' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_Fullname ORDER BY Nombre_Declarations DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Compare le nombre moyen de sources par événement entre les conflits verbaux et matériels.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Identifie les événements qui ont été mentionnés dans plus de 5 sources différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Liste_Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumSources > 5 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Trouve les acteurs (pays) qui sont le plus souvent en position d'acteur principal dans les événements de menace.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Menaces DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Affiche la corrélation entre le score Goldstein et le ton moyen pour les événements de coopération.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Cooperation', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Goldstein_Moyen', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) GROUP BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Identifie les événements avec une couverture médiatique anormalement élevée (nombre de mentions > 2 * moyenne globale).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Mentions', (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) FROM events) AS 'Moyenne_Globale' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 2 * (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) FROM events) ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Calcule le pourcentage d'événements par classe Quad pour chaque année.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY e.Year) AS 'Pourcentage' FROM events e GROUP BY e.Year, e.QuadClass ORDER BY Annee DESC, Classe_Quad;

text_query: Trouve les sources de mentions qui rapportent principalement des événements avec un ton positif (> 5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Positifs', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone > 5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Positifs DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où le ton des articles est en contradiction avec l'échelle Goldstein (positif vs négatif)
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e WHERE (e.GoldsteinScale > 0 AND e.AvgTone < -5) OR (e.GoldsteinScale < 0 AND e.AvgTone > 5) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mois avec la plus forte augmentation d'événements de conflit matériel par rapport au mois précédent
sql_query: SELECT current.MoisAnnee AS 'Mois', current.nb_conflits AS 'Conflits_Ce_Mois', previous.nb_conflits AS 'Conflits_Mois_Precedent', (current.nb_conflits - previous.nb_conflits) AS 'Difference' FROM (SELECT MonthYear AS MoisAnnee, COUNT(*) AS nb_conflits FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY MonthYear) current JOIN (SELECT MonthYear AS MoisAnnee, COUNT(*) AS nb_conflits FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY MonthYear) previous ON current.MoisAnnee = previous.MoisAnnee + 100 WHERE current.nb_conflits > previous.nb_conflits ORDER BY (current.nb_conflits - previous.nb_conflits) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pays où les événements religieux ont le ton moyen le plus négatif
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Negatif', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Religieux' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code != '') OR (e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code != '') GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec localisation géographique précise (ville) mais pays acteur différent
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Geo', e.Actor1Geo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Geo' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_Type IN (3,4,5) AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre nombre de sources et nombre d'articles pour les événements de protestation
sql_query: SELECT e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.NumSources > 0 GROUP BY e.NumSources ORDER BY e.NumSources ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux avec le plus d'événements de coopération matérielle vers des pays spécifiques
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Donneur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Receveur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '06' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen et le ton des mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionDocTone) > 3 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Distribution des événements par classe Quad pour les acteurs militaires vs civils
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('MIL','CVL') AND e.QuadClass IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code, e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.Actor1Type1Code, e.QuadClass;

text_query: Pays avec la plus forte proportion d'événements de menace (EventRootCode 13)
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', SUM(CASE WHEN EventRootCode = '13' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Menaces', ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EventRootCode = '13' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS 'Pourcentage_Menaces' FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EventRootCode = '13' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant à la fois des événements positifs et négatifs avec forte confiance
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone > 5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Positifs', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone < -5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Negatifs', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 85 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone > 5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 5 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone < -5 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution du ton moyen des événements diplomatiques par année
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Diplomatique', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Year >= 2010 GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY e.Year ASC;

text_query: Événements avec localisation d'action différente du pays des deux acteurs
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != e.Actor1CountryCode AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20;

text_query: Groupes rebelles les plus actifs géographiquement (pays différents)
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Rebelle', COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode) AS 'Pays_Differents', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode != '' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1KnownGroupCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode) DESC, COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements de coopération avec le plus grand nombre de types d'acteurs différents impliqués
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Type1Code) + COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2Type1Code) AS 'Types_Acteurs_Differents', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Cooperation' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1,2) AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Type1Code) + COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2Type1Code) >= 2 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor1Type1Code) + COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2Type1Code) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Distribution géographique des actions de fourniture d'aide humanitaire
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible_Aide', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Actions', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de conflit verbal impliquant des groupes rebelles, avec tendance temporelle mensuelle
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK')) GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de mentions et le score Goldstein pour les événements de coopération matérielle
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.NumMentions > 10 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC, e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant le plus d'événements impliquant la Chine comme acteur principal
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de menace avec localisation précise (ville), classés par intensité
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.Actor1Name AS 'Nom_Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Nom_Acteur2', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC, e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Analyse comparative des tonalités des documents entre sources occidentales et non-occidentales pour les événements au Moyen-Orient
