sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.us%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.uk%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.eu%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.com%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.org%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.de%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.fr%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.ca%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.au%' THEN 'Occidental' ELSE 'Non-Occidental' END AS 'Type_Source', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Tonalite_Document_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('SY', 'IQ', 'IR', 'SA', 'IL', 'PS') GROUP BY CASE WHEN m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.us%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.uk%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.eu%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.com%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.org%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.de%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.fr%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.ca%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.au%' THEN 'Occidental' ELSE 'Non-Occidental' END;

text_query: Événements impliquant des organisations internationales (ONU, OMS) comme acteur secondaire
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Racine', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WHO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'NATO') ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Fréquence des types d'événements (racine) pour les actions se déroulant en Ukraine
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Racine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'UP' OR e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode = 'UP' OR e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode = 'UP' GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec un écart important entre la tonalité moyenne de l'événement et celle des documents de mention
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Tonalite_Document_Moyenne', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Tonalite', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone, e.NumMentions HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent cibles de désapprobation publique
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Desapprobations', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '11' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Répartition des classes Quad pour les événements impliquant des acteurs religieux
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Mentions d'événements économiques (codes 06, 07) par type de média
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('06', '07') GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec une localisation géographique précise (coordonnées) et un score Goldstein extrême
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Racine' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL AND (e.GoldsteinScale > 7 OR e.GoldsteinScale < -7) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Top 10 des combinaisons d'acteurs (pays) les plus conflictuelles (QuadClass 4)
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Conflits, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Tonalite_Moyenne FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 10 mentions et ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '06' AND e.NumMentions > 10 AND e.AvgTone > 0 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC;

text_query: Pays avec le ton moyen le plus négatif pour les événements impliquant des civils.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Negatif' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen des événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e.NumArticles HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY e.NumArticles;

text_query: Événements avec des acteurs religieux (musulmans) ayant une forte couverture médiatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Religion1Code IN ('MOS', 'CHR') OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IN ('MOS', 'CHR')) AND e.NumMentions > 5 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Distribution géographique des événements de fourniture d'aide par type d'acteur.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Aides' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code != '' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources de confiance élevée (>80) pour les événements violents.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Fiable', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 80 AND e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') ORDER BY m.Confidence DESC;

text_query: Différence de ton entre les mentions originales et le ton moyen de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs médiatiques couvrant des événements avec des scores Goldstein extrêmes.
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 7 OR e.GoldsteinScale < -7 ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC;

text_query: Événements racines avec le plus grand nombre de sources uniques par type de quad class.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Quad', COUNT(DISTINCT e.NumSources) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Uniques', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.NumSources) DESC;

text_query: Pays où les événements impliquant la police ont le ton moyen le plus bas.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Geolocalisation', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Bas' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'COP' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Mentions longues (>3000 caractères) pour des événements de déclarations publiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Mention', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '01' AND m.MentionDocLen > 3000 ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC;

text_query: Variation du nombre de mentions par heure pour les événements très médiatisés.
sql_query: SELECT SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS 'Heure', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 GROUP BY SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements de négociation (consultation) entre gouvernements avec issue positive.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Positif', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Cooperation' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('05', '06') AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.AvgTone > 0 AND e.GoldsteinScale > 0 AND e.Year >= 2014 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC;

text_query: Sources qui mentionnent à la fois des événements de coopération et de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Polyvalente', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Cooperation', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 0 ORDER BY (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) + COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où la France est impliquée avec un ton moyen très négatif, classés par gravité.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, EventCode, Actor1Name, Actor2Name, AvgTone, GoldsteinScale FROM events WHERE (Actor1CountryCode = 'FRA' OR Actor2CountryCode = 'FRA') AND AvgTone < -5 ORDER BY GoldsteinScale ASC, AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques ayant couvert le plus d'événements militaires (QuadClass 4).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux (Type1Code 'GOV') les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec des civils.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Conflits FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont de la même religion mais ont un ton moyen négatif.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, Actor1Name, Actor2Name, Actor1Religion1Code, AvgTone FROM events WHERE Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Religion1Code = Actor2Religion1Code AND AvgTone < 0 ORDER BY AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence entre le ton du document de mention et le ton moyen de l'événement, pour les événements très mentionnés.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Mention_Moyen, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone AS Difference_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements dont l'acteur principal n'est pas de ce pays.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode <> e.ActionGeo_CountryCode GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements de type 'Assaut' (code racine 18) avec une localisation géographique précise (type 3 ou 4).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, EventCode, ActionGeo_Fullname, ActionGeo_CountryCode, GoldsteinScale FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '18' AND ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4) ORDER BY GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs (nom) impliqués dans le plus grand nombre de types d'événements différents (codes uniques).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Name, COUNT(DISTINCT EventRootCode) AS Types_Evenements_Differents FROM events WHERE Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EventRootCode) > 5 ORDER BY Types_Evenements_Differents DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Rapport entre le nombre d'articles et le nombre de sources pour les événements très négatifs (ton < -10).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, NumArticles, NumSources, CAST(NumArticles AS REAL) / NULLIF(NumSources, 0) AS Articles_Par_Source FROM events WHERE AvgTone < -10 AND NumSources > 0 ORDER BY Articles_Par_Source DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte confiance des mentions (>80) mais un faible nombre de sources (<=2).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumSources <= 2 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où la localisation de l'action est un pays différent de celui des deux acteurs.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, Actor1CountryCode, Actor2CountryCode, ActionGeo_CountryCode FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode <> Actor1CountryCode AND ActionGeo_CountryCode <> Actor2CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Moyenne du score Goldstein pour les interactions entre gouvernements et organisations internationales (IGO).
sql_query: SELECT AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE (Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND Actor2Type1Code = 'IGO') OR (Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' AND Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV');

text_query: Périodes de la journée (heure de la mention) où le ton des documents est le plus négatif.
sql_query: SELECT CAST(SUBSTR(CAST(m.MentionTimeDate AS TEXT), 9, 2) AS INTEGER) AS Heure, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM mentions m WHERE LENGTH(CAST(m.MentionTimeDate AS TEXT)) >= 10 GROUP BY Heure HAVING Heure IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Acteurs dont le code pays (3 lettres) ne correspond pas au code géographique (2 lettres) de leur localisation.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Name, Actor1CountryCode, Actor1Geo_CountryCode FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTR(Actor1CountryCode, 1, 2) <> Actor1Geo_CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) avec un ton positif, impliquant des ONG.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, Actor1Name, Actor2Name, EventCode, AvgTone FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 2 AND AvgTone > 0 AND (Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'IGO') OR Actor2Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'IGO')) ORDER BY AvgTone DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions et le ton moyen pour les événements de chaque classe Quad.
sql_query: SELECT QuadClass, AVG(NumMentions) AS Mentions_Moyennes, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events GROUP BY QuadClass ORDER BY QuadClass;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et la tonalité des documents pour les événements humanitaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne_Documents', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumArticles, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) >= 3 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 60;

text_query: Événements impliquant des organisations internationales (ONU, OMS) avec le plus grand nombre de sources différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Distinctes' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WHO', 'WBK', 'IMF') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WHO', 'WBK', 'IMF')) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.EventCode ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Distribution des types d'acteurs (gouvernement, civils, militaires) dans les événements de conflit en Ukraine.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Principal', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'UP' AND e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Confiance moyenne des mentions pour les événements gouvernementaux vs événements civils.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Principal', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Evenements_Avec_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'CVL') GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec localisation précise (ville) ayant un score Goldstein extrême (>7 ou <-7).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND (e.GoldsteinScale > 7 OR e.GoldsteinScale < -7) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 45;

text_query: Différence de tonalité entre le document de mention et la tonalité moyenne de l'événement pour les conflits.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne_Documents', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Tonalite' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) >= 2 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Acteurs les plus fréquents dans les événements de menace (code racine 13) en Amérique du Nord.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX') GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Relation entre le nombre de sources et la confiance des mentions pour les événements impliquant la police.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'COP' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) >= 2 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Événements avec acteurs ethniques identifiés, groupés par région géographique.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX') THEN 'Amérique du Nord' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB') THEN 'Europe' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN', 'JP', 'IN') THEN 'Asie' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Region', e.Actor1EthnicCode AS 'Ethnie_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CASE WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX') THEN 'Amérique du Nord' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB') THEN 'Europe' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN', 'JP', 'IN') THEN 'Asie' ELSE 'Autre' END, e.Actor1EthnicCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) avec le plus grand écart entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (NumMentions - NumArticles) AS 'Ecart_Mentions_Articles', AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne' FROM events WHERE IsRootEvent = 1 AND NumMentions IS NOT NULL AND NumArticles IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(NumMentions - NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec coordonnées géographiques complètes (lat/long) pour les actions humanitaires, classés par tonalité.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.AvgTone AS 'Tonalite_Moyenne', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux impliqués dans des protestations avec un ton médiatique très négatif
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Opposant', e.EventCode AS 'Type_Protestation', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Mediatique', e.Year FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.AvgTone < -3 AND e.Year >= 2020 ORDER BY e.Year DESC, e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant le plus d'événements de conflit en Afrique
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NI', 'EG', 'ZA', 'ET', 'DZ', 'AO', 'BF', 'BI', 'BJ', 'BW', 'CD', 'CF', 'CG', 'CI', 'CM', 'CV', 'DJ', 'ER', 'GA', 'GH', 'GM', 'GN', 'GQ', 'GW', 'KE', 'KM', 'LR', 'LS', 'LY', 'MA', 'MG', 'ML', 'MR', 'MU', 'MW', 'MZ', 'NA', 'NE', 'NG', 'RW', 'SC', 'SD', 'SL', 'SN', 'SO', 'SS', 'ST', 'SZ', 'TD', 'TG', 'TN', 'TZ', 'UG', 'ZM', 'ZW') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre moyen d'articles pour les événements diplomatiques
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements où l'acteur principal est un groupe rebelle
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Rebelle', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor1KnownGroupCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation entre le ton des mentions et le ton moyen de l'événement pour les conflits
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Mentions_Moyen', COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 3 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Acteurs civils ciblés par la police avec localisation précise
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Civil', e.Actor2Name AS 'Police', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Action' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Médias avec la plus grande couverture des événements positifs (Goldstein > 5)
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Evenements_Positifs', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Groupes religieux impliqués dans des conflits avec analyse géographique
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND (e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.Actor2Religion1Code, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le nombre de sources et le nombre d'articles
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (NumArticles - NumSources) AS 'Ecart_Articles_Sources' FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0 AND NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY ABS(NumArticles - NumSources) DESC LIMIT 35;

text_query: Distribution des types d'événements pour les organisations internationales
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisation_Internationale', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('IGO', 'NGO', 'UNO') GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY e.Actor1Name, COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Événements avec localisation différente entre acteur et action
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events WHERE Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode != ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Day DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Événements humanitaires avec le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques différentes
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Donateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Beneficiaire', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Conflits ethniques avec analyse de la confiance des mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1EthnicCode AS 'Ethnie_Acteur1', e.Actor2EthnicCode AS 'Ethnie_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Conflit', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Mentions_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2EthnicCode IS NOT NULL) AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1EthnicCode, e.Actor2EthnicCode, e.EventCode ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 35;

text_query: Événements racines vs non-racines : comparaison de la couverture médiatique
sql_query: SELECT IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', AVG(NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes', AVG(NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events GROUP BY IsRootEvent ORDER BY IsRootEvent DESC;

text_query: Acteurs militaires intervenant dans des pays différents du leur
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Force_Militaire', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Origine', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Intervention', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Action', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Événements avec des codes CAMEO à trois chiffres et leur impact médiatique
sql_query: SELECT EventCode AS 'Code_CAMEO_Complet', EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Racine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events WHERE LENGTH(EventCode) = 3 GROUP BY EventCode, EventRootCode ORDER BY AVG(NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements diplomatiques entre gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal avec des civils, avec le score Goldstein moyen.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Gouvernement', e.Actor2Name AS 'Non_Gouvernement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('OPP', 'MED', 'CVL') GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Répartition des types d'acteurs (gouvernement, militaire, civil, etc.) impliqués dans des menaces (catégorie 13).
sql_query: SELECT ActorType, SUM(Count) AS 'Nombre_Menaces_Emises' FROM ( SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS ActorType, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code UNION ALL SELECT e.Actor2Type1Code AS ActorType, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ) combined GROUP BY ActorType ORDER BY SUM(Count) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des articles le mentionnant.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le nombre d'articles pour les événements de conflit matériel.
sql_query: SELECT e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Nombre_Articles_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.NumSources ORDER BY e.NumSources;

text_query: Médias (sources) ayant la confiance algorithmique moyenne la plus élevée pour les reportages sur les manifestations.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Manifestations_Couvertes' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de type 'Assaut' (182) avec localisation géographique précise (ville), et le média qui en a parlé en premier.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precise', MIN(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Premiere_Mention', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Premiere' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventCode = '182' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname ORDER BY MIN(m.MentionTimeDate) LIMIT 50;

text_query: Groupes ethniques ou religieux les plus fréquemment mentionnés comme acteurs dans des événements de violence de masse.
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1EthnicCode, e.Actor1Religion1Code) AS 'Groupe', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Implications' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('14', '17', '18', '19') AND (e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY COALESCE(e.Actor1EthnicCode, e.Actor1Religion1Code) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) ayant généré le plus de mentions de type 'WEB' dans l'heure suivant l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_WEB_1h' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND m.MentionType = 1 AND (m.MentionTimeDate - e.DATEADDED) <= 10000 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique (NumArticles > 50) mais un ton moyen très négatif (AvgTone < -10).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 50 AND e.AvgTone < -10 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Sources qui citent le plus fréquemment des événements impliquant la police et des civils.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Police_Civils' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition géographique (par continent approximatif) des événements de coopération diplomatique de haut niveau (code 040).
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX') THEN 'Amérique du Nord' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('BR', 'AR', 'CL') THEN 'Amérique du Sud' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB', 'RU') THEN 'Europe' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN', 'JP', 'IN') THEN 'Asie' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG', 'ZA', 'EG') THEN 'Afrique' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Continent', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations_Diplomatiques' FROM events e WHERE e.EventCode = '040' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Continent ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass=4) avec plus de 50 mentions, classés par tonalité moyenne la plus négative
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.AvgTone AS Tonalite_Moyenne, e.NumMentions AS Nombre_Mentions, e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2 FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.NumMentions > 50 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays où les événements impliquant la police (COP) comme acteur 2 ont la plus forte intensité de couverture médiatique
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, AVG(e.NumMentions) AS Mentions_Moyennes, AVG(e.NumSources) AS Sources_Moyennes, COUNT(*) AS Total_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources médiatiques ayant couvert le plus d'événements avec un score Goldstein supérieur à 5
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Evenements_Couverts FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de tonalité entre l'événement principal et la moyenne des mentions pour les événements avec plus de 5 mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.AvgTone AS Tonalite_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Tonalite_Mentions_Moyenne, (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Difference_Tonalite FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pays acteur 1 dont les événements ont la plus grande variance de score Goldstein (indicateur de comportement imprévisible)
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen, (MAX(GoldsteinScale) - MIN(GoldsteinScale)) AS Etendue_Goldstein FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 50 ORDER BY (MAX(GoldsteinScale) - MIN(GoldsteinScale)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre d'articles et le nombre de sources pour les événements de conflit (QuadClass >= 3)
sql_query: SELECT AVG(NumArticles * 1.0 / NumSources) AS Ratio_Articles_Par_Source FROM events WHERE QuadClass >= 3 AND NumSources > 0 AND NumArticles > 0;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont de pays différents mais partagent le même code de religion
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, e.Actor1Religion1Code AS Religion_Commune, e.EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code = e.Actor2Religion1Code LIMIT 30;

text_query: Heure de la journée (basée sur MentionTimeDate) où les mentions d'événements négatifs (AvgTone < -5) sont les plus fréquentes
sql_query: SELECT CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS INT) AS Heure_UTC, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions_Negatives FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS INT) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre de sources (couverture médiatique concentrée)
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, NumMentions AS Mentions, NumSources AS Sources, (NumMentions * 1.0 / NumSources) AS Ratio_Mentions_Par_Source FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0 ORDER BY (NumMentions * 1.0 / NumSources) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs de type 'MEDIA' (MED) comme acteur 1, et tonalité moyenne des événements qu'ils rapportent
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS Media, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Tonalite_Moyenne_Rapportee, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements_Rapportes FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mentions dont le ton du document est significativement plus positif que le ton moyen de l'événement (différence > 10)
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, m.MentionDocTone AS Tonalite_Document, e.AvgTone AS Tonalite_Evenement, (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS Difference_Positive FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) > 10 ORDER BY (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays où les événements ont la plus haute confiance moyenne des mentions (indicateur de fiabilité des données)
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) >= 20 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) avec code d'événement spécifique '182' (agression physique) et localisation urbaine
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.Actor1Name AS Agresseur, e.Actor2Name AS Victime, e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS Ville, e.NumMentions AS Couverture_Mediatique FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.EventCode = '182' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec incohérence entre le score Goldstein et le ton moyen (coopération avec ton négatif).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', ABS(e.GoldsteinScale - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference' FROM events e WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 3 AND e.AvgTone < 0 AND e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Menaces militaires proférées par des acteurs étatiques avec localisation précise.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Consultations diplomatiques avec médiation par une organisation internationale.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Organisation_Mediatrice', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Partie1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Partie2', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'IGO') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec divergence entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 AND COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs religieux impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Autre_Acteur', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND (e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) AND (e.Actor1Religion1Code IN ('CHR', 'MOS', 'BUD', 'HIN', 'JEW') OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IN ('CHR', 'MOS', 'BUD', 'HIN', 'JEW')) ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Protestations avec utilisation de la force par la police et couverture internationale.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Evenement', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources_Internationales', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.NumSources >= 1 AND e.AvgTone < 5 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec localisations différentes pour l'acteur et l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Négociations commerciales avec ton neutre et multiples rounds de mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Negociateur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Negociateur2', COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Temporelles', AVG(ABS(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ton_Absolu_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('03', '04', '05') AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('BUS', 'GOV', 'IGO') AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('BUS', 'GOV', 'IGO') AND ABS(e.AvgTone) < 5 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec augmentation du ton entre la première et la dernière mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', MIN(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Premiere_Mention', MAX(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Derniere_Mention', (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Evolution_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 1 AND (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) > 10 ORDER BY (MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources qui ont couvert des événements de protestation impliquant des civils, avec la confiance moyenne de leurs mentions.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'OPP') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où se sont produits des événements avec un score Goldstein très négatif (< -5) et un ton moyen des articles très bas (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.GoldsteinScale < -5 AND e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mois de l'année avec le plus grand nombre d'événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) impliquant des groupes rebelles.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL')) GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Différence de ton entre l'événement principal et la moyenne des mentions pour les événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) >= 3 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec des acteurs non-gouvernementaux.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Gouvernement', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code != 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre d'articles et le nombre de mentions pour les événements de haute intensité (Goldstein > 7 ou < -7).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Articles' FROM events e WHERE (e.GoldsteinScale > 7 OR e.GoldsteinScale < -7) AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du ton moyen des événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) entre pays européens.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP') GROUP BY e.MonthYear HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY e.MonthYear LIMIT 24;

text_query: Sources qui couvrent à la fois des événements gouvernementaux et des événements civils, avec leur confiance moyenne distincte.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', SUM(CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Gouvernementaux', SUM(CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Civils', AVG(CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' THEN m.Confidence END) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Gouv', AVG(CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' THEN m.Confidence END) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Civils' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'CVL') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont de pays différents mais du même type (ex: deux gouvernements), avec le détail de l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1Type1Code = e.Actor2Type1Code AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions d'événements de type 'Investigation' (EventRootCode '09') dont la longueur du document est supérieure à la moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionIdentifier AS 'Identifiant_Mention', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '09' AND m.MentionDocLen > (SELECT AVG(MentionDocLen) FROM mentions) ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays actifs diplomatiquement (plus de 50 événements de racine '04' ou '05') avec le ton moyen de ces événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Journées avec le plus grand écart entre le ton le plus positif et le ton le plus négatif des événements enregistrés.
sql_query: SELECT e.Day AS 'Date', MIN(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Minimum', MAX(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Maximum', (MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e GROUP BY e.Day HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY (MAX(e.AvgTone) - MIN(e.AvgTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de menace (EventRootCode '13') où la confiance des mentions est faible (< 50) mais le nombre d'articles est élevé (> 10).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode, e.NumArticles, e.AvgTone HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) < 50 AND e.NumArticles > 10 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Paires de pays (Acteur1, Acteur2) ayant le plus d'interactions conflictuelles (QuadClass 3 ou 4) avec un ton moyen négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interactions_Conflictuelles', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 AND AVG(e.AvgTone) < 0 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec localisation géographique précise (Geo_Type >= 3) et dont les mentions proviennent de sources multiples (plus de 2).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precis', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Geolocalisation', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Differentes', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.ActionGeo_Type HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de protestation (code racine 14) en Afrique, avec le nombre total d'articles et le ton moyen des mentions associées.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG', 'ZA', 'EG', 'KE', 'ET', 'GH', 'TZ', 'CI', 'MG', 'CM', 'NE', 'BF', 'ML', 'MW', 'ZM', 'AO', 'ZW', 'SN', 'TD', 'SD', 'SO', 'CF', 'RW', 'BI', 'TG', 'SL', 'LY', 'CG', 'CD', 'UG', 'ER', 'DJ', 'SS', 'GM', 'GW', 'LR', 'MR', 'SC', 'CV', 'KM', 'ST', 'SZ', 'LS', 'BW', 'NA', 'MU', 'RE', 'YT') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC;

text_query: Différence de ton entre l'événement principal et ses mentions pour les événements de coopération diplomatique (code 05).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique (plus de 50 mentions) mais un ton moyen très négatif (inférieur à -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND e.AvgTone < -5 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC, e.NumMentions DESC;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent à la fois des événements impliquant les États-Unis et la Chine.
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media' FROM mentions m JOIN events e1 ON m.GlobalEventID = e1.GlobalEventID JOIN events e2 ON m.GlobalEventID = e2.GlobalEventID WHERE (e1.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' OR e1.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA') AND (e2.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' OR e2.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') ORDER BY m.MentionSourceName;

text_query: Mentions dont le ton du document est significativement plus positif (différence > 3) que le ton moyen de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Ecart_Positif' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) > 3 ORDER BY Ecart_Positif DESC;

text_query: Événements de type militaire (QuadClass 4) où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont de pays différents, avec l'échelle de Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) avec une localisation géographique précise (type 3,4,5) et plus de 10 articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Precis', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Localisation', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3,4,5) AND e.NumArticles > 10 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux européens impliqués dans des événements de coopération (QuadClass 1 ou 2) avec des pays d'Asie.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Europeen', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Asiatique', e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Cooperation', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1,2) AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('FRA','DEU','GBR','ITA','ESP') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('CHN','IND','JPN','PAK','IRN') UNION SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor2Name, e.Actor1Name, e.QuadClass, e.GoldsteinScale FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1,2) AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('FRA','DEU','GBR','ITA','ESP') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('CHN','IND','JPN','PAK','IRN') ORDER BY GoldsteinScale DESC;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre de mentions anormalement élevé par rapport au nombre d'articles (ratio > 2).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (CAST(e.NumMentions AS REAL) / e.NumArticles) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 AND (CAST(e.NumMentions AS REAL) / e.NumArticles) > 2 ORDER BY Ratio_Mentions_Articles DESC;

text_query: Mentions à faible confiance (inférieure à 50) pour des événements de haute intensité (codes 182, 193, 195, 202).
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance_Mention', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence < 50 AND e.EventCode IN ('182','193','195','202') ORDER BY m.Confidence ASC;

text_query: Mentions du même événement provenant de sources différentes, avec une grande variation de ton (écart-type approximatif).
sql_query: WITH TonParSource AS ( SELECT m.GlobalEventID, m.MentionSourceName, m.MentionDocTone FROM mentions m WHERE m.GlobalEventID IN (SELECT GlobalEventID FROM mentions GROUP BY GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT MentionSourceName) > 2) ) SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources', MAX(MentionDocTone) - MIN(MentionDocTone) AS 'Ecart_Ton_Max', AVG(MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Sources' FROM TonParSource GROUP BY GlobalEventID HAVING (MAX(MentionDocTone) - MIN(MentionDocTone)) > 10 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton_Max DESC;

text_query: Événements avec une localisation géographique contradictoire entre l'acteur 1 et le lieu de l'action (pays différents).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Nombre d'événements par type d'acteur 1 et par année, pour les 5 types les plus fréquents depuis 2015.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, Year AS Annee, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Year >= 2015 AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code, Year HAVING Actor1Type1Code IN (SELECT Actor1Type1Code FROM events WHERE Year >= 2015 AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5) ORDER BY Annee DESC, Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Acteurs 1 (pays) ayant été impliqués dans à la fois des événements de coopération (QuadClass 1 ou 2) et des événements de conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4) la même année.
sql_query: SELECT e1.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, e1.Year AS Annee FROM events e1 INNER JOIN events e2 ON e1.Actor1CountryCode = e2.Actor1CountryCode AND e1.Year = e2.Year WHERE e1.QuadClass IN (1, 2) AND e2.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e1.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e1.Actor1CountryCode, e1.Year ORDER BY Annee DESC, Pays_Acteur1;

text_query: Événements avec une différence de plus de 24 heures entre la date de l'événement et la date d'ajout dans la base (DATEADDED).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Day AS Date_Evenement, DATEADDED AS Date_Ajout, (julianday(substr(DATEADDED, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(DATEADDED, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(DATEADDED, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(Day, 7, 2))) AS Difference_Jours FROM events WHERE Difference_Jours > 1 ORDER BY Difference_Jours DESC;

text_query: Sources de mentions (MentionSourceName) qui ont couvert des événements avec une tonalité moyenne inférieure à -5 (très négative) et une confiance supérieure à 80.
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName AS Source_Mention FROM mentions m INNER JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 AND m.Confidence > 80 ORDER BY Source_Mention;

text_query: Moyenne du score de Goldstein par mois pour les interactions entre gouvernements (Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' et Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV').
sql_query: SELECT MonthYear AS Mois_Annee, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND GoldsteinScale IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MonthYear ORDER BY Mois_Annee DESC;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont du même pays mais de types différents (par exemple, gouvernement vs civil).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor1Name AS Acteur1, Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, Actor2Name AS Acteur2, Actor2Type1Code AS Type_Acteur2, EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode = Actor2CountryCode AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Type1Code != Actor2Type1Code LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays (Actor1CountryCode) avec la plus grande variation de tonalité moyenne (écart entre le maximum et le minimum) pour leurs événements en 2022.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, MAX(AvgTone) - MIN(AvgTone) AS Variation_Tonalite FROM events WHERE Year = 2022 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Variation_Tonalite DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs 2 les plus fréquemment associés à un acteur 1 donné (par exemple, 'USA') dans des événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass = 2).
sql_query: SELECT Actor2Name AS Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Interactions FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND QuadClass = 2 AND Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor2Name ORDER BY Nombre_Interactions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions (NumMentions) et la tonalité moyenne (AvgTone) pour les événements de type 'Appeal' (EventRootCode = '02').
sql_query: SELECT (SUM(NumMentions * AvgTone) - SUM(NumMentions) * SUM(AvgTone) / COUNT(*)) / (COUNT(*) * 1.0) AS Correlation_Approx FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '02' AND NumMentions IS NOT NULL AND AvgTone IS NOT NULL;

text_query: Événements où la localisation de l'action (ActionGeo) est différente du pays de l'acteur 1 et de l'acteur 2.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Lieu FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode != Actor1CountryCode AND ActionGeo_CountryCode != Actor2CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Top 5 des codes d'événement de base (EventBaseCode) les plus négatifs (AvgTone le plus bas) parmi ceux ayant au moins 100 occurrences.
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS Code_Evenement_Base, AVG(AvgTone) AS Tonalite_Moyenne, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Occurrences FROM events GROUP BY EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100 ORDER BY Tonalite_Moyenne ASC LIMIT 5;

text_query: Répartition du nombre d'événements par tranche de score de Goldstein (par exemple, -10 à -5, -5 à 0, etc.) pour l'année 2023.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN GoldsteinScale < -5 THEN '-10 à -5' WHEN GoldsteinScale < 0 THEN '-5 à 0' WHEN GoldsteinScale < 5 THEN '0 à 5' ELSE '5 à 10' END AS Tranche_Goldstein, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Year = 2023 AND GoldsteinScale IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Tranche_Goldstein ORDER BY Tranche_Goldstein;

text_query: Événements avec un très haut niveau de confiance des mentions (Confidence = 100) mais une tonalité moyenne des documents de mention (MentionDocTone) très éloignée de la AvgTone de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.AvgTone AS Tonalite_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Tonalite_Mention_Moyenne, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Difference_Tonalite FROM events e INNER JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence = 100 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY Difference_Tonalite DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec le ton moyen le plus négatif impliquant des gouvernements, avec leur pays et nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus fréquemment impliqués dans des événements avec un score Goldstein supérieur à 5.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.GoldsteinScale > 5 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le ton des articles et le score Goldstein pour les événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.GoldsteinScale IS NOT NULL AND e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Distribution géographique des événements de conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) par pays d'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Différence de ton moyen entre les mentions d'un même événement provenant de différentes sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Global' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 1 ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID, m.MentionSourceName LIMIT 40;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) AS 'Ecart' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 0 AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (ONG, entreprises) impliqués dans des événements de fourniture d'aide.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Bénéficiaire', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'BUS', 'EDU', 'MED') ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Mois avec le plus d'événements de menace militaire impliquant des acteurs étatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND (e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'REB') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'REB')) GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Événements où les deux acteurs ont des affiliations religieuses différentes documentées.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code != e.Actor2Religion1Code ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Sources de presse avec la couverture la plus fréquente des événements en Afrique.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Presse', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG', 'ZA', 'ET', 'EG', 'KE') OR e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('NGA', 'ZAF', 'ETH', 'EGY', 'KEN') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de violence massive avec localisation précise (niveau ville) et nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '20' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Relation entre la confiance des mentions et le ton du document pour les événements complexes.
sql_query: SELECT m.Confidence AS 'Confiance_Mention', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumSources > 3 GROUP BY m.Confidence ORDER BY m.Confidence DESC;

text_query: Acteurs rebelles les plus actifs dans des événements matériellement conflictuels.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Rebelle', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' AND e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec une couverture médiatique disproportionnée par rapport à leur importance (Goldstein faible).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.GoldsteinScale BETWEEN -5 AND 5 AND e.NumMentions > 50 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Distribution des types d'acteurs secondaires dans les événements de consultation diplomatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Secondaire', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 5 mentions et ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '06' AND e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.NumMentions > 5 AND e.AvgTone > 0 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources couvrant le plus d'événements de protestation impliquant des civils.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays avec le ton moyen le plus négatif pour les événements de conflit matériel.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements de menace avec plus de 3 sources différentes et haute confiance des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur2', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.NumSources > 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.NumSources HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 50 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Distribution des types d'acteurs principaux dans les événements de fourniture d'aide.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Echelle_Goldstein_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements couverts par plus d'un type de source média (web, citation, TV).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources_Distinctes', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays où les événements entre gouvernement et rebelles ont le ton le plus extrême (positif ou négatif).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', MAX(ABS(e.AvgTone)) AS 'Ton_Absolu_Max', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV','MIL','COP','INS') AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('REB','INS','OPP')) AND e.Actor1Type1Code != e.Actor2Type1Code AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY MAX(ABS(e.AvgTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen des événements par code racine.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Articles', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY AVG(e.NumArticles) DESC;

text_query: Acteurs civils les plus mentionnés dans les événements de protestation avec localisation précise (ville).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (1,3,4,5) GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.ActionGeo_Fullname HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY SUM(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources avec la couverture la plus négative (ton moyen des documents) pour les événements militaires.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15','18','19') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle avec un écart important entre le ton de l'événement et celui des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays avec la plus forte proportion d'événements de violence massive par rapport au total des événements.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', SUM(CASE WHEN EventCode LIKE '20%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Violence_Massive', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', (SUM(CASE WHEN EventCode LIKE '20%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS 'Pourcentage_Violence' FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN EventCode LIKE '20%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus actifs dans les événements de consultation diplomatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Echelle_Goldstein_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mentions provenant de documents longs (>3000 caractères) avec un ton fortement négatif (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document' FROM mentions m WHERE m.MentionDocLen > 3000 AND m.MentionDocTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Année avec le plus grand nombre d'événements de coopération impliquant des ONG.
