sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1,2) AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'NGO') GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5;

text_query: Événements racines avec un nombre de mentions anormalement élevé par rapport à leur échelle de Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.NumMentions > (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) * 2 FROM events WHERE IsRootEvent = 1) ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Distribution géographique des types d'événements pour un pays donné (ex: Nigeria) avec résolution administrative.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code AS 'Code_Region', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode = 'NI' AND e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code != 'NI' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code, COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements les plus couverts impliquant des gouvernements et des groupes rebelles, avec le ton moyen des articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où les événements de protestation (code racine 14) sont les plus fréquents, avec le nombre total d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources de presse qui rapportent le plus d'événements avec un ton très négatif (inférieur à -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Presse', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'IGO') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le ton moyen des événements diplomatiques (code racine 04).
sql_query: SELECT e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' GROUP BY e.NumSources ORDER BY e.NumSources;

text_query: Groupes religieux (code religion) impliqués dans des événements de menace (code racine 13), avec l'échelle Goldstein moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Groupe_Religieux', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Religion1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements où la confiance des mentions est élevée (supérieure à 80).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Fiables' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 80 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux ayant le score Goldstein total le plus négatif (conflits) sur l'année 2023.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Gouvernement', SUM(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Total', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Year = 2023 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.GoldsteinScale < 0 GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY SUM(e.GoldsteinScale) LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand écart entre le ton des événements de coopération (QuadClass 1) et de conflit (QuadClass 3).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass = 1 THEN e.AvgTone END) AS 'Ton_Cooperation', AVG(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass = 3 THEN e.AvgTone END) AS 'Ton_Conflit', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1, 3) GROUP BY e.MonthYear HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass = 1 THEN 1 END) > 10 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass = 3 THEN 1 END) > 10 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass = 1 THEN e.AvgTone END) - AVG(CASE WHEN e.QuadClass = 3 THEN e.AvgTone END)) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Sources qui couvrent à la fois des événements impliquant Israël et la Palestine, avec le compte pour chaque pays.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Presse', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.Actor1CountryCode = 'ISR' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'ISR' THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Israel', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.Actor1CountryCode = 'PSE' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'PSE' THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Palestine' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('ISR', 'PSE') OR e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('ISR', 'PSE')) GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.Actor1CountryCode = 'ISR' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'ISR' THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 5 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.Actor1CountryCode = 'PSE' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'PSE' THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 5 ORDER BY m.MentionSourceName;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) ayant généré le plus de mentions dérivées (IsRootEvent = 0) dans la même journée.
sql_query: SELECT e_root.GlobalEventID AS 'Evenement_Racine', COUNT(e_derived.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Derives', SUM(e_derived.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions_Derivees' FROM events e_root JOIN events e_derived ON e_root.Day = e_derived.Day AND e_derived.IsRootEvent = 0 WHERE e_root.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e_root.GlobalEventID ORDER BY COUNT(e_derived.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte dissonance entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions qui le rapportent.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Heure de la journée (basée sur MentionTimeDate) où les événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) sont le plus rapportés.
sql_query: SELECT CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS INTEGER) AS 'Heure_UTC', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND LENGTH(m.MentionTimeDate) >= 10 GROUP BY CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS INTEGER) ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC;

text_query: Acteurs commerciaux (type BUS) impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) avec des gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Commercial', e.Actor2Name AS 'Gouvernement_Partenaire', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND ((e.Actor1Type1Code = 'BUS' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'BUS')) GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements les plus couverts impliquant des groupes rebelles comme acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources rapportant le plus d'événements militaires avec un ton négatif.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19', '20') AND e.AvgTone < 0 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux ayant le plus souvent été cibles de protestations.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Cible_Gouvernementale', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Protestations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'OPP', 'MIL', 'COP') AND e.Actor2Name NOT IN ('PROTESTER', 'MILITARY', 'GOVERNMENT', 'SECURITY FORCE', 'POLICE', 'CIVILIAN') GROUP BY e.Actor2Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre moyen d'articles pour les événements de coopération diplomatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Sources avec la plus grande divergence de ton entre l'événement et leurs mentions.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', AVG(ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mois avec la plus forte concentration d'événements de conflit matériel en Afrique.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NI', 'EG', 'ZA', 'ET', 'DZ', 'NG', 'KE', 'GH', 'CI', 'TN', 'MA', 'SD', 'TZ', 'UG', 'CM', 'ML', 'BF', 'ZW', 'AO', 'MZ') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Événements où le pays de l'acteur principal ne correspond pas au pays du lieu d'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode <> e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Médias rapportant le plus d'événements avec une confiance d'extraction faible.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Faible_Confiance' FROM mentions m WHERE m.Confidence < 50 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs ayant le score Goldstein moyen le plus élevé pour leurs actions coopératives.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 0 GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de protestation avec le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisateur_Protestation', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition des types d'événements pour les acteurs de type 'Média'.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Occurrences' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED' GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Pays avec le ton moyen le plus négatif pour les événements impliquant la police.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'COP' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements ayant généré des mentions sur une longue période (écart de dates important).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', MIN(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Premiere_Mention', MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Derniere_Mention', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionTimeDate) AS 'Nombre_Jours_Couverture' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionTimeDate) > 1 ORDER BY (MAX(m.MentionTimeDate) - MIN(m.MentionTimeDate)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs d'élite impliqués dans des événements de consultation (code 04).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Elite', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Consultations' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'ELI' AND e.EventRootCode = '04' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources qui couvrent principalement des événements avec un acteur spécifique (ex: USA).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_USA' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec une forte dissonance entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) AS 'Ecart' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 0 AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Combinaisons d'acteurs (paires) les plus fréquentes dans les événements de menace.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Nombre d'événements par type d'acteur principal et par année
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS Annee, e.Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Year, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY e.Year DESC, Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Événements avec le ton moyen le plus négatif par pays d'action
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, e.EventRootCode AS Categorie_Evenement, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources de mentions les plus actives pour les événements de conflit matériel
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements_Couverts FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Couverts DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du volume d'articles pour les événements impliquant des gouvernements
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS Mois, SUM(e.NumArticles) AS Total_Articles FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Pays où les événements de protestation (EventRootCode 14) sont les plus couverts
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, SUM(e.NumMentions) AS Total_Mentions, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Total_Mentions DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le ton moyen des événements diplomatiques
sql_query: SELECT e.NumSources AS Nombre_Sources, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '06') GROUP BY e.NumSources HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY e.NumSources;

text_query: Acteurs les plus fréquemment en conflit avec la police
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS Acteur, e.Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Conflits FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Name != '' AND e.Actor1Type1Code != 'COP' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Distribution géographique des mentions pour les événements à haute intensité (GoldsteinScale < -5)
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS Nombre_Mentions, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -5 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand nombre d'événements de coopération matérielle par région
sql_query: WITH RegionalEvents AS (SELECT e.MonthYear, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, COUNT(*) AS EventCount FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 GROUP BY e.MonthYear, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode), RegionAgg AS (SELECT re.MonthYear, CASE WHEN re.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US','CA','MX') THEN 'North America' WHEN re.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('BR','AR','CL') THEN 'South America' WHEN re.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('GB','FR','DE','IT','ES') THEN 'Europe' WHEN re.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN','JP','KR','IN') THEN 'Asia' WHEN re.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG','ZA','EG') THEN 'Africa' WHEN re.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('AU','NZ') THEN 'Oceania' ELSE 'Other' END AS Region, SUM(re.EventCount) AS TotalEvents FROM RegionalEvents re GROUP BY re.MonthYear, Region), RankedRegions AS (SELECT ra.MonthYear, ra.Region, ra.TotalEvents, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ra.Region ORDER BY ra.TotalEvents DESC) AS rn FROM RegionAgg ra) SELECT MonthYear AS Mois, Region AS Région, TotalEvents AS Nombre_Evenements FROM RankedRegions WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY TotalEvents DESC;

text_query: Différence de ton entre les mentions et le ton moyen de l'événement pour les événements racines
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Mention_Moyen, (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS Difference_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus actifs dans la diplomatie (EventRootCode 04 ou 05)
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Actions_Diplomatiques FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05') AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Actions_Diplomatiques DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec un écart important entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.NumMentions, e.NumArticles, (e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) AS Ecart, e.AvgTone FROM events e WHERE ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) > 50 ORDER BY Ecart DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources qui rapportent le plus d'événements avec un ton très positif (> 10)
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements_Positifs FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone > 10 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Positifs DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Répartition des événements de menace (EventRootCode 13) par type d'acteur secondaire
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Type1Code AS Type_Acteur_Recepteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Menaces, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS Impact_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Menaces DESC;

text_query: Événements localisés dans des capitales (Actor1Geo_Fullname contenant 'Washington', 'London', etc.)
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_Fullname AS Lieu, e.EventRootCode AS Categorie, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_Fullname LIKE '%Washington%' OR e.Actor1Geo_Fullname LIKE '%London%' OR e.Actor1Geo_Fullname LIKE '%Paris%' OR e.Actor1Geo_Fullname LIKE '%Beijing%' GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_Fullname, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Confiance moyenne des mentions par type d'événement et par année
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS Annee, e.EventRootCode AS Categorie, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.Year, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 5 ORDER BY e.Year DESC, Confiance_Moyenne DESC;

text_query: Pays où les événements ont le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques différentes
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS Nombre_Sources_Uniques, AVG(e.NumSources) AS Moyenne_Sources_Par_Evenement FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY Nombre_Sources_Uniques DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements impliquant des groupes connus (Al-Qaeda, Taliban) avec leur couverture médiatique
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS Groupe, e.EventRootCode AS Categorie, SUM(e.NumMentions) AS Total_Mentions, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') GROUP BY e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Total_Mentions DESC;

text_query: Variation du ton moyen des événements par jour pour un pays donné (ex: USA)
sql_query: SELECT e.FractionDate AS Date, AVG(e.AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Journalier, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA' GROUP BY e.FractionDate HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY e.FractionDate DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pour chaque type d'acteur 1, calcule le nombre moyen d'articles et le ton moyen des événements, en excluant les types vides.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, AVG(NumArticles) AS Nombre_Moyen_Articles, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Type1Code != '' GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Moyen_Articles DESC;

text_query: Top 10 des pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements, avec le nombre d'événements et le score Goldstein moyen.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pour chaque année, compte le nombre d'événements de chaque classe Quad (1 à 4).
sql_query: SELECT Year AS Annee, QuadClass AS Classe_Quad, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events GROUP BY Year, QuadClass ORDER BY Year, QuadClass;

text_query: Liste les 15 événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des documents qui en parlent.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Documents, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Top 5 des combinaisons Acteur1-Type et Acteur2-Type les plus fréquentes dans les événements de conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, Actor2Type1Code AS Type_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Occurrences FROM events WHERE QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code, Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Occurrences DESC LIMIT 5;

text_query: Pour chaque code racine d'événement (EventRootCode), calcule le nombre d'événements, le score Goldstein moyen et le ton moyen.
sql_query: SELECT EventRootCode AS Code_Racine_Evenement, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events GROUP BY EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Liste les 10 sources d'information qui couvrent le plus grand nombre d'événements distincts, avec le nombre d'événements et le ton moyen des documents.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source_Information, COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements_Couverts, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Documents FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Couverts DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pour chaque pays de l'acteur 1, calcule le pourcentage d'événements qui sont des déclarations publiques (EventRootCode = '01').
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Total_Evenements, SUM(CASE WHEN EventRootCode = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Declarations_Publiques, (SUM(CASE WHEN EventRootCode = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS Pourcentage_Declarations FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING Total_Evenements > 10 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Declarations DESC;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre moyen de mentions par événement pour les événements impliquant des gouvernements (Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV').
sql_query: SELECT MonthYear AS Mois, AVG(NumMentions) AS Moyenne_Mentions FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY MonthYear ORDER BY Mois;

text_query: Top 10 des événements avec le plus grand nombre de sources différentes les couvrant, avec les noms des acteurs et le code de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.Actor1Name AS Nom_Acteur1, e.Actor2Name AS Nom_Acteur2, e.EventCode AS Code_Evenement, COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS Nombre_Sources_Distinctes FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.EventCode ORDER BY Nombre_Sources_Distinctes DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le score Goldstein et le ton moyen (AvgTone) par groupe de 100 événements, triés par Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT Groupe, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM (SELECT GoldsteinScale, AvgTone, (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY GoldsteinScale) - 1) / 100 AS Groupe FROM events WHERE GoldsteinScale IS NOT NULL AND AvgTone IS NOT NULL) sub GROUP BY Groupe ORDER BY Goldstein_Moyen;

text_query: Pour chaque pays d'action géographique, liste le type d'événement le plus fréquent (EventRootCode) et son nombre d'occurrences.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays, EventRootCode AS Code_Evenement_Plus_Frequent, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Occurrences FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode, EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events e2 WHERE e2.ActionGeo_CountryCode = events.ActionGeo_CountryCode GROUP BY e2.EventRootCode)) ORDER BY Pays;

text_query: Top 5 des paires de pays (Acteur1 et Acteur2) avec le plus d'événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass = 2).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Cooperations FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 2 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode, Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Cooperations DESC LIMIT 5;

text_query: Répartition des événements par type de géographie de l'acteur 1 (Actor1Geo_Type), avec le nombre d'événements et le ton moyen.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Geo_Type AS Type_Geographie, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE Actor1Geo_Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Geo_Type ORDER BY Type_Geographie;

text_query: Top 10 des codes d'événement de base (EventBaseCode) avec le ton moyen le plus négatif, pour les événements ayant au moins 5 occurrences.
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS Code_Evenement_Base, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Occurrences FROM events GROUP BY EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pour chaque groupe connu (Actor1KnownGroupCode), calcule le nombre total d'articles et le nombre moyen de mentions par événement.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1KnownGroupCode AS Groupe_Connu, SUM(NumArticles) AS Total_Articles, AVG(NumMentions) AS Moyenne_Mentions FROM events WHERE Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1KnownGroupCode != '' GROUP BY Actor1KnownGroupCode ORDER BY Total_Articles DESC;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont du même pays, avec le type d'événement et le nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, EventRootCode AS Type_Evenement, NumSources AS Nombre_Sources FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode = Actor2CountryCode AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY NumSources DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de protestation impliquant des civils, classés par pays et ton moyen.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Protestations, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '14' AND Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Protestations DESC;

text_query: Sources médiatiques mentionnant le plus d'événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT MentionSourceName AS Source_Media, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND MentionSourceName IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements militaires impliquant les États-Unis ou la Russie.
sql_query: SELECT MonthYear AS Mois_Annee, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements_Militaires FROM events WHERE EventRootCode IN ('15','18','19','20') AND (Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA','RUS') OR Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA','RUS')) GROUP BY MonthYear ORDER BY Mois_Annee;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements de coopération matérielle, avec score Goldstein moyen.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Cooperations, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 2 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Cooperations DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de mentions et le ton moyen des articles pour les événements de conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.NumMentions AS Nombre_Mentions, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Articles FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumMentions, e.AvgTone ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Régions géographiques (pays) avec la plus forte concentration d'événements de menace.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Lieu_Action, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Menaces FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '13' AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Menaces DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mois avec le ton moyen le plus négatif pour les événements impliquant des civils.
sql_query: SELECT MonthYear AS Mois_Annee, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Negatif FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' OR Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' GROUP BY MonthYear ORDER BY Ton_Moyen_Negatif ASC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Différence de ton entre événements racines et leurs mentions dans les médias.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Mentions, (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS Difference_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode, e.AvgTone ORDER BY ABS(Difference_Ton) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Types d'acteurs (Acteur 2) les plus ciblés dans les événements d'assaut physique.
sql_query: SELECT Actor2Type1Code AS Type_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Assauts FROM events WHERE EventCode = '182' AND Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Assauts DESC;

text_query: Événements avec aide économique, classés par pays bénéficiaire et ton médiatique.
sql_query: SELECT Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Beneficiaire, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Aides_Economiques, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE EventCode = '071' AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Aides_Economiques DESC;

text_query: Sources d'information avec la plus haute confiance moyenne pour les événements de protestation.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays actifs dans la diplomatie (plus de 50 événements) avec score Goldstein positif moyen.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '05' AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY Score_Goldstein_Moyen DESC;

text_query: Événements de conflit matériel avec localisation différente entre acteur et action.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, e.EventCode FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID LIMIT 40;

text_query: Mentions d'événements par type de média et heure de la journée.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS Type_Media, CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS INTEGER) AS Heure, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.MentionType, Heure ORDER BY Type_Media, Heure;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (ONG, entreprises) avec le plus d'événements de coopération.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur, Actor1Name AS Nom_Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Cooperations FROM events WHERE QuadClass IN (1,2) AND Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO','BUS','EDU','MED') GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code, Actor1Name ORDER BY Nombre_Cooperations DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements racines vs non-racines : comparaison du nombre de sources et du ton.
sql_query: SELECT IsRootEvent AS Est_Evenement_Racine, AVG(NumSources) AS Nombre_Moyen_Sources, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Total_Evenements FROM events GROUP BY IsRootEvent;

text_query: Pays avec le ratio le plus élevé d'événements de conflit verbal par rapport au total.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays, SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Conflits_Verbaux, COUNT(*) AS Total_Evenements, (SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) AS Ratio_Conflit_Verbal FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 100 ORDER BY Ratio_Conflit_Verbal DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Trajectoire mensuelle du score Goldstein pour les relations bilatérales entre deux pays.
sql_query: SELECT MonthYear AS Mois_Annee, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Score_Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE (Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') OR (Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' AND Actor2CountryCode = 'USA') GROUP BY MonthYear ORDER BY Mois_Annee;

text_query: Sources médiatiques les plus citées pour les événements de protestation (EventRootCode 14) avec ton très négatif (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenements' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec des acteurs civils, par pays.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Gouvernement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles pour les événements militaires (EventRootCode 15-20).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '16', '17', '18', '19', '20') AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements de fourniture d'aide (EventRootCode 07) où le donateur et le bénéficiaire sont de régions différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Donateur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Beneficiaire', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Aide', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND ((e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CAN', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU') AND e.Actor2CountryCode NOT IN ('USA', 'CAN', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU')) OR (e.Actor1CountryCode NOT IN ('USA', 'CAN', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CAN', 'GBR', 'FRA', 'DEU'))) ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Différence de ton entre l'événement principal et ses mentions pour les événements très médiatisés (NumMentions > 50).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement_Principal', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) >= 3 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec une localisation géographique précise (ville) et un score de confiance des mentions élevé (> 80).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville_Lieu_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.EventRootCode HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements 'racines' (IsRootEvent = 1) qui ont généré un nombre de mentions anormalement élevé par rapport à leur score Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Day AS 'Date_Evenement', GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', (NumMentions * 1.0 / (ABS(GoldsteinScale) + 1)) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Goldstein' FROM events WHERE IsRootEvent = 1 AND NumMentions > 20 ORDER BY (NumMentions * 1.0 / (ABS(GoldsteinScale) + 1)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mentions dont le ton du document est en forte opposition (différence > 10) avec le ton moyen de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) > 10 ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements de type 'investigation' (EventRootCode 09) menés par la police (COP) ou le judiciaire (JUD) en Europe.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Investigateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Nom_Acteur_Investigue', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '09' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('COP', 'JUD') AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB', 'IT', 'ES') ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs économiques (BUS) impliqués dans des disputes (QuadClass 3) avec des gouvernements, par secteur géographique.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA') THEN 'Amérique du Nord' WHEN e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IN ('FR', 'DE', 'GB', 'IT') THEN 'Europe de l''Ouest' WHEN e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IN ('CN', 'JP', 'KR') THEN 'Asie de l''Est' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Region', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Disputes', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'BUS' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Region ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec plusieurs types d'acteurs (Actor1Type2Code rempli) et une couverture médiatique diversifiée (NumSources > 3).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1_Primaire', e.Actor1Type2Code AS 'Type_Acteur1_Secondaire', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2_Primaire', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources_Mediatiques', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type2Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type2Code != '' AND e.NumSources > 3 ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC, e.Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Moyenne du ton des articles par type d'événement pour les conflits matériels
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Evenement_Principal', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC;

text_query: Pays avec le plus d'événements où la police est impliquée comme acteur principal
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Police', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant le plus d'événements militaires avec ton négatif
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18','19','20') AND m.MentionDocTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de mentions et le score Goldstein pour les événements de coopération
sql_query: SELECT e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1,2) AND e.NumMentions > 0 GROUP BY e.GoldsteinScale HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus fréquemment en conflit avec des groupes rebelles
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Gouvernement', e.Actor2KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Rebelle', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ','TAL','BOK','REB') AND e.QuadClass IN (3,4) GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2KnownGroupCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen et le ton des articles individuels
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 3 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition géographique des événements de fourniture d'aide humanitaire
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Donneur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Aides', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Confiance moyenne des mentions selon le type d'acteur principal
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC;

text_query: Impact de la longueur des articles sur le ton pour les événements de protestation
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN m.MentionDocLen < 1000 THEN 'Court' WHEN m.MentionDocLen BETWEEN 1000 AND 3000 THEN 'Moyen' ELSE 'Long' END AS 'Longueur_Article', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY CASE WHEN m.MentionDocLen < 1000 THEN 'Court' WHEN m.MentionDocLen BETWEEN 1000 AND 3000 THEN 'Moyen' ELSE 'Long' END ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone);

text_query: Pays médiateurs les plus actifs dans les événements de consultation diplomatique
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Mediateur', COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2CountryCode) AS 'Nombre_Pays_Impliques', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2CountryCode) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.Actor2CountryCode) DESC;

text_query: Variation du nombre d'articles par événement selon le code CAMEO de base
sql_query: SELECT e.EventBaseCode AS 'Code_Evenement_Base', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens', MIN(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Minimum', MAX(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Maximum', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 GROUP BY e.EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY AVG(e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec localisations géographiques différentes pour les acteurs et l'action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Heure de la journée avec le plus de mentions d'événements pour chaque type de QuadClass
sql_query: WITH MentionHours AS (SELECT e.QuadClass, CAST(SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS INTEGER) AS Heure, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionTimeDate IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(m.MentionTimeDate) >= 10 GROUP BY e.QuadClass, Heure), RankedHours AS (SELECT QuadClass, Heure, Nombre_Mentions, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY QuadClass ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC) AS rnk FROM MentionHours) SELECT QuadClass AS Type_Evenement, Heure, Nombre_Mentions FROM RankedHours WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY QuadClass;

text_query: Événements racines avec la plus grande divergence entre nombre de sources et nombre d'articles
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', ABS(e.NumSources - e.NumArticles) AS 'Divergence', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Evenement_Principal' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.NumSources > 0 AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumSources - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de conflit militaire impliquant la Russie ou l'Ukraine en 2022
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action' FROM events e WHERE e.Year = 2022 AND e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND (e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('RUS', 'UKR') OR e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('RUS', 'UKR')) ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 100;

text_query: Moyenne du ton des articles par type d'événement pour les acteurs gouvernementaux
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) DESC;

text_query: Sources médiatiques mentionnant le plus d'événements avec un ton négatif
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Cooperation_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1Type1Code != 'GOV' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles par événement
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / NULLIF(e.NumArticles, 0)) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 AND e.NumMentions > 0 ORDER BY (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / NULLIF(e.NumArticles, 0)) DESC LIMIT 100;

text_query: Événements avec localisation géographique précise (ville) et ton fortement positif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.AvgTone > 10 ORDER BY e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 100;

text_query: Différence de temps médiane entre l'événement et sa mention dans la presse
sql_query: SELECT AVG(m.MentionTimeDate - m.EventTimeDate) AS 'Delai_Moyen_Secondes' FROM mentions m WHERE m.MentionTimeDate > m.EventTimeDate;

text_query: Pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements impliquant des acteurs religieux
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Types d'acteurs les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3)
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1Type1Code, e.Actor2Type1Code) AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND COALESCE(e.Actor1Type1Code, e.Actor2Type1Code) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY COALESCE(e.Actor1Type1Code, e.Actor2Type1Code) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de menace ou de coercition avec un score Goldstein très négatif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('13', '17') AND e.GoldsteinScale < -5 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 100;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources médiatiques avec un niveau de confiance élevé
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 AND COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition des événements par classe Quad pour les acteurs militaires
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL' GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Acteurs principaux les plus actifs dans les événements de fourniture d'aide
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Aides_Fournies', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre de sources médiatiques supérieur à la moyenne
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumSources > (SELECT AVG(NumSources) FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0) ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 100;

text_query: Mentions d'événements par type de média (WEB, TV, etc.)
sql_query:
SELECT 
    CASE m.MentionType 
        WHEN 1 THEN 'WEB'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'CITATION'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'CORE'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'DTIC'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'JSTOR'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'TV'
        ELSE 'AUTRE'
    END AS 'Type_Média',
    COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions',
    AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne'
FROM mentions m 
GROUP BY m.MentionType 
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Événements impliquant des groupes connus (Al-Qaeda, Taliban, etc.)
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Acteur1', e.Actor2KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 100;

text_query: Ratio d'événements avec localisation géographique complète
sql_query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ActionGeo_Type IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS 'Pourcentage_Localisation_Complete' FROM events;

text_query: Événements de diplomatie entre pays spécifiques avec ton positif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.AvgTone > 0 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'FRA', 'GBR') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'FRA', 'GBR') ORDER BY e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 100;

text_query: Analyse du volume de mentions par heure du jour pour les événements majeurs
sql_query: SELECT SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) AS 'Heure_Jour', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 10 GROUP BY SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2) ORDER BY SUBSTR(m.MentionTimeDate, 9, 2);

text_query: Pays où les événements de protestation ont le ton moyen le plus négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Negatif', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Protestations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand nombre d'événements impliquant des groupes rebelles comme acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Rebelles' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('REB', 'ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent le plus d'événements avec un ton très positif (supérieur à 10).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Positifs' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone > 10 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) avec une intensité Goldstein inférieure à -5 et plus de 50 mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Declencheur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Cible', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Intensite_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.GoldsteinScale < -5 AND e.NumMentions > 50 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Différence de ton moyen entre les événements où la France est acteur principal et ceux où elle est acteur secondaire.
sql_query: SELECT 'Acteur_Principal' AS 'Role_France', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = 'FRA' UNION ALL SELECT 'Acteur_Secondaire' AS 'Role_France', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2CountryCode = 'FRA';

text_query: Types d'acteurs les plus souvent impliqués dans des événements de fourniture d'aide (EventRootCode 07).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Implications' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements avec la plus grande divergence entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Divergence_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays géographiques avec le plus haut ratio d'événements de menace (EventRootCode 13) par rapport au total des événements.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', SUM(CASE WHEN e.EventRootCode = '13' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Nombre_Menaces', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', (SUM(CASE WHEN e.EventRootCode = '13' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) AS 'Ratio_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY Ratio_Menaces DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Année avec le plus grand nombre d'événements de violence de masse (EventRootCode 20) en Afrique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Violences_Masse' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '20' GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux ayant le ton moyen le plus positif dans leurs déclarations publiques (EventRootCode 01).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Positif', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Declarations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '01' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de coopération diplomatique (EventRootCode 05) avec une confiance moyenne des mentions supérieure à 80.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Initiateur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Partenaire', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Groupes ethniques les plus fréquemment mentionnés comme acteur principal dans des événements de conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1EthnicCode AS 'Groupe_Ethnique', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1EthnicCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources web (MentionType 1) avec une longueur de document supérieure à la moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Web', m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionType = 1 AND m.MentionDocLen > (SELECT AVG(MentionDocLen) FROM mentions WHERE MentionType = 1) ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur principal et l'acteur secondaire ont des affiliations religieuses différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Principale', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Secondaire', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code != e.Actor2Religion1Code ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements de réduction des relations (EventRootCode 16) avec plus de 10 articles et un ton moyen négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Reduisant', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Cible', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '16' AND e.NumArticles > 10 AND e.AvgTone < 0 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques ayant la plus grande couverture d'événements impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Internationaux' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'IGO' OR e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'NATO') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles pour les événements de conflit matériel.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Moyenne_Mentions', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles', (SUM((e.NumMentions - avg_m.avg_mentions) * (e.NumArticles - avg_m.avg_articles)) / (COUNT(*) * (SQRT(AVG(POWER(e.NumMentions - avg_m.avg_mentions, 2))) * SQRT(AVG(POWER(e.NumArticles - avg_m.avg_articles, 2)))))) AS 'Correlation_Approx' FROM events e, (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) AS avg_mentions, AVG(NumArticles) AS avg_articles FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4) avg_m WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en conflit avec des civils, avec localisation géographique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Gouvernement', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Civil', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.QuadClass IN (3,4) AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2Name, e.ActionGeo_Fullname ORDER BY Nombre_Conflits DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Articles de presse (mentions) couvrant des événements avec un score Goldstein très négatif (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Article', m.MentionIdentifier AS 'URL_Article', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Article', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -5 AND m.MentionType = 1 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC, m.MentionTimeDate DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Répartition des types d'événements (EventRootCode) pour les interactions Chine-USA.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', CASE WHEN e.EventRootCode IN ('01','02','03','04','05','06','07','08') THEN 'Cooperation' ELSE 'Conflit' END AS 'Categorie', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens' FROM events e WHERE ((e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN')) GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements militaires (EventRootCode 15-20).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Evenements_Militaires_Couverts', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes_Par_Evenement', MIN(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Minimum' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15','16','17','18','19','20') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY Evenements_Militaires_Couverts DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de protestation (code 14) avec localisation précise (ville) et nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Protestation', e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisateur_Protestation', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3,4,5) AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC, e.Day DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Corrélation entre le ton des articles (MentionDocTone) et le score Goldstein des événements.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.GoldsteinScale > 2 THEN 'Fortement_Positif' WHEN e.GoldsteinScale BETWEEN 0 AND 2 THEN 'Legerement_Positif' WHEN e.GoldsteinScale = 0 THEN 'Neutre' WHEN e.GoldsteinScale BETWEEN -2 AND 0 THEN 'Legerement_Negatif' ELSE 'Fortement_Negatif' END AS 'Categorie_Goldstein', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale IS NOT NULL AND m.MentionDocTone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Categorie_Goldstein ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (ONG, entreprises) impliqués dans des événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Partenaire', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO','BUS','EDU','MED') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code, e.Actor2CountryCode, e.EventCode ORDER BY Total_Mentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique (NumMentions > 50) mais un ton moyen neutre (proche de 0).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources_Uniques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND ABS(e.AvgTone) < 2 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.EventCode, e.NumMentions, e.AvgTone, e.GoldsteinScale ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays les plus souvent mentionnés comme lieu d'action (ActionGeo) pour des événements violents (codes 18-20).
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Violents', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', MIN(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Minimum' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18','19','20') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Violents DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements impliquant des acteurs religieux, avec leur affiliation et le type d'interaction.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Religieux', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Affiliation_Religieuse', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Oppose', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IN ('CHR','MOS','JEW','HIN','BUD') ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Mentions d'événements dont la confiance d'extraction est élevée (> 80) et qui concernent des pays européens.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.MentionIdentifier AS 'Identifiant_Article', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance_Extraction', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Article' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 80 AND (e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('FRA','DEU','GBR','ITA','ESP','POL') OR e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('FRA','DEU','GBR','ITA','ESP','POL')) ORDER BY m.Confidence DESC, e.Day DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs étatiques les plus actifs diplomatiquement (EventRootCode 01-05) par année.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Actions_Diplomatiques', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('01','02','03','04','05') AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.Year, e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY e.Year DESC, Nombre_Actions_Diplomatiques DESC;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le ton de l'événement (AvgTone) et le ton des articles (MentionDocTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.Actor1Name, e.EventCode, e.AvgTone, e.NumMentions HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY Difference_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) ayant généré le plus de mentions distinctes par source.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Initiateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Cible', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Mentions_Totales', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources_Distinctes', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.EventCode, e.NumMentions, e.AvgTone ORDER BY Sources_Distinctes DESC, e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pays où les civils sont les plus souvent ciblés dans des événements violents, avec le ton moyen des articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Article' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18','19','20') AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('MIL','COP','REB') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation entre la longueur des articles et le ton des mentions pour les événements impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisation', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Article', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Article', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('IGO','NGO','UNO') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('IGO','NGO','UNO') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Top 15 des villes où se produisent le plus de déclarations publiques de dirigeants gouvernementaux.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Déclarations', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '01' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3,4,5) AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Déclarations DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources qui rapportent à la fois des événements positifs et négatifs impliquant la Russie et les États-Unis.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone > 0 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Positifs', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone < 0 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Negatifs', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('RUS','USA') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('RUS','USA')) AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING Evenements_Positifs > 0 AND Evenements_Negatifs > 0 ORDER BY Total_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements humanitaires (aide) avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement et le ton des articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Donateur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Bénéficiaire', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) > 2 ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent en désaccord (événements de rejet) avec d'autres gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Gouvernement_Initiateur', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Rejets', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('11', '12', '13') AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'OPP', 'MIL') AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'OPP', 'MIL') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Rejets DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de menace militaire avec localisation précise et nombre d'articles par langue de source.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Menacant', e.Actor2Name AS 'Cible', SUBSTR(m.MentionIdentifier, INSTR(m.MentionIdentifier, '://')+3, INSTR(SUBSTR(m.MentionIdentifier, INSTR(m.MentionIdentifier, '://')+3), '/')-1) AS 'Domaine_Source', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.ActionGeo_Type > 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, Domaine_Source ORDER BY e.GlobalEventID, Nombre_Articles DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Groupes ethniques mentionnés dans des événements de violence, avec le pays d'occurrence et la sévérité moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1EthnicCode, e.Actor2EthnicCode) AS 'Groupe_Ethnique', COALESCE(e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode, e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode) AS 'Pays', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Severite_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2EthnicCode IS NOT NULL) AND e.EventRootCode IN ('14','15','16','17','18','19','20') GROUP BY COALESCE(e.Actor1EthnicCode, e.Actor2EthnicCode), COALESCE(e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode, e.Actor2Geo_CountryCode) ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand délai entre la date de l'événement et la date d'ajout dans la base.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.DATEADDED AS 'Date_Ajout', (julianday(substr(e.DATEADDED, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.DATEADDED, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.DATEADDED, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Delai_Jours', e.SOURCEURL AS 'URL_Source' FROM events e WHERE Delai_Jours > 0 ORDER BY Delai_Jours DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Types d'acteurs les plus souvent cibles de protestations dans chaque région géographique.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US','CA','MX') THEN 'Amérique du Nord' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('FR','DE','GB','IT','ES') THEN 'Europe' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('CN','JP','IN') THEN 'Asie' WHEN e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('NG','ZA','EG') THEN 'Afrique' ELSE 'Autre' END AS 'Region', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Cible', COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Protestations', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Couverture_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Region, e.Actor2Type1Code HAVING COUNT(e.GlobalEventID) > 0 ORDER BY Region, Nombre_Protestations DESC;

text_query: Événements de coopération verbale entre médias et gouvernements avec analyse de sentiment détaillée.
