text_query: Événements impliquant des acteurs criminels et des forces de l'ordre, avec localisation en Amérique du Nord ou du Sud.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Criminel', e.Actor2Name AS 'Force_de_Loi', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement_Specifique' FROM events e WHERE ((e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CRM' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('COP', 'MIL')) OR (e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CRM' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('COP', 'MIL'))) AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'CA', 'MX', 'BR', 'AR', 'CO') ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 35;

text_query: Événements de fourniture d'aide (catégorie 07) où le donateur et le bénéficiaire sont de types d'acteurs différents.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Donateur', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Donateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Beneficiaire', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Beneficiaire', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Aide' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1Type1Code != e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements diplomatiques entre gouvernements, avec leur ton moyen.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '06') AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen pour les événements de coopération matérielle.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.NumArticles > 10 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement et le ton des documents les mentionnant.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 3 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements avec un acteur civil et un acteur policier, avec le ton moyen.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Sources qui rapportent à la fois des événements de coopération et de conflit impliquant les États-Unis et la Chine.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Cooperation', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE ((e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA')) GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 0 ORDER BY (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) + COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END)) DESC;

text_query: Analyse du ton des documents en fonction du type de mention pour les événements de haute intensité (GoldsteinScale < -5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) ASC;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (ONG, entreprises) les plus souvent en conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) avec des gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'BUS', 'MED', 'EDU', 'CVL', 'REB') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements ayant à la fois une localisation géographique précise (Geo_Type >= 3) et un haut niveau de confiance des mentions (>80).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.EventRootCode HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Acteurs militaires impliqués dans des événements de posturing militaire (EventRootCode 15) avec localisation géographique.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Militaire', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.Day AS 'Date', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '15' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent = 1) avec le plus grand nombre d'articles mais le moins de mentions, suggérant une couverture approfondie mais limitée.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 AND e.NumArticles > 50 ORDER BY e.NumArticles / (e.NumMentions + 1) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements diplomatiques entre grandes puissances couverts par plusieurs sources
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID', e.Day AS 'Jour', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays2', e.NumSources AS 'Sources_Differentes', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Exemple' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.NumSources >= 2 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de fourniture d'aide avec acteurs gouvernementaux et organisations
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Aide', e.Day AS 'Date_Aide', e.Actor1Name AS 'Donateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Bénéficiaire', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Nombre_Mentions_Uniques' FROM events e LEFT JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('IGO', 'NGO', 'MNC') OR e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WBK', 'IRC')) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name, e.GoldsteinScale HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionIdentifier) > 3 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 18;

text_query: Événements avec incohérence entre ton moyen et score de Goldstein
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Incoherent', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', ABS(e.AvgTone - (e.GoldsteinScale * 2)) AS 'Ecart_Anormal', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e WHERE ABS(e.AvgTone - (e.GoldsteinScale * 2)) > 15 AND e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL AND e.GoldsteinScale IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - (e.GoldsteinScale * 2)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Menaces militaires entre pays avec localisation géographique précise
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Menace', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Menacant', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Menace', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Exact' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('MIL', 'GOV', 'REB') AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'RUS', 'CHN', 'IND') LIMIT 20;

text_query: Collaboration matérielle avec acteurs multiples et forte confiance des mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Collaboration', e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.Actor1Type2Code AS 'SousType_Acteur1', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1Type2Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Type2Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 18;

text_query: Événements de violence massive avec couverture internationale
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Violence', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Groupe_Responsable', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources_Internationales' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '18' AND (m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.com' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.org' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.net' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.co.uk') AND e.Year >= 2020 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Interactions diplomatiques avec médiation par tierce partie
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Mediation', e.Day AS 'Date_Interaction', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Partie_1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Partie_2', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Mediateur', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Positif', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05') AND m.MentionDocTone > -5 AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1KnownGroupCode != '' ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Conflits asymétriques : gouvernement contre groupes non-étatiques
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Conflit_Asymetrique', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Gouvernement', e.Actor2Name AS 'Groupe_Non_Etatique', e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Conflit', e.NumMentions AS 'Mentions_Total', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_General' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('REB', 'INS', 'CRM') AND e.QuadClass = 4 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec divergence entre ton de l'événement et ton des mentions
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Divergence', e.Day AS 'Date', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 22;

text_query: Coopération dans le domaine du renseignement entre alliés
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Renseignement', e.Day AS 'Date_Cooperation', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Source', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Specifique', e.NumSources AS 'Sources_Confirmees' FROM events e WHERE e.EventCode LIKE '06%' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'GBR', 'CAN', 'AUS', 'FRA', 'RUS', 'CHN', 'DEU', 'JPN') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'GBR', 'CAN', 'AUS', 'FRA', 'RUS', 'CHN', 'DEU', 'JPN') AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 18;

text_query: Manifestations avec participation d'organisations politiques et syndicales
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Manifestation', e.Day AS 'Date_Manif', e.Actor1Geo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Organisation', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Organisation', COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) AS 'Couverture_Mediatique' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('14', '12') AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('OPP', 'LAB', 'NGO', 'EDU', 'BUS') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY COUNT(m.MentionIdentifier) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Conflits territoriaux avec revendications historiques et couverture médiatique
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Conflit_Territorial', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Reclamant', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Controleur', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Territoire_Dispute', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('12', '17') AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND m.MentionDocLen > 1000 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocLen) DESC LIMIT 18;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre moyen d'articles pour les événements de protestation.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux les plus fréquemment en conflit avec la police.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code NOT IN ('GOV', 'MIL', 'COP') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY 'Nombre_Conflits' DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et le ton moyen des mentions par pays d'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Moyenne_Sources', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 50 ORDER BY AVG(e.NumSources) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le ton de l'événement et le ton des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Divergence_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) > 3 ORDER BY 'Divergence_Ton' DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mois avec le plus haut volume de couverture médiatique pour les conflits matériels.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY 'Total_Mentions' DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Acteurs ayant à la fois coopéré et été en conflit avec le même autre acteur.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Cooperation', SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Conflit' FROM events WHERE Actor2Name IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Name != '' AND Actor1Name != Actor2Name GROUP BY Actor1Name, Actor2Name HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Impact de la confiance des mentions sur le ton des documents pour les événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '06') GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY e.EventRootCode;

text_query: Pays où les événements ont généré le plus grand nombre d'articles par mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions', CAST(SUM(e.NumArticles) AS REAL) / SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Articles_par_Mention' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.NumMentions > 0 GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING SUM(e.NumMentions) > 100 ORDER BY 'Articles_par_Mention' DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Répartition des types d'acteurs pour les événements de menace militaire.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Principal', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Echelle_Goldstein_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY 'Nombre_Evenements' DESC;

text_query: Sources qui rapportent systématiquement des événements avec un ton plus négatif que la moyenne globale.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Source', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts' FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING AVG(m.MentionDocTone) < (SELECT AVG(MentionDocTone) FROM mentions) AND COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) > 20 ORDER BY 'Ton_Moyen_Source' ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Variation du ton des mentions en fonction de la longueur du document.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN m.MentionDocLen < 500 THEN 'Court' WHEN m.MentionDocLen BETWEEN 500 AND 2000 THEN 'Moyen' ELSE 'Long' END AS Longueur_Document, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM mentions m GROUP BY Longueur_Document ORDER BY Ton_Moyen DESC;

text_query: Acteurs civils les plus souvent ciblés dans des événements violents par région.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_ADM1Code AS 'Région', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Violents', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND e.Actor1Geo_ADM1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_ADM1Code != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_ADM1Code, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Violents DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Tendances annuelles de l'intensité des conflits pour les principaux pays en guerre.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Conflit', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Intensite_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('SY', 'UP', 'AF', 'IZ') GROUP BY e.Year, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.Year DESC, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode;

text_query: Conflits impliquant des groupes rebelles avec un ton médiatique très négatif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK')) AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND m.MentionDocTone < -5 ORDER BY m.MentionDocTone ASC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements diplomatiques entre gouvernements avec localisation précise
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID', e.Day AS 'Date_Complete', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays2', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Aide humanitaire fournie par des ONG avec évaluation de confiance élevée
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Aide', e.Day AS 'Date_Aide', e.Actor1Name AS 'Donateur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Beneficiaire', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Positif', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventCode LIKE '07%' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO' AND m.Confidence > 80 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Couverture médiatique des conflits armés par type de source
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Couvertures', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Conflictualite' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec décalage temporel important entre occurrence et couverture
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', m.MentionTimeDate AS 'Date_Couverture', (julianday(substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Decalage_Jours', e.NumArticles AS 'Articles_Publies' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (julianday(substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) > 7 ORDER BY (julianday(substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux les plus actifs dans la diplomatie internationale
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Actions_Diplomatiques', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Impact_Positif_Moyen', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Couverture_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de protestation avec localisation urbaine précise
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Protestation', e.Day AS 'Date', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', e.NumMentions AS 'Volume_Couverture', e.AvgTone AS 'Sentiment_Mediatique' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%,%' ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements positifs impliquant des organisations internationales
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Positif', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisation_Internationale', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Implique', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Positif', e.NumSources AS 'Diversite_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'NATO') AND e.GoldsteinScale > 3 AND e.NumSources >= 2 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec forte divergence entre ton moyen et ton des documents
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements judiciaires avec haute confiance d'extraction
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Judiciaire', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Judiciaire', e.Actor2Name AS 'Partie_Impliquee', e.EventCode AS 'Action_Judiciaire', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Extraction_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'JUD' AND m.Confidence > 90 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements environnementaux avec couverture internationale
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Environnement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Origine', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Sources_Internationales' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('06', '07', '08') AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Analyse saisonnière des événements conflictuels par année
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', e.MonthYear AS 'Mois', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Intensite_Negative_Moyenne', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Year BETWEEN 2015 AND 2025 GROUP BY e.Year, e.MonthYear HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY e.Year DESC, COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 10 mentions et ton positif
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('05', '06', '07') AND e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) AND e.NumMentions > 10 AND e.AvgTone > 0 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode <> e.Actor2CountryCode LIMIT 30;

text_query: Sources médiatiques couvrant le plus d'événements de protestation en 2015
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Moyenne du ton des articles par type d'événement pour les conflits matériels
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) ASC;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton des articles individuels
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 AND e.NumMentions >= 2 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Distribution géographique des événements de menace (code 13) par pays d'action
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements couverts par plus de 3 sources médiatiques différentes avec haute confiance
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 3 AND AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC, AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements impliquant des groupes religieux avec ton négatif extrême (< -15)
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) AND e.AvgTone < -15 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Corrélation entre la longueur des articles et le ton pour les événements militaires
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Article', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Article', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING e.NumMentions >= 2 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocLen) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où les deux acteurs partagent la même religion mais sont en conflit
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Commune', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code = e.Actor2Religion1Code AND e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Différence de couverture médiatique entre événements racine et non-racine
sql_query: SELECT e.IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e GROUP BY e.IsRootEvent ORDER BY e.IsRootEvent DESC;

text_query: Acteurs les plus souvent cibles de désapprobation (code 11) de la part des médias
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Cible', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Desapprobations', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '11' AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Name, e.Actor2Type1Code HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de fourniture d'aide (code 07) avec divergence entre acteur et lieu d'action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Donneur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Beneficiaire', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode <> e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mentions d'événements dont le ton a changé significativement après la première heure
sql_query: SELECT m.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', MIN(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Minimum', MAX(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Maximum', MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Variation_Ton', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND ABS(MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(MAX(m.MentionDocTone) - MIN(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements impliquant des organisations internationales avec ton positif élevé
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_International', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Partenaire', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'IGO', 'NGO', 'IRC') AND e.AvgTone > 5 ORDER BY e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) AS 'Ecart_Mentions_Articles', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 0 AND e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY ABS(e.NumMentions - e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Top 10 des pays avec le plus d'événements impliquant des groupes rebelles comme acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code IN ('REB', 'INS', 'CRM') AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Top 15 des événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) avec le ton moyen le plus négatif.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen, GoldsteinScale AS Echelle_Goldstein FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 AND AvgTone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY AvgTone ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Top 20 des événements ayant le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Mentions, ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL AND m.MentionDocTone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Top 10 des types d'acteurs 1 les plus fréquents dans les événements de protestation (EventRootCode 14).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '14' AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Top 15 des pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements avec un acteur gouvernemental et un acteur civil.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Top 20 des événements avec le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS Nombre_Sources_Differentes FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionSourceName IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY Nombre_Sources_Differentes DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Top 10 des mois (année-mois) avec le plus d'événements de coopération verbale (QuadClass 1).
sql_query: SELECT MonthYear AS Mois_Annee, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 1 AND MonthYear IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MonthYear ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Top 15 des événements ayant à la fois un score Goldstein positif et un ton moyen positif.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, GoldsteinScale AS Echelle_Goldstein, AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE GoldsteinScale > 0 AND AvgTone > 0 ORDER BY GoldsteinScale DESC, AvgTone DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Top 20 des paires de pays (acteur 1 et acteur 2) les plus fréquentes dans les événements de menace (EventRootCode 13).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '13' AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode, Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Top 10 des événements avec la plus grande différence de jours entre la date de l'événement et la date d'ajout.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Day AS Jour_Evenement, DATEADDED AS Date_Ajout, (DATEADDED / 1000000 - Day) AS Difference_Jours FROM events WHERE DATEADDED IS NOT NULL AND Day IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(DATEADDED / 1000000 - Day) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Top 15 des types de mentions les plus fréquents pour les événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS Type_Mention, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND m.MentionType IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY Nombre_Mentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Top 10 des codes d'événement de base (EventBaseCode) les plus fréquents pour les acteurs militaires (Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL').
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS Code_Evenement_Base, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND EventBaseCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY EventBaseCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Top 15 des événements avec le plus grand nombre d'articles mais le moins de sources.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, NumArticles AS Nombre_Articles, NumSources AS Nombre_Sources, (NumArticles * 1.0 / NULLIF(NumSources, 0)) AS Ratio_Articles_Sources FROM events WHERE NumArticles > 0 AND NumSources > 0 ORDER BY Ratio_Articles_Sources DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Top 20 des événements où la géolocalisation de l'action est un pays différent du pays de l'acteur 1.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Action FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1CountryCode != ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY GlobalEventID DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Top 10 des années avec le plus d'événements impliquant des organisations internationales (Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' ou 'NGO').
sql_query: SELECT Year AS Annee, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE (Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' OR Actor1Type1Code = 'NGO') AND Year IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Year ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Top 15 des événements avec la confiance moyenne la plus élevée dans leurs mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Top 20 des événements de type 'Appel' (EventRootCode 02) avec le ton moyen le plus positif.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, AvgTone AS Ton_Moyen, GoldsteinScale AS Echelle_Goldstein FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '02' AND AvgTone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY AvgTone DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Top 10 des combinaisons de classes de quadrants et de codes racines d'événements les plus fréquentes.
sql_query: SELECT QuadClass AS Classe_Quadrant, EventRootCode AS Code_Racine_Evenement, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE QuadClass IS NOT NULL AND EventRootCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY QuadClass, EventRootCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Top 15 des événements où le nombre de mentions est significativement plus élevé que le nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS ID_Evenement, NumMentions AS Nombre_Mentions, NumArticles AS Nombre_Articles, (NumMentions * 1.0 / NULLIF(NumArticles, 0)) AS Ratio_Mentions_Articles FROM events WHERE NumMentions > 0 AND NumArticles > 0 AND NumMentions > NumArticles * 2 ORDER BY Ratio_Mentions_Articles DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pour chaque pays, calcule le nombre d'événements de conflit militaire et le ton moyen des articles.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS Pays, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements_Conflit, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE EventRootCode IN ('18','19','20') AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Conflit DESC;

text_query: Trouve les 10 acteurs gouvernementaux les plus souvent impliqués dans des consultations diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Name AS Acteur, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Consultations FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '04' AND Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Name ORDER BY Nombre_Consultations DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Identifie les paires d'acteurs (pays) ayant le plus d'interactions conflictuelles verbales.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Acteur1, Actor2CountryCode AS Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Interactions_Conflict_Verbal FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 3 AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode, Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY Interactions_Conflict_Verbal DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Trouve les événements ayant à la fois un ton très négatif et un nombre élevé de sources.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, AvgTone AS Ton, NumSources AS Nombre_Sources FROM events WHERE AvgTone < -5 AND NumSources > 5 ORDER BY NumSources DESC, AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Calcule la proportion d'événements impliquant des groupes rebelles pour chaque région géographique.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS Region, COUNT(CASE WHEN Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ','TAL','BOK','REB') THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS Proportion_Rebelles FROM events WHERE Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY Proportion_Rebelles DESC;

text_query: Identifie les sources médiatiques qui rapportent le plus d'événements avec un ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements_Positifs FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone > 5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Positifs DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pour chaque année, analyse l'évolution du nombre d'événements de protestation.
sql_query: SELECT Year AS Annee, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Protestations FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY Year ORDER BY Annee;

text_query: Trouve les événements où l'acteur 1 est civil et l'acteur 2 est la police, avec un ton moyen inférieur à -3.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, Actor1Name AS Civil, Actor2Name AS Police, AvgTone AS Ton FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND Actor2Type1Code = 'COP' AND AvgTone < -3 ORDER BY AvgTone ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Calcule, pour chaque code d'événement de base, le nombre moyen de mentions par source.
sql_query: SELECT EventBaseCode AS Code_Evenement, AVG(NumMentions * 1.0 / NULLIF(NumSources, 0)) AS Mentions_Moyennes_Par_Source FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0 GROUP BY EventBaseCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 100 ORDER BY Mentions_Moyennes_Par_Source DESC;

text_query: Identifie les 20 événements les plus couverts par des sources européennes (.uk, .de, .fr).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, COUNT(*) AS Couverture_Europe FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.uk%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.de%' OR m.MentionSourceName LIKE '%.fr%' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY Couverture_Europe DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pour chaque acteur de type 'GOV', calcule le ton moyen des événements où il est impliqué.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Name AS Acteur_Gouvernemental, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY Ton_Moyen DESC;

text_query: Analyse la relation entre la longueur du document de mention et le ton du document.
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN MentionDocLen < 1000 THEN 'Court' WHEN MentionDocLen BETWEEN 1000 AND 3000 THEN 'Moyen' ELSE 'Long' END AS Longueur_Document, AVG(MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Mentions FROM mentions GROUP BY Longueur_Document ORDER BY Ton_Moyen;

text_query: Calcule la différence de ton moyen entre les événements racines et les événements non racines.
sql_query: SELECT IsRootEvent AS Est_Racine, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events GROUP BY IsRootEvent;

text_query: Identifie les événements ayant un score de Goldstein très positif et un nombre élevé d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, GoldsteinScale AS Score_Goldstein, NumArticles AS Nombre_Articles FROM events WHERE GoldsteinScale > 5 AND NumArticles > 20 ORDER BY GoldsteinScale DESC, NumArticles DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Pour chaque type de mention, calcule le niveau de confiance moyen et le ton moyen du document.
sql_query: SELECT MentionType AS Type_Mention, AVG(Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne, AVG(MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Document FROM mentions GROUP BY MentionType ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne DESC;

text_query: Trouve les acteurs ayant été à la fois acteur 1 et acteur 2 dans différents événements.
sql_query: SELECT ActorName FROM (SELECT Actor1Name AS ActorName FROM events WHERE Actor1Name IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT Actor2Name AS ActorName FROM events WHERE Actor2Name IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY ActorName HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Analyse la répartition géographique des événements de fourniture d'aide (EventRootCode '07').
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Cible, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Aides, AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS Goldstein_Moyen FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '07' AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Aides DESC;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 5 mentions et ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.EventRootCode = '06' AND e.NumMentions > 5 AND e.AvgTone > 0 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où les événements impliquant des groupes rebelles ont le ton moyen le plus négatif.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Negatif' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique (plus de 3 sources) mais un ton très négatif (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal' FROM events e WHERE e.NumSources > 3 AND e.AvgTone < -5 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC, e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de mentions et la confiance moyenne des extractions pour les événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumMentions HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) >= 5 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Groupes ethniques impliqués dans des événements violents (codes 18-20) avec leur localisation principale.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Incidents', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18','19','20') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand volume de couverture médiatique (total de mentions) pour les événements politiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (1,3) AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY SUM(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Pays acteurs les plus souvent cibles de menaces (code 13) de la part d'acteurs non étatiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code NOT IN ('GOV','MIL') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle avec un score Goldstein élevé (> 4) impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisation', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Partenaire', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Cooperation', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.GoldsteinScale > 4 AND (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%IGO%' OR e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%UNO%') ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec localisation précise (ville) ayant une forte dissonance entre le ton de l'événement et le ton du document de mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Document', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) >= 3 AND ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays où les événements impliquant la police ont le plus grand nombre moyen d'articles par événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'COP' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP') AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 15 ORDER BY AVG(e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Trajectoire mensuelle du score Goldstein moyen pour les relations bilatérales entre deux pays spécifiques (ex: USA-RUS).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interactions' FROM events e WHERE ((e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'RUS') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'RUS' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA')) GROUP BY e.MonthYear HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY e.MonthYear;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand nombre de sources médiatiques distinctes par pays acteur 1.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, COUNT(DISTINCT MentionSourceName) AS Nombre_Sources_Distinctes FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Sources_Distinctes DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Différence de ton moyen entre les événements impliquant des gouvernements et ceux impliquant des civils comme acteur 1.
sql_query: SELECT 'Gouvernement' AS Type_Acteur, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' UNION ALL SELECT 'Civil' AS Type_Acteur, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL';

text_query: Événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4) avec plus de 50 mentions, classés par échelle de Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, EventRootCode, GoldsteinScale, NumMentions, ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Lieu FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 4 AND NumMentions > 50 ORDER BY GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs (pays) les plus souvent en position d'acteur 1 dans des événements de type 'Protest' (EventRootCode 14).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Protestations FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '14' AND Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Protestations DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Ratio entre le nombre d'articles et le nombre de mentions pour les événements avec un ton fortement négatif (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, NumArticles, NumMentions, (CAST(NumArticles AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(NumMentions, 0)) AS Ratio_Articles_Mentions, AvgTone AS Ton FROM events WHERE AvgTone < -5 AND NumMentions > 0 ORDER BY Ratio_Articles_Mentions DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent le plus d'événements avec un acteur 1 gouvernemental.
sql_query: SELECT MentionSourceName AS Source, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS Nombre_Evenements_Couverts FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND MentionSourceName IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements_Couverts DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont de pays différents mais du même type (ex: deux gouvernements).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, e.Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, e.Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1Type1Code = e.Actor2Type1Code AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20;

text_query: Ton moyen des documents de mention pour chaque type d'événement racine (EventRootCode).
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS Ton_Moyen_Documents FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY Ton_Moyen_Documents;

text_query: Pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements (ActionGeo) avec un acteur 1 étranger.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Lieu, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement (AvgTone) et le ton du document de mention (MentionDocTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone AS Ton_Evenement, m.MentionDocTone AS Ton_Document, ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) AS Ecart_Ton FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID ORDER BY Ecart_Ton DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Répartition des types d'acteur 1 (Actor1Type1Code) pour les événements de coopération verbale (QuadClass 1).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE QuadClass = 1 AND Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Pour chaque acteur 1 de type 'REB' (rebelle), nombre d'événements et ton moyen associé.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Name AS Nom_Rebelle, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements, AVG(AvgTone) AS Ton_Moyen FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%REB%' GROUP BY Actor1Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC;

text_query: Confiance moyenne des mentions pour les événements selon leur classe QuadClass.
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass, AVG(m.Confidence) AS Confiance_Moyenne FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Événements 'Investigate' (EventRootCode 09) avec plus de 10 sources médiatiques distinctes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources, COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS Sources_Distinctes FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '09' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 10 ORDER BY Sources_Distinctes DESC;

text_query: Acteur 2 le plus fréquent lorsque l'acteur 1 est un gouvernement spécifique (ex: USA).
sql_query: SELECT Actor2Name AS Nom_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Interactions FROM events WHERE Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND Actor2Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor2Name ORDER BY Nombre_Interactions DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements où le lieu d'action (ActionGeo) est différent du pays de l'acteur 1 et de l'acteur 2.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID, Actor1CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur1, Actor2CountryCode AS Pays_Acteur2, ActionGeo_CountryCode AS Pays_Lieu FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode != Actor1CountryCode AND ActionGeo_CountryCode != Actor2CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions et le ton moyen pour les événements de type 'Protest'.
sql_query: SELECT AVG(NumMentions * AvgTone) - AVG(NumMentions) * AVG(AvgTone) AS Covariance_Approx FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '14' AND NumMentions IS NOT NULL AND AvgTone IS NOT NULL;

text_query: Top 5 des combinaisons de types d'acteurs (Acteur1 Type vs Acteur2 Type) les plus courantes.
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS Type_Acteur1, Actor2Type1Code AS Type_Acteur2, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Evenements FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code, Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY Nombre_Evenements DESC LIMIT 5;

text_query: Sources de médias qui ont rapporté des événements diplomatiques avec un score Goldstein élevé.
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.GoldsteinScale > 3 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le ton moyen des événements par classe d'événement (QuadClass).
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Evenement', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Articles', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Groupes ethniques ou religieux les plus souvent impliqués dans des événements de conflit matériel (QuadClass 4).
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1EthnicCode, e.Actor2EthnicCode) AS 'Code_Ethnique', COALESCE(e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.Actor2Religion1Code) AS 'Code_Religieux', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND (e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2EthnicCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY COALESCE(e.Actor1EthnicCode, e.Actor2EthnicCode), COALESCE(e.Actor1Religion1Code, e.Actor2Religion1Code) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des documents le mentionnant.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pays où les événements ont la confiance moyenne des mentions la plus faible.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Types d'acteurs (gouvernement, militaire, civil) les plus souvent cibles de protestations.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur_Cible', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Protestations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor2Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand nombre d'événements violents (assaut, combat) pour chaque année.
sql_query: SELECT Year AS 'Annee', MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Violents' FROM events WHERE EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') GROUP BY Year, MonthYear HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(event_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as event_count FROM events e2 WHERE e2.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND e2.Year = events.Year GROUP BY e2.MonthYear) sub) ORDER BY Year;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui couvrent à la fois des événements coopératifs et conflictuels (par QuadClass).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Cooperation', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Conflit' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 0 ORDER BY (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (1,2) THEN e.GlobalEventID END) + COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.QuadClass IN (3,4) THEN e.GlobalEventID END)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où le même acteur est à la fois acteur principal et secondaire (auto-interaction).
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events WHERE Actor1Code = Actor2Code AND Actor1Code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Régions du monde (par code pays géographique) avec le score Goldstein moyen le plus négatif pour les événements de type militaire.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Geo', AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Militaires' FROM events WHERE EventRootCode IN ('15', '16', '17', '18', '19', '20') AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(GoldsteinScale) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre de mentions anormalement élevé par rapport à leur classe (QuadClass), identifiant les sujets médiatiques viraux.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) FROM events WHERE QuadClass = e.QuadClass) AS 'Moyenne_Mentions_Classe', e.NumMentions - (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) FROM events WHERE QuadClass = e.QuadClass) AS 'Exces_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 2 * (SELECT AVG(NumMentions) FROM events WHERE QuadClass = e.QuadClass) ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements couverts par plus de 5 sources médiatiques différentes, avec détails de chaque mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Distinctes', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Liste_Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Day, e.EventCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 5 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Analyse saisonnière des protestations (EventRootCode 14) : nombre d'événements par mois, toutes années confondues.
sql_query: SELECT (MonthYear % 100) AS 'Mois', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Événements' FROM events WHERE EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY (MonthYear % 100) ORDER BY (MonthYear % 100);

text_query: Événements impliquant des organisations internationales (IGO) comme acteur principal, avec le volume de couverture médiatique par région.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisation_Internationale', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', SUM(e.NumMentions) AS 'Total_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY SUM(e.NumMentions) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Trouve les 10 événements les plus conflictuels (score Goldstein le plus bas) impliquant des gouvernements et des rebelles, avec le nombre de sources médiatiques distinctes qui en parlent.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Conflictualite', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nb_Sources_Distinctes' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV') GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.GoldsteinScale ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC, Nb_Sources_Distinctes DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Liste les 15 sources d'information qui couvrent le plus grand nombre d'événements différents situés en Afrique (pays commençant par le code continent 'AFR').
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Information', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nb_Evenements_Couverts' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode LIKE 'AFR%' OR e.Actor1CountryCode LIKE 'AFR%' OR e.Actor2CountryCode LIKE 'AFR%' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY Nb_Evenements_Couverts DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Trouve les événements où l'acteur principal est un groupe connu (comme l'ONU ou Al-Qaïda) et où la confiance moyenne des mentions est supérieure à 80.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu_Acteur1', e.Actor2KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu_Acteur2', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1KnownGroupCode, e.Actor2KnownGroupCode HAVING AVG(m.Confidence) > 80 ORDER BY Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Identifie les 10 événements ayant la plus grande différence entre le ton de l'événement (AvgTone) et le ton moyen des documents de mention (MentionDocTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone ORDER BY Difference_Ton DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Pour chaque classe de quad (QuadClass), calcule le pourcentage d'événements qui ont eu lieu dans le même pays pour les deux acteurs (Actor1CountryCode = Actor2CountryCode).
sql_query: SELECT e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Interaction', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', SUM(CASE WHEN e.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor2CountryCode THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Evenements_Meme_Pays', (SUM(CASE WHEN e.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor2CountryCode THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS 'Pourcentage_Meme_Pays' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.QuadClass ORDER BY e.QuadClass;

text_query: Trouve les 20 événements les plus récents (par DATEADDED) impliquant un acteur de type 'MEDIA' et ayant un ton moyen positif (AvgTone > 0).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.DATEADDED AS 'Date_Ajout', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED') AND e.AvgTone > 0 ORDER BY e.DATEADDED DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Analyse la distribution de la longueur des documents de mention (MentionDocLen) pour les événements de type militaire (Actor1Type1Code ou Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL').
sql_query: SELECT CASE WHEN m.MentionDocLen < 1000 THEN 'Court (<1000)' WHEN m.MentionDocLen BETWEEN 1000 AND 3000 THEN 'Moyen (1000-3000)' ELSE 'Long (>3000)' END AS 'Categorie_Longueur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nb_Mentions' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL' GROUP BY Categorie_Longueur ORDER BY Nb_Mentions DESC;

text_query: Trouve les 15 événements où le pays de l'action (ActionGeo_CountryCode) est différent du pays des deux acteurs, avec le détail des codes pays.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != e.Actor1CountryCode AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode LIMIT 15;

text_query: Identifie les événements ayant plus de 10 mentions où le ton des documents de mention (MentionDocTone) est systématiquement plus négatif que le ton moyen de l'événement (AvgTone).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', e.NumMentions AS 'Nb_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 10 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone, e.NumMentions HAVING AVG(m.MentionDocTone) < e.AvgTone ORDER BY (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Affiche les 10 événements les plus conflictuels impliquant des groupes rebelles, avec leur localisation et le nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Conflictualite' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('REB', 'INS') OR e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('REB', 'INS') ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC, e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Affiche le ton moyen des articles par type d'événement racine pour les actions militaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19', '20') GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY 'Ton_Moyen' DESC;

text_query: Affiche la corrélation entre le nombre de mentions et le nombre d'articles pour les événements de protestation.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Affiche les sources de médias qui ont couvert le plus d'événements diplomatiques impliquant la France.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'FRA' OR e.Actor2CountryCode = 'FRA') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY 'Nombre_Evenements_Couverts' DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Affiche les 20 événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement et le ton moyen des documents le mentionnant.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Affiche les groupes ethniques les plus souvent impliqués dans des événements de conflit verbal.
sql_query: SELECT Groupe_Ethnique, SUM(Nombre_Implications) AS Nombre_Implications FROM (SELECT e.Actor1EthnicCode AS Groupe_Ethnique, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Implications FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1EthnicCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1EthnicCode UNION ALL SELECT e.Actor2EthnicCode AS Groupe_Ethnique, COUNT(*) AS Nombre_Implications FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor2EthnicCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2EthnicCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor2EthnicCode) GROUP BY Groupe_Ethnique ORDER BY Nombre_Implications DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Affiche les localisations géographiques avec la plus forte concentration d'événements de type 'Menace'.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_Fullname, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY 'Nombre_Menaces' DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Affiche l'évolution du nombre moyen de sources par événement pour les actions impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY e.Year;

text_query: Affiche la répartition des types de mentions pour les événements avec un score de confiance élevé.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Occurrences' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 90 GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY 'Nombre_Occurrences' DESC;

text_query: Affiche les régions administratives (ADM1) avec le plus d'événements violents.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code AS 'Code_Region_ADM1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Violents' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY 'Nombre_Evenements_Violents' DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Affiche la proportion d'événements où les deux acteurs partagent la même affiliation religieuse.
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Meme_Religion', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) AS 'Total_Evenements_Avec_Religion', (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL)) AS 'Pourcentage' FROM events WHERE Actor1Religion1Code = Actor2Religion1Code AND Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Religion1Code != '';

text_query: Affiche les événements de conflit matériel localisés dans des capitales mondiales.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Capitale', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Conflictualite' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4) AND (e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%Washington%' OR e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%London%' OR e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%Paris%' OR e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%Beijing%' OR e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%Moscow%') ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Affiche les acteurs non-gouvernementaux les plus actifs dans les événements de consultation.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Consultations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '04' AND e.Actor1Type1Code != 'GOV' AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY 'Nombre_Consultations' DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Affiche les événements avec une géolocalisation précise (ville) et un nombre d'articles supérieur à la moyenne.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4) AND e.NumArticles > (SELECT AVG(NumArticles) FROM events WHERE NumArticles > 0) ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire entre pays avec plus de 10 mentions et ton positif.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '06' AND e.NumMentions > 10 AND e.AvgTone > 0 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC;

text_query: Pays avec le ton moyen le plus négatif pour les événements impliquant des acteurs gouvernementaux.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Negatif' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.AvgTone < 0 GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et le nombre de sources pour les événements de diplomatie.
sql_query: SELECT e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.NumArticles IS NOT NULL AND e.NumSources IS NOT NULL LIMIT 100;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (type 'NGO' ou 'BUS') les plus souvent en conflit avec des gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'BUS') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec localisation précise (ville) et plus de 5 mentions, classés par score Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.NumMentions > 5 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Moyenne du ton des documents par type de mention pour les événements de menace (code 13).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Mention', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY m.MentionType;

text_query: Pays où se produisent le plus d'événements avec acteurs de groupes religieux spécifiques.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.Actor1Religion1Code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent=1) avec un écart important entre ton moyen et ton du document de mention.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document_Mention', ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - m.MentionDocTone) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Répartition des codes d'événements racines pour les interactions entre militaires et civils.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

text_query: Sources avec la plus haute confiance moyenne pour les événements de fourniture d'aide (code 07).
