sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont du même pays mais de types différents.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur1', e.Actor2Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code != e.Actor2Type1Code LIMIT 50;

text_query: Événements impliquant des organisations internationales (type 'IGO') avec un score Goldstein élevé (> 5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisation_Internationale', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'IGO') AND e.GoldsteinScale > 5 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Différence de couverture (nombre de mentions) entre événements racines et non-racines par code d'événement de base.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventBaseCode AS 'Code_Base', e.IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e GROUP BY e.EventBaseCode, e.IsRootEvent HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY e.EventBaseCode, e.IsRootEvent;

text_query: Événements de protestation impliquant des civils, classés par nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques mentionnant le plus d'événements diplomatiques.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Ton moyen des événements par pays de l'acteur principal et par année.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_Principal', e.Year AS 'Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Year ORDER BY e.Year DESC, AVG(e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec le plus grand écart entre le ton de l'événement et le ton des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING COUNT(m.MentionTimeDate) > 1 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Répartition des types d'événements pour les acteurs de type 'REB' (rebelles).
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Occurrences' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'REB' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB' GROUP BY e.EventRootCode, e.EventCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Mois avec le plus d'événements ayant un score Goldstein négatif (conflit).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Negatifs' FROM events e WHERE e.GoldsteinScale < 0 GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle entre pays spécifiques, avec nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Initiateur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'FRA', 'GBR') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS', 'FRA', 'GBR') AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation approximative entre le nombre de mentions et la confiance moyenne des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumMentions ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Lieux géographiques (pays) où se déroulent le plus d'événements de type 'Assaut'.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Assauts' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '18' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Évolution annuelle du nombre moyen d'articles par événement pour les conflits verbaux.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 GROUP BY e.Year ORDER BY e.Year DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Acteurs principaux (type 'MED' - Médias) impliqués dans des événements de 'Déclaration Publique'.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Media', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Interpelle', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Declarations' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '01' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture (nombre de mentions > 50) et un ton très négatif (< -5).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND e.AvgTone < -5 ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de ton moyen entre les événements où l'acteur principal est un gouvernement et ceux où c'est un civil.
sql_query: SELECT 'Gouvernement' AS 'Type_Acteur_Principal', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' UNION ALL SELECT 'Civil' AS 'Type_Acteur_Principal', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL';

text_query: Sources de mentions dont les articles sont en moyenne les plus longs pour les événements militaires.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Article' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocLen) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Groupes connus (ex: Al-Qaeda, Taliban) les plus souvent mentionnés comme acteur secondaire dans des événements violents.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Connu', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Conflits' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IS NOT NULL AND e.EventRootCode IN ('17', '18', '19', '20') GROUP BY e.Actor2KnownGroupCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements 'Mass Violence' ayant eu lieu dans un pays différent de celui de l'acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_Principal', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Lieu_Action', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '20' AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Tendances mensuelles du ton moyen pour les événements entre deux pays spécifiques (ex: USA et RUS).
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE ((e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'RUS') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'RUS' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA')) GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Moyenne du ton des articles par type d'acteur gouvernemental pour les événements de coopération diplomatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.Actor1Type1Code LIKE '%GOV%' GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) DESC;

text_query: Sources médiatiques ayant couvert le plus d'événements impliquant la Chine et les États-Unis.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'CHN' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'USA') OR (e.Actor1CountryCode = 'USA' AND e.Actor2CountryCode = 'CHN') GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (ONG, médias, entreprises) les plus souvent en conflit verbal avec des gouvernements.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Verbaux' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'MED', 'BUS', 'EDU', 'LAB') AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte divergence entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5.0 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Top 10 des localisations géographiques (pays) où se déroulent le plus d'événements de fourniture d'aide.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Aides' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre d'articles et l'échelle de Goldstein pour les événements de menace et de coercition.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('13', '17') AND e.NumArticles > 10 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC, e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Mentions provenant de sources de type 'WEB' avec un niveau de confiance élevé, pour des événements de violence de masse.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_WEB', m.MentionIdentifier AS 'URL', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionType = 1 AND m.Confidence >= 80 AND e.EventRootCode = '20' ORDER BY m.Confidence DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements racines (IsRootEvent) ayant généré le plus grand volume de couverture médiatique (somme des longueurs de documents).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', SUM(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Volume_Total_Couverture' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.Actor1Name, e.Actor2Name ORDER BY SUM(m.MentionDocLen) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de traitement médiatique (ton moyen) entre les événements localisés dans des capitales et ceux localisés au niveau national.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Geolocalisation', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IN (1, 3, 4) AND e.ActionGeo_Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_Type ORDER BY e.ActionGeo_Type;

text_query: Événements de type 'investigation' (09) impliquant la police et des civils, avec le détail des sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '09' AND ((e.Actor1Type1Code = 'COP' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'COP')) ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pays où les événements ont la tonalité moyenne la plus négative, parmi ceux ayant au moins 50 événements enregistrés.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Negatif' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 50 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Types d'acteurs (Actor1Type1Code) les plus fréquemment associés à des événements ayant un score Goldstein très positif (> 5).
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Positifs' FROM events e WHERE e.GoldsteinScale > 5.0 AND e.Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Type1Code != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10;

text_query: Événements impliquant des acteurs de type 'militaire' et se déroulant dans une zone de conflit connu (pays spécifiques).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Militaire', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Conflit', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('US', 'FR', 'GB', 'CN') AND e.Year >= 2000 ORDER BY e.Year DESC, e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements où un acteur gouvernemental est en conflit avec des civils, avec le nombre de sources différentes et le ton moyen des articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Article', e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Conflit' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'CVL' AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pour chaque pays d'action, le nombre d'événements de protestation (EventRootCode = 14) et le score Goldstein moyen.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Protestations', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Mois (MonthYear) avec le plus grand écart entre le ton moyen des événements de coopération (QuadClass 1 ou 2) et celui des événements de conflit (QuadClass 3 ou 4).
sql_query: WITH coop AS ( SELECT MonthYear, AVG(AvgTone) AS ton_coop FROM events WHERE QuadClass IN (1, 2) GROUP BY MonthYear ), conflit AS ( SELECT MonthYear, AVG(AvgTone) AS ton_conflit FROM events WHERE QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY MonthYear ) SELECT c.MonthYear AS 'Mois', c.ton_coop AS 'Ton_Moyen_Cooperation', cf.ton_conflit AS 'Ton_Moyen_Conflit', (c.ton_coop - cf.ton_conflit) AS 'Ecart_Ton' FROM coop c JOIN conflit cf ON c.MonthYear = cf.MonthYear ORDER BY ABS(c.ton_coop - cf.ton_conflit) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur 1 et l'acteur 2 sont de religions différentes (Religion1Code), avec le code racine de l'événement et le nombre de mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code != e.Actor2Religion1Code ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Sources dont le ton moyen des documents (MentionDocTone) est systématiquement plus négatif que le ton moyen de l'événement (AvgTone) qu'elles rapportent.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Articles', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - AVG(e.AvgTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING AVG(m.MentionDocTone) < AVG(e.AvgTone) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Pays (Actor1CountryCode) qui sont le plus souvent la cible (Actor2) de menaces (EventRootCode = 13) de la part d'acteurs gouvernementaux.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Menaces', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Severite_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '13' AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec localisation précise (Geo_Type >= 3) ayant un score Goldstein extrême (> 7 ou < -7), avec le nom du lieu et le type d'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND (e.GoldsteinScale > 7 OR e.GoldsteinScale < -7) ORDER BY ABS(e.GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pour chaque type d'acteur 1 (Actor1Type1Code), la proportion d'événements qui sont des conflits matériels (QuadClass = 4).
sql_query: SELECT Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Evenements', SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Nombre_Conflits_Materiels', (SUM(CASE WHEN QuadClass = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS 'Pourcentage_Conflits' FROM events WHERE Actor1Type1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Actor1Type1Code HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Pourcentage_Conflits DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs (Actor1) impliqués dans des événements de 'Fight' (EventRootCode = 19) qui ont également été mentionnés dans des événements de 'Diplomatic Coop' (EventRootCode = 05) la même année.
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT e1.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e1.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays', e1.Year AS 'Annee', COUNT(DISTINCT e1.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nb_Combats', COUNT(DISTINCT e2.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nb_Cooperations_Diplomatiques' FROM events e1 JOIN events e2 ON e1.Actor1Code = e2.Actor1Code AND e1.Year = e2.Year WHERE e1.EventRootCode = '19' AND e2.EventRootCode = '05' GROUP BY e1.Actor1Name, e1.Actor1CountryCode, e1.Year HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e1.GlobalEventID) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT e2.GlobalEventID) > 0 ORDER BY e1.Year DESC, (Nb_Combats + Nb_Cooperations_Diplomatiques) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements dont le nombre d'articles (NumArticles) est significativement plus élevé que le nombre de sources (NumSources), suggérant une couverture médiatique intense.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', (NumArticles * 1.0 / NumSources) AS 'Ratio_Articles_Sources', AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events WHERE NumSources > 0 AND (NumArticles * 1.0 / NumSources) > 3.0 ORDER BY Ratio_Articles_Sources DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pays (ActionGeo_CountryCode) avec la plus grande variance du score Goldstein pour les événements sur leur territoire, indiquant une instabilité des relations.
sql_query: SELECT ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen', (MAX(GoldsteinScale) - MIN(GoldsteinScale)) AS 'Etendue_Goldstein', (AVG(GoldsteinScale * GoldsteinScale) - AVG(GoldsteinScale) * AVG(GoldsteinScale)) AS 'Variance_Approx' FROM events WHERE ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 ORDER BY Variance_Approx DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs non-gouvernementaux (Actor1Type1Code != 'GOV') qui sont les initiateurs les plus fréquents d'événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass = 2) avec des gouvernements (Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV').
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Non_Gouvernemental', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Cooperations', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Impact_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1Type1Code != 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name, e.Actor1Type1Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où la localisation de l'acteur 1 (Actor1Geo_CountryCode) est différente du lieu de l'action (ActionGeo_CountryCode), suggérant une action à distance ou une intervention.
sql_query: SELECT GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Origine_Acteur', ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events WHERE Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND Actor1Geo_CountryCode != ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY ABS(GoldsteinScale) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Sources qui mentionnent des événements avec un acteur spécifique (ex: 'RUSSIA') et dont le ton du document (MentionDocTone) est constamment plus positif que la moyenne des autres sources pour le même événement.
sql_query: WITH ton_par_evenement AS ( SELECT m.GlobalEventID, AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS ton_moyen_toutes_sources FROM mentions m GROUP BY m.GlobalEventID ) SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT m.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nb_Evenements_Russie', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Source', AVG(t.ton_moyen_toutes_sources) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Toutes_Sources' FROM mentions m JOIN events e ON m.GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID JOIN ton_par_evenement t ON m.GlobalEventID = t.GlobalEventID WHERE e.Actor1Name LIKE '%RUSSIA%' OR e.Actor2Name LIKE '%RUSSIA%' GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING AVG(m.MentionDocTone) > AVG(t.ton_moyen_toutes_sources) ORDER BY Nb_Evenements_Russie DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de ton entre articles sur des événements diplomatiques et militaires par année.
sql_query: SELECT e.Year AS 'Annee', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Article', (AVG(e.AvgTone) - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '15', '18') GROUP BY e.Year, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY e.Year DESC, e.EventRootCode;

text_query: Acteurs gouvernementaux impliqués dans des événements de conflit matériel avec localisations différentes.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Gouvernemental', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Adverse', e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Conflit', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec des groupes rebelles où le nombre d'articles dépasse le nombre de sources.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1KnownGroupCode AS 'Groupe_Rebel', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', (e.NumArticles - e.NumSources) AS 'Difference' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('ALQ', 'TAL', 'BOK', 'REB') AND e.NumArticles > e.NumSources AND e.NumArticles > 5 ORDER BY (e.NumArticles - e.NumSources) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de menace avec acteurs religieux et couverture médiatique internationale.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources_Uniques' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('13', '14', '17', '18') AND (e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Localisations géographiques des événements de violence avec résolution ville vs pays.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Geographique', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 1) GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_Type, e.ActionGeo_Fullname HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY e.ActionGeo_Type, COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 35;

text_query: Sources avec couverture biaisée (ton très différent de la moyenne) sur des événements spécifiques.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Source', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - AVG(e.AvgTone)) AS 'Biais_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 AND ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - AVG(e.AvgTone)) > 3 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone) - AVG(e.AvgTone)) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec acteurs criminels et localisation précise (ville).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Criminel', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CRM' AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4) AND e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements avec décalage entre le ton de l'événement et le nombre de mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', (e.NumMentions * ABS(e.AvgTone)) AS 'Indice_Impact' FROM events e WHERE e.AvgTone < -2 AND e.NumMentions > 20 ORDER BY (e.NumMentions * ABS(e.AvgTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Mentions d'événements environnementaux avec localisations côtières.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'Identifiant_Evenement', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Article' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventBaseCode LIKE '06%' AND e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%coast%' OR e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%sea%' OR e.ActionGeo_Fullname LIKE '%ocean%' ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Événements avec acteurs militaires et diplomates dans des rôles inversés.
sql_query: SELECT e1.GlobalEventID AS 'Evenement_Militaire', e2.GlobalEventID AS 'Evenement_Diplomatique', e1.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Militaire', e2.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Diplomate', e1.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Militaire', e2.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Diplomatique' FROM events e1 JOIN events e2 ON e1.Actor1CountryCode = e2.Actor1CountryCode WHERE e1.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e2.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e1.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19') AND e2.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05') AND ABS(e1.Day - e2.Day) < 30 AND e1.Actor1CountryCode IN ('USA', 'CHN', 'RUS') ORDER BY ABS(e1.Day - e2.Day) ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources de presse qui rapportent le plus d'événements avec un ton négatif.
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Negatifs', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < 0 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre moyen d'articles pour les événements de protestation.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC LIMIT 24;

text_query: Différence de ton entre la première mention et le ton moyen de l'événement.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen_Evenement', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Premiere_Mention', (m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.MentionTimeDate = (SELECT MIN(MentionTimeDate) FROM mentions WHERE GlobalEventID = e.GlobalEventID) ORDER BY ABS(m.MentionDocTone - e.AvgTone) DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Pays où se déroulent le plus d'événements de coopération diplomatique.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Action', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Diplomatiques' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '05' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Groupes religieux mentionnés dans des événements de conflit verbal.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur_1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur_2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND (e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de sources et la confiance moyenne des mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Mentions' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.NumSources ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Événements avec une localisation géographique de type 'ville' mais un code pays d'acteur différent.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Acteur_1', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Geo_Acteur_1', e.Actor1Geo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Geo_Acteur_1' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_Type IN (3,4) AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode <> e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode LIMIT 30;

text_query: Mois avec le plus grand volume de couverture médiatique pour les actions militaires.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Total_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('15', '18', '19', '20') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY SUM(e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 12;

text_query: Acteurs d'un même pays interagissant entre eux, classés par type d'interaction.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Commun', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode = e.Actor2CountryCode AND e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.EventRootCode LIMIT 35;

text_query: Répartition des types d'événements pour les acteurs de type 'média'.
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MED' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MED' GROUP BY e.EventRootCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec un nombre de mentions anormalement élevé par rapport à leur nombre d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.NumArticles > 0 ORDER BY (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays hôtes d'événements impliquant des organisations internationales.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Code_Pays_Hote', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Internationaux' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'IGO' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'IGO') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs les plus fréquemment associés à des événements de fourniture d'aide.
sql_query: SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor1Name, '') AS 'Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Aide' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor1Name IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Name != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1Name UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(e.Actor2Name, '') AS 'Acteur', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Aide' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.Actor2Name IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Name != '' GROUP BY e.Actor2Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Variation du nombre de sources en fonction du type géographique de l'action.
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Geographique_Action', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Nombre_Moyen_Sources', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_Type ORDER BY e.ActionGeo_Type;

text_query: Événements de conflit militaire impliquant des acteurs gouvernementaux et rebelles, avec localisation et nombre de mentions.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_Secondaire', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'REB' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération diplomatique entre pays européens, classés par échelle de Goldstein.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur2', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Echelle_Goldstein', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '06') AND e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP', 'NLD', 'BEL', 'POL', 'SWE') AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('FRA', 'DEU', 'GBR', 'ITA', 'ESP', 'NLD', 'BEL', 'POL', 'SWE') AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Différence entre le ton moyen de l'événement et le ton moyen des documents le mentionnant.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone IS NOT NULL AND m.MentionDocTone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 2 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec une forte couverture médiatique (NumMentions) mais peu de sources (NumSources).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumSources) AS 'Ratio_Mentions_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.NumMentions > 50 AND e.NumSources < 5 AND e.NumSources > 0 ORDER BY (e.NumMentions * 1.0 / e.NumSources) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de violence de masse (EventRootCode 20) rapportés par des sources de confiance élevée.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Geo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Violence', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', m.Confidence AS 'Confiance_Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '20' AND m.Confidence > 90 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre d'événements de conflit verbal (QuadClass 3) au Moyen-Orient.
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Conflit', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mensuel' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 3 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IN ('IR', 'IQ', 'SA', 'SY', 'JO', 'LB', 'IL', 'PS') GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC;

text_query: Événements où l'acteur principal et secondaire partagent la même religion mais sont en conflit.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur2', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Commune', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Interaction' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code = e.Actor2Religion1Code AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Sources médiatiques qui rapportent le plus d'événements avec un ton positif (AvgTone > 5).
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Media', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements_Positifs', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Rapporté' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone > 5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle (QuadClass 2) entre un gouvernement et une entreprise.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Gouvernement', e.Actor2Name AS 'Entreprise', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Cooperation', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND ((e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'BUS') OR (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'BUS' AND e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV')) ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec localisation géographique précise (ville) et un nombre élevé d'articles.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville_Action', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie', e.NumArticles AS 'Nombre_Articles', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.NumArticles > 30 ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre le nombre de mentions et le ton moyen des événements par pays de l'acteur principal.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.NumMentions > 0 GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements d'investigation (EventRootCode 09) impliquant la police ou le système judiciaire.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Enquêteur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Cible', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '09' AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('COP', 'JUD') ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec un écart important entre la date de l'événement et la date d'ajout dans la base.
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.DATEADDED AS 'Date_Ajout', (julianday(substr(e.DATEADDED, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.DATEADDED, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.DATEADDED, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Delai_Jours', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.EventRootCode AS 'Categorie' FROM events e WHERE Delai_Jours > 30 ORDER BY Delai_Jours DESC LIMIT 15;

text_query: Groupes ethniques impliqués dans des événements de conflit, avec localisation géographique.
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1EthnicCode AS 'Groupe_Ethnique', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Conflit', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.QuadClass) AS 'Classe_Interaction_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.Actor1EthnicCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1EthnicCode != '' GROUP BY e.Actor1EthnicCode, e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements où le même acteur apparaît à la fois comme acteur principal et secondaire (auto-interaction).
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Type_Interaction', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Code = e.Actor2Code AND e.Actor1Code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.Day DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec des acteurs gouvernementaux impliqués dans des conflits militaires, classés par intensité
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_1', e.Actor2Name AS 'Acteur_2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine_Evenement', e.QuadClass AS 'Classe_Quad', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein', e.NumMentions AS 'Nombre_Mentions' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL') AND (e.Actor2Type1Code = 'GOV' OR e.Actor2Type1Code = 'MIL') AND e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) AND e.GoldsteinScale < 0 ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC, e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Sources médiatiques rapportant le plus d'événements avec un ton négatif extrême
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Mediatique', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.AvgTone < -5 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(e.AvgTone) ASC, COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 25;

text_query: Pays où les événements de protestation sont les plus fréquents, avec le nombre moyen d'articles par événement
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', COUNT(*) AS 'Total_Protestations', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Moyenne_Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, AVG(e.NumArticles) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du volume d'événements de coopération diplomatique impliquant des organisations internationales
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois_Annee', COUNT(*) AS 'Evenements_Cooperation', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Goldstein_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '06') AND (e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%IGO%' OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode LIKE '%IGO%' OR e.Actor1KnownGroupCode LIKE '%NGO%' OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode LIKE '%NGO%' OR e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF') OR e.Actor2KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF')) GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear DESC;

text_query: Corrélation entre la longueur des documents de mention et le ton des articles pour les événements violents
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionDocLen AS 'Longueur_Document', m.MentionDocTone AS 'Ton_Document', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Code_Racine' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND m.MentionDocLen IS NOT NULL AND m.MentionDocTone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.MentionDocLen DESC LIMIT 100;

text_query: Différence de couverture médiatique entre événements racines et événements dérivés
sql_query: SELECT e.IsRootEvent AS 'Est_Racine', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Evenements', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumSources) AS 'Sources_Moyennes', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens' FROM events e WHERE e.IsRootEvent IN (0, 1) GROUP BY e.IsRootEvent ORDER BY e.IsRootEvent DESC;

text_query: Événements avec décalage temporel important entre l'événement et sa mention dans les médias
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Day AS 'Date_Evenement', m.MentionTimeDate AS 'Date_Mention', (julianday(substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(m.MentionTimeDate, 7, 2)) - julianday(substr(e.Day, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 5, 2) || '-' || substr(e.Day, 7, 2))) AS 'Decalage_Jours', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE Decalage_Jours > 7 ORDER BY Decalage_Jours DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Sources qui rapportent à la fois des événements positifs et négatifs avec une grande confiance
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone > 2 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Positifs', COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone < -2 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) AS 'Evenements_Negatifs', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE m.Confidence > 80 GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone > 2 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 5 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.AvgTone < -2 THEN e.GlobalEventID END) > 5 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements d'aide humanitaire avec localisations géographiques précises
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Donateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Beneficiaire', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.ActionGeo_Lat AS 'Latitude', e.ActionGeo_Long AS 'Longitude', e.NumArticles AS 'Couverture_Mediatique' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode = '07' AND e.ActionGeo_Type >= 3 AND e.ActionGeo_Lat IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_Long IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumArticles DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Événements avec des acteurs de groupes religieux spécifiques impliqués dans des dialogues
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur_1', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur_2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Interaction', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_General', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2Religion1Code IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1Religion1Code != e.Actor2Religion1Code AND e.QuadClass IN (1, 2) ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Événements de coopération militaire avec localisations géopolitiques stratégiques
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur_2', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Lieu_Action', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Evenement_Detaille', e.NumSources AS 'Diversite_Sources' FROM events e WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05', '06') AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL') AND e.Actor2Type1Code IN ('GOV', 'MIL') AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Analyse comparative du ton médiatique entre différentes langues/cultures pour les mêmes événements
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT SUBSTR(m.MentionSourceName, -3)) AS 'Extensions_Sources', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.NumMentions > 5 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.MentionSourceName) >= 3 ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 40;

text_query: Tendances des relations internationales basées sur la fréquence des types d'événements entre pays
sql_query: SELECT e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Initiateur', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Cible', e.QuadClass AS 'Categorie_Interaction', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Interactions', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Score_Relation_Moyen' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor2CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.Actor2CountryCode GROUP BY e.Actor1CountryCode, e.Actor2CountryCode, e.QuadClass HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) ASC LIMIT 50;

text_query: Événements avec une forte dissonance entre le ton général et le ton des documents de mention
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Documents', ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Ecart_Ton', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement', e.NumSources AS 'Nombre_Sources' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID, e.AvgTone, e.EventRootCode, e.NumSources HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 3 AND COUNT(m.GlobalEventID) >= 2 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 35;

text_query: Cartographie des hotspots de conflit basée sur la densité géographique des événements violents
sql_query: SELECT e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code AS 'Region', COUNT(*) AS 'Evenements_Violents', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Intensite_Moyenne', SUM(e.NumArticles) AS 'Couverture_Totale' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 4 AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode IS NOT NULL AND e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.ActionGeo_CountryCode, e.ActionGeo_ADM1Code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) ASC LIMIT 30;

text_query: Événements de protestation couverts par plus de 3 sources médiatiques différentes
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Organisateur_Protestation', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu', e.NumSources AS 'Sources_Uniques', e.NumArticles AS 'Articles_Total', m.MentionSourceName AS 'Exemple_Source' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('14', '13', '12') AND e.NumSources > 3 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de ton entre l'événement principal et ses mentions pour les conflits
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Mentions', (e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) AS 'Difference_Ton', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Evenement' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.QuadClass IN (3, 4) GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(e.AvgTone - AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec localisation précise (ville) et fort volume de couverture
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays', e.ActionGeo_Type AS 'Type_Geolocalisation', e.NumMentions AS 'Mentions', e.NumArticles AS 'Articles' FROM events e WHERE e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) AND e.NumMentions > 30 AND e.NumArticles > 20 ORDER BY e.NumMentions DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Groupes médiatiques couvrant des événements avec un biais tonal extrême
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionSourceName AS 'Source_Média', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Événements', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Source', CASE WHEN AVG(m.MentionDocTone) > 10 THEN 'Très_Positif' WHEN AVG(m.MentionDocTone) < -10 THEN 'Très_Négatif' ELSE 'Neutre' END AS 'Biais_Tonal' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY m.MentionSourceName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 5 AND (AVG(m.MentionDocTone) > 10 OR AVG(m.MentionDocTone) < -10) ORDER BY ABS(AVG(m.MentionDocTone)) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Conflits religieux identifiés par codes ethniques/religieux
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1EthnicCode AS 'Ethnie_Acteur1', e.Actor1Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur1', e.Actor2EthnicCode AS 'Ethnie_Acteur2', e.Actor2Religion1Code AS 'Religion_Acteur2', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Conflit', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton' FROM events e WHERE (e.Actor1Religion1Code IN ('CHR', 'MOS', 'JEW', 'HIN', 'BUD') OR e.Actor2Religion1Code IN ('CHR', 'MOS', 'JEW', 'HIN', 'BUD')) AND (e.Actor1CountryCode IN ('ISR', 'PSE', 'SYR', 'IRQ', 'IRN', 'LBN') OR e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('ISR', 'PSE', 'SYR', 'IRQ', 'IRN', 'LBN')) ORDER BY e.AvgTone ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements racines avec le plus grand nombre de mentions dérivées
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement_Racine', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Original', COUNT(DISTINCT e2.GlobalEventID) AS 'Événements_Dérivés', SUM(e2.NumMentions) AS 'Mentions_Total_Dérivées' FROM events e JOIN events e2 ON e.GlobalEventID != e2.GlobalEventID AND e.EventCode = e2.EventCode AND e.Day = e2.Day AND e.Actor1CountryCode = e2.Actor1CountryCode WHERE e.IsRootEvent = 1 GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e2.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs militaires intervenant dans des pays différents du leur
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Force_Militaire', e.Actor1CountryCode AS 'Pays_Origine', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Intervention', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Action', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Impact' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'MIL' AND e.Actor1CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != '' ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Corrélation entre longueur des documents de mention et ton pour les protestations
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', AVG(m.MentionDocLen) AS 'Longueur_Moyenne_Document', AVG(m.MentionDocTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen_Document', e.NumMentions AS 'Volume_Couverture' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode = '14' GROUP BY e.GlobalEventID HAVING AVG(m.MentionDocLen) > 2000 ORDER BY AVG(m.MentionDocTone) ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Organisations internationales médiatrices dans des conflits
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Médiateur', e.Actor2Name AS 'Partie_Conflit1', e.Actor2CountryCode AS 'Pays_Conflit', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Médiation', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton_Négociation' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1KnownGroupCode IN ('UNO', 'IGO', 'NATO', 'WBK', 'IMF', 'IRC') AND e.EventRootCode IN ('04', '05') AND e.QuadClass = 1 AND e.Actor2CountryCode IN ('USA', 'RUS', 'CHN', 'IRN', 'AFG', 'SYR', 'UKR', 'PSE', 'ISR') AND e.Year >= 2020 ORDER BY e.AvgTone DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements avec divergence entre lieu de l'acteur et lieu d'action
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_CountryCode AS 'Pays_Action', e.Actor1Geo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Acteur', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Lieu_Action', e.EventRootCode AS 'Type_Événement' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != '' AND e.ActionGeo_CountryCode != '' AND e.Actor1Geo_CountryCode != e.ActionGeo_CountryCode LIMIT 20;

text_query: Couverture médiatique des événements économiques par type de source
sql_query: SELECT m.MentionType AS 'Type_Source', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Nombre_Événements', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Coopération_Moyenne', AVG(e.NumArticles) AS 'Articles_Moyens' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID WHERE e.EventRootCode IN ('06', '07') AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('BUS', 'GOV') GROUP BY m.MentionType ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Évolution mensuelle du nombre de conflits matériels en 2023
sql_query: SELECT e.MonthYear AS 'Mois', COUNT(*) AS 'Nombre_Conflits', AVG(e.GoldsteinScale) AS 'Intensité_Moyenne', AVG(e.NumMentions) AS 'Couverture_Moyenne' FROM events e WHERE e.Year = 2023 AND e.QuadClass = 4 GROUP BY e.MonthYear ORDER BY e.MonthYear ASC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Acteurs criminels impliqués dans des événements violents avec localisation urbaine
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Groupe_Criminel', e.ActionGeo_Fullname AS 'Ville', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Violence', e.AvgTone AS 'Ton', e.NumSources AS 'Sources_Couverture' FROM events e WHERE e.Actor1Type1Code = 'CRM' AND e.EventRootCode IN ('18', '19', '20') AND e.ActionGeo_Type IN (3, 4, 5) ORDER BY e.NumSources DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Différence de confiance d'extraction entre types d'événements
sql_query: SELECT e.EventRootCode AS 'Catégorie_Événement', AVG(m.Confidence) AS 'Confiance_Moyenne_Extraction', COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) AS 'Échantillon', AVG(e.AvgTone) AS 'Ton_Moyen' FROM events e JOIN mentions m ON e.GlobalEventID = m.GlobalEventID GROUP BY e.EventRootCode HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT e.GlobalEventID) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(m.Confidence) DESC LIMIT 20;

text_query: Événements de coopération matérielle avec multiples acteurs de même type
sql_query: SELECT e.GlobalEventID AS 'ID_Evenement', e.Actor1Name AS 'Acteur_Principal', e.Actor2Name AS 'Partenaire', e.Actor1Type1Code AS 'Type_Acteur', e.EventCode AS 'Code_Coopération', e.GoldsteinScale AS 'Score_Goldstein' FROM events e WHERE e.QuadClass = 2 AND e.Actor1Type1Code = e.Actor2Type1Code AND e.Actor1Type1Code IN ('NGO', 'BUS', 'EDU', 'GOV', 'MED', 'IGO') ORDER BY e.GoldsteinScale DESC LIMIT 20;
